Time Model Statistics

  • DB Time represents total time in user calls
  • DB CPU represents CPU time of foreground processes
  • Total CPU Time represents foreground and background processes
  • Statistics including the word "background" measure background process time, therefore do not contribute to the DB time statistic
  • Ordered by % of DB time in descending order, followed by Statistic Name

Wait Event Histogram Detail (4 sec to 2 min)

  • Units for Total Waits column: K is 1000, M is 1000000, G is 1000000000
  • Units for % of Total Waits: s is 1024 milliseconds (approximately 1 second) m is 64*1024 milliseconds (approximately 67 seconds or 1.1 minutes)
  • % of Total Waits: total waits for all wait classes, including Idle
  • % of Total Waits: value of .0 indicates value was <.05%; value of null is truly 0

SQL IdSQL Text
0771warpuauap select /*+ optimizer_features_enable('11.2.0.4') */ distinct refnum_pivot.op_u "OP UNIT", sqry.shipment, sqry.transport_mode, sqry.carrier, sqry.src_loc, v_loc_dest.location_name dest_loc, to_char(sqry.start_time, 'mm/dd/yyyy') Scheduled_POE, to_char(sqry.end_time, 'mm/dd/yyyy') Scheduled_POI, to_char(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'mm/dd/yyyy') ETA, to_char(ldd.minldd, 'mm/dd/yyyy') NEED_DATE, case when to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(sysdate, 'DD-MON-RR') and ( to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(sqry.end_time, 'DD-MON-RR') or to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') is not null and to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') ) then 'MISSED' when to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < (to_date(sqry.end_time, 'DD-MON-RR') + 7) then 'AT RISK' when to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') is not null and (to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') +7) then 'AT RISK' else 'OK' end NEED_DT_RISK, refnum_pivot.mbol "MBL_NBR", refnum_pivot.hbl "HBL_NBR", refnum_pivot.vn "VESSEL", refnum_pivot.voyn "VOYAGE", refnum_pivot.TSvn "TSHIP_VESSEL", refnum_pivot.TSvoyn "TSHIP_VOYAGE", refnum_pivot.conn "CONTAINER_NBR", ship_orl_master.ORDER_RELEASE, ship_orl_master.packaged_item_gid ITEM_ID, buyer2.ob_refnum_value as "Buyer Name", csb.ROUTER_NAME, csb.ROUTER_SSO, sqry.FTZ, shipment.domain_name, glog_util.remove_domain(ship_orl_master.ship_unit_gid) SHIP_UNIT, ship_orl_master.DESCRIPTION ITEM_DESC, shipment.TO TAL_ship_unit_count, ship_orl_master.ship_unit_count, ship_orl_master.LENGTH_M, ship_orl_master.WIDTH_M, ship_orl_master.HEIGHT_M, case when refnum_pivot.op_u in ('102', '104', 'EPE_US', '5250', '10199', '10299', '10599', '11099', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'HR11', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG_NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_Steamgen', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', ' PL20', 'REPAIRS', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PM11-1', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US45', 'US48', 'US63' ) then 'POWER' when refnum_pivot.op_u in ('AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND_IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GERE_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_WIND_IND_PN', 'OU_GERE_CN_WESY' ) then 'RENEWABLES' else 'UNCLASSIFIED' end SPLIT_ -- select * from shipment from (select shipment.shipment_gid , ie_shipmentstatus.status_code_gid from shipment, ss_status_history, ie_shipmentstatus where shipment.tranSport_mode_gid like '%VESSEL%' and shipment.shipment_gid = ss_status_history.shipment_gid and ss_status_history.I_TRANSACTION_NO = ie_shipmentstatus.I_TRANSACTION_NO and ie_shipmentstatus.status_code_gid in( 'D1', 'J1', 'VA') and (GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_indt(shipment.SHIPMENT_GID)) >= trunc(sysdate)-120 ) Delivered, ( select SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO, SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE from SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, (select SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, MAX(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO) I_TRANSACTION_NO f rom IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, SS_STATUS_HISTORY WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ('AG', 'X2') and IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.insert_date >= trunc(sysdate) - 120 GROUP BY SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID ) LDE WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO and LDE.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = LDE.SHIPMENT_GID AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ('AG', 'X2')) ETA, (select glog_util.remove_domain(v_ssd.shipment_gid) shipment, v_ssd.shipment_gid, max(v_ssul.order_release_gid), v_loc_car.location_name carrier, v_loc_src.location_name src_loc, v_ship.start_time, v_ship.end_t ime, glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.transport_mode_gid) transport_mode, case when ITEM_REF.ITEM_refnum_value = 'Y' then 'YES' when ITEM_REF.ITEM_refnum_value is null then 'NO' else ITEM_REF.ITEM_refnum_value end FTZ from s_ship_unit_line v_ssul, packaged_item v_pi, item v_item, (SELECT ITEM_gid, ITEM_refnum_value FROM ITEM_REFNUM where glog_util.remove_domain(ITEM_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'FTZ_ITEM') ITEM_REF, S_SHIP_UNIT v_ssu, shipment_stop_d v_ssd, shipment v_ship, SHIPMENT_STATUS v_ship_stat, location v_loc_src, location v_loc_car where v_ssul.s_ship_unit_gid = v_ssd.s_ship_unit_gid and v_item.item_gid = ITEM_REF.item_gid (+) and v_ssul.packaged_item_gid = v_pi.packaged_item_gid and v_pi.item_gid = v_item.item_gid and v_ssd.stop_num = 1 and v_ssul.s_ship_unit_gid = v_ssu.s_ship_unit_gid and v_ssd.shipment_gid = v_ship.shipment_gid and v_ship.source_location_gid = v_loc_src.location_gid and v_ship.transport_mode_gid like '%VESSEL%' and TRUNC(v_ship_stat.insert_date) >= TRUNC(sysdate-120) and v_ship.shipment_gid = v_ship_stat.shipment_gid and glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship_stat.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') and v_ship.SERVPROV_GID = v_loc_car.location_gid group by v_ssd.shipment_gid, v_loc_car.location_name, v_loc_src.location_name, v_ship.start_time, v_ship.end_time, v_ship.transport_mode_gid, ITE M_REF.ITEM_refnum_value ) sqry, (select shipment, vn, TSvn, TSvoyn, vcode, op_u, mbol, hbl, conn, voyn from (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REFNUM.shipment_gid) shipment, SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL.shipment_refnum_qual_xid, SHIPMENT_REFNUM.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM , SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL where SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL.shipment_refnum_qual_gid = SHIPMENT_REFNUM.shipment_refnum_qual_gid ) pivot (max(shipment_refnum_value) for shipment_refnum_qual_xid in ('VESSEL_NAME' vn, 'VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1' TSvn, 'VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1' TSvoyn, 'VESSEL_CODE' vcode, 'OP_UNIT' op_u, 'MBOL_NUMBER' mbol, 'HBL_NUMBER' hbl, 'CONTAINER_NBR' conn, 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' voyn))) refnum_pivot, ( select v_ssd.shipment_gid, v_ssul.order_release_gid orl, v_ssul.order_release_gid ORDER_RELEASE, v_ssul.order_base_gid, v_pi.packaged_item_gid, item.DESCRIPTION, v_su.ship_unit_gid, v_su.ship_unit_count, -- v_su.unit_length_base, round(v_su.unit_length_base * 0.3048 , 2) LENGTH_M, round(v_su.unit_WIDTH_base * 0.3048 , 2) WIDTH_M, round(v_su.unit_HEIGHT_base * 0.3048 , 2) HEIGHT_M from shipment_stop_d v_ssd, s_ship_unit_line v_ssul, ship_unit v_su, packaged_item v_pi, item where v_ssd.s_ship_unit_gid = v_ssul.s_ship_unit_gid and v_ssul.ship_unit_gid = v_su.ship_unit_gid and v_ssuL.packaged_item_gid = v_pi.packaged_item_gid and v_ssd.stop_num = 1 and v_pi.item_gid = item.item_gid and v_ssul.s_ship_unit_line_no = 1 )ship_orl_master, (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(tc.insert_user) router_sso, con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name router_name, glog_util.remove_domain(tc.shipment_gid) shipment_gid FROM tender_collaboration tc, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATIO N_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid) z WHERE tc.insert_user = con.contact_gid AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn ) CSB, location v_loc_dest, REGION_DETAIL rd, shipment, (SELECT SH2.shipment_gid, MIN(ldd.late_delivery_date) minldd FROM ORDER_RELEASE ORE3, SHIPMENT SH2, SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN SSEJ2, S_EQUIPMENT_S_SHIP_UNIT_JOIN SESSUJ2, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE SSUL2, (SELECT order_release_gid, late_delivery_date FROM order_release) ldd WHERE SSEJ2.S_EQUIPMENT_GID = SESSUJ2.S_EQUIPMENT_GID AND SESSUJ2.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = SSUL2.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND ORE3.ORDER_RELEASE_GID =SSUL2.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND SH2.SHIPMENT_GID = SSEJ2.SHIPMENT_GID AND ORE3.order_release_gid = ldd.order_release_gid GROUP BY SH2.shipment_gid) ldd, ( select obr.order_base_gid, obr.ob_refnum_value from OB_REFNUM OBR where glog_util.remove_domain(OBR.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'BUYER_NAME' ) BUYER2 where sqry.shipment = refnum_pivot.shipment and v_loc_dest.location_gid = shipment.dest_location_gid and sqry.shipment_gid = ETA.shipment_gid(+) and sqry.shipment_gid = delivered.shipment_gid(+) and Delivered.status_code_gid is null and ship_orl_master.shipment_gid = sqry.shipment_g id --added (+) below trouble and sqry.shipment_gid = csb.SHIPMENT_GID(+) and shipment.shipment_gid = sqry.shipment_gid and shipment.dest_location_gid = v_loc_dest.location_gid and v_loc_dest.country_code3_gid = rd.country_code3_gid and glog_util.remove_domain(rd.region_gid) = 'NAM' and refnum_pivot.op_u not in ('OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', '102', '104', 'EPE_US', '5250', '10199', '10299', '10599', '11099', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'HR11', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_JEN_OHG', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HUN_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG_NYSS' , 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_Steamgen', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'REPAIRS', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PM11-1', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US45', 'US48', 'US63') AND sqry.shipment_gid = ldd.shipment_gid -- and ship_orl_master.order_base_gid = FROM location WHERE location_gid = ore.Source_location_gid ) OR_supplier_Name, or_pu.location_name OR_PU_LOC, or_pu.city OR_PU_CITY, or_pu.postal_code OR_PU_ZIP, pucou.country_name OR_PU_CNTRY, or_del.location_name OR_DEL_LOC, or_del.city OR_DEL_CITY, or_del.postal_code OR_DEL_ZIP, delcou.country_name OR_DEL_CNTRY, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.ob_line_gid) OB_LINE, orl.item_package_count item_count, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.packaged_item_gid) item_id, (SELECT NVL(description, item_name) FROM item WHERE item_gid = orl.packaged_item_gid ) Item_desc, TO_DATE(TRUNC(submit.insert_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_Submit_dt, glog_util.remove_domain(submit.insert_user) OR_Submit_by, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.early_pickup_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_early_PU_DT, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.late_delivery_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_late_del_DT, (SELECT description FROM GENERAL_LEDGER_CODE WHERE general_ledger_gid = ore.buy_general_ledger_gid ) "OR_BILL_CODE", glog_util.remove_domain(leg.shipment_gid) SHIPMENT_ID, leg.leg_id, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.sc_status ) SHIP_STATUS, leg.router, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.source_location_gid) pu_loc_id, leg.pu_loc, leg.pu_city, leg.pu_zip, leg.pu_cntry, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.dest_location_gid) del_loc_id, leg.del_loc, leg.del_city, leg.del_zip, leg.del_cntry, TO_DATE(leg.sch_pu_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_pu_dt, TO_DATE(leg.act_pu, 'DD-MM-YY')act_pu, TO_DATE(leg.sch_del_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_del_dt, TO_DATE(leg.eta, 'DD-MM-YY') eta, TO_DATE( leg.act_del, 'DD-MM-YY') act_del, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.first_equipment_group_gid) EQUIPMENT, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.transport_mode_gid) transport_mode, leg.carrier, ROUND(leg.total_actual_cost_base, 2) COST_USD, --ROUND(leg.total_weight_base* 0.4536) shipment_weight_kg, LEG.FLIGHT_NBR, LEG.HAWB_NBR, LEG.MAWB_NBR, LEG.VOYAGE_NBR, LEG.VESSEL_CODE, LEG.VESSEL_NAME, LEG.HBL_NBR, LEG.MBL_NBR, LEG.CONTAINER_NBR, submit.insert_date FILTER_DT, ore.domain_name DOMAIN FROM order_release ore, location or_pu, location or_del, COUNTRY_CODE pucou, COUNTRY_CODE delcou, order_release_line orl, (SELECT ore.order_release_gid, sh.shipment_gid, --sh.itinerary_gid, CASE WHEN sh.itinerary_gid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT sequence_no FROM ITINERARY_DETAIL WHERE itinerary_gid = sh.ITINERARY_GID AND leg_gid = sh.PARENT_LEG_GID ) END leg_id, (SELE CT status_value_gid FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid ) sc_status, NVL( (SELECT con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name router_name FROM tender_collaboration tc, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.status_value_gid) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid ) z WHERE tc.insert_user = con.contact_gid AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn AND tc.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_GID ), (SELECT c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name router_name FROM CONTACT C --WHERE c.contact_gid = SH.INSERT_USER WHERE c.contact_gid = PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(SH.shipment_gid) )) router, sh.source_location_gid, pu_loc.location_name pu_loc, pu_loc.city pu_city, pu_loc.postal_code pu_zip, puc.country_name pu_cntry, sh.dest_location_gid, del_loc.location_name del_loc, del_loc.city del_city, del_loc.postal_code del_zip, dlc.country_name del_cntry, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.start_time, sh.source_location_gid)) sch_pu_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs _status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('CP', 'VD') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_pu, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.end_time, sh.dest_location_gid)) sch_del_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('X2', 'AG') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) eta, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('D1', 'VA', 'J1') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND row num <2 ) act_del, sh.total_weight_base, sh.first_equipment_group_gid, sh.transport_mode_gid, (SELECT location_name FROM location WHERE location_gid = sh.SERVPROV_GID ) carrier, sh.total_actual_cost_base, (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'FLIGHT_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "FLIGHT_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment _refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VOYAGE_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_CODE' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_CODE", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = s h.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_NAME", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HBL_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MBL_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'CONTAINER_NBR' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "CONTAINER_NBR" FROM order_release ore, shipment sh, or der_movement omo, location pu_loc, location del_loc, COUNTRY_CODE puc, COUNTRY_CODE dlc WHERE ore.order_release_gid = omo.order_release_gid AND omo.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND sh.source_location_gid = pu_loc.location_gid AND pu_loc.country_code3_gid = puc.country_code3_gid AND sh.dest_location_gid = del_loc.location_gid AND del_loc.country_code3_gid = dlc.country_code3_gid AND SH.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID = 'TRANSPORT' --AND SH.INSERT_DATE >= sysdate -150 AND PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_indt(SH.shipment_gid) >= sysdate -150 AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_WITHDRAWN', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED', 'SECURE RES OURCES_NO RESPONSE', 'SECURE RESOURCES_DECLINED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_NOT STARTED') AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND shipment_refnum_value = 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU' ) ) ) leg, (SELECT order_release_gid, insert_date, insert_user FROM order_release_status WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Type_Gid) ='SUBMIT_TO_LCOE' ) submit WHERE ore.order_release_gid = leg.order_release_gid (+) AND NVL(ore.plan_from_location_gid, ore.source_location_gid ) = or_pu.location_gid AND NVL(ore.plan_to_location_gid, ore.dest_location_gid ) = or_del.location_gid AND or_PU.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = pucou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND or_del.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = delcou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND ore.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid AND ore.order_release_gid = submit.order_release_gid AND orl.ob_line_gid IS NOT NULL AND submit.insert_date >= sysdate - 150 /* OR leg.act_del IS NULL OR leg.act_del >= sysdate - 15*/ AND ore.order_release_gid IN (SELECT order_release_gid FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND order_release_refnum_value = 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU' ) ORDER BY 1 ASC

glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time)+1 = trunc(act_del.actual) then 'On Time' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time)+2 = trunc(act_del.actual) then 'On Time' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time)+3 = trunc(act_del.actual) then 'On Time' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time)+4 = trunc(act_del.actual) then 'On Time' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time)+5 = trunc(act_del.actual) then 'On Time' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time)+5 < trunc(act_del.actual) then 'Late' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) = 'LTL' and trunc(sh.end_time) != trunc(act_del.actual) and ((TRUNC(sh.end_time) - TRUNC(act_del.actual) ) +1 - ((((TRUNC(sh.end_time, 'D'))-(TRUNC(act_del.actual, 'D')))/7)*2) - (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DY', 'nls_date_language=english')='SUN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(sh.end_time, 'DY', 'nls_date_language=english')='SAT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -1) = -1 then 'On Time' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) not like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time) > trunc(act_del.actual) then 'Early' when glog_ut il.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) not like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time) = trunc(act_del.actual) then 'On Time' when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) not like '%VESSEL%' and trunc(sh.end_time) < trunc(act_del.actual) then 'Late' when trunc(sh.end_time) > trunc(act_del.actual) then 'Early' when trunc(sh.end_time) = trunc(act_del.actual) then 'On Time' when trunc(sh.end_time) < trunc(act_del.actual) then 'Late' end DEL_On_Time, -- case -- -- when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and sh.end_time+1 = act_del.actual then 'On Time' -- when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like '%VESSEL%' and sh.end_time+2 = act_del.actual then 'On Time' -- when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) like TRUNC(act_del.actual) ) +1 - -- ((((TRUNC(sh.end_time, 'D'))-(TRUNC(act_del.actual, 'D')))/7)*2) - -- (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DY', 'nls_date_language=english')='SUN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - '%VESSEL%' and sh.end_time > act_del.actual then 'Early' -- when glog_util.remove_domain(sh.transport_mode_gid) not like '%VESSEL%' and sh.end_time = act_del.actual then 'On Time' -- when then 'On Time' -- when sh.end_time < act_del.actual then 'Late' -- end DEL_On_Time, -- ( select trunc(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.insert_date) --|| ' INSERTED:' -- || IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.insert_date REASON from TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'DAMAGE FREIGHT', 'ORIGIN POLE', 'LOST FREIGHT', 'WEATHER_DELAY', 'STORAGE', 'U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'BROKER DELAY', 'CARRIER FAILURE', 'APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE' ) and SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) REASON_INSERT, router.ROUTER_SSO, -- glog_util.remove_domain(glogowner.pkg_audit_util.fnc_ship_inusr(sh.shipment_gid)) "CREATED_BY_SSO", -----------------tracking begins (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gi d) = 'CRITICAL ORDER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "CRITICAL_ORDER", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'REGULAR PREMIUM' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "REGULAR_PREMIUM", nvl( (SELECT SHIPMENT_REMARK.remark_text FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REMARK.remark_qual_gid) = 'PRO_NUMBER' AND SHIPMENT_REMARK.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ), (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'PRO NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 )) "PRO_NUMBER", edipro.pronumber "EDI_PRO_NUMBER", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.re move_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'FLIGHT_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "FLIGHT_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "VOYAGE_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "VESSEL_NAME", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "TSHIP_VESSEL", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_RE FNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "TSHIP_VOYAGE", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HBL_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MBL_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'CONTAINER_NBR' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "CONTAINER_NBR", -----------------tracking ends case when glog_util.remove_domain(ore.order_release_gid) LIKE 'WOB_%' then 'YES' else 'NO' end WOB, (SELECT sr.order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID)= 'MSD' AND sr.order_release_gid = ore.order_release_gid and rownum =1 ) "MSD", glog_util.remove_domain(ore.order_release_gid) ORDER_RELEASE, ROUND(sh.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", sh.domain_name DOMAIN, (SELECT DISTINCT trunc(eventdate) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND glog_util.remove_domain(bsc.bs_status_code_xid) = 'CUSTOMER LATE' ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) CUSTOMER_LATE, case when (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) in ('102', '104', '5250', '10199', '10299', '10599', '11099', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'HR11', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_JEN_OHG', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HUN_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_ CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG_NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_Steamgen', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'REPAIRS', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PM11-1', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US45', 'US48', 'US63' ) then 'POWER' when (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) in ('AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', ' AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND_IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GERE_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_WIND_IND_PN') then 'RENEWABLES' else 'UNCLASSIFIED' end SPLIT_ FROM --REGION_DETAIL PU_reg, -- REGION_DETAIL DEL_reg, ( select ProNum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE ProNumber, ShipmentID.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE ShipmentID from shipment, location, (select ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, ie_shipment_refnum.i_transaction_no FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM, ie_shipmentstatus where ie_shipment_refnum.insert_user like '%E2OPEN%' and ie_shipment_refnum.I_TRANSACTION_NO = ie_shipmentstatus.i_transaction_ no and ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' ) ProNum, (select ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, ie_shipment_refnum.i_transaction_no FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM, ie_shipmentstatus where ie_shipment_refnum.insert_user like '%E2OPEN%' and ie_shipment_refnum.I_TRANSACTION_NO = ie_shipmentstatus.i_transaction_no and ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG') ShipmentID where ShipmentID.i_transaction_no = ProNum.i_transaction_no and ShipmentID.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = shipment.shipment_gid and shipment.servprov_gid = location.location_gid )EDIPRO, order_release ore, order_movement om, shipment sh, location puloc, location deloc, location carrier, (SELECT shipment_gid, STATUS_VALUE_GID, insert_date FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' ) sst, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, ies.eventdate Actual FROM shipment s, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' and glog_util.remove_domain(ssh.reporting_gluser) != 'SOA_USER' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, s.end_time "PLANNED", ies.eventdate Actual FROM shipment s, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MIN(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' and glog_util.remove_domain(ssh.rep orting_gluser) != 'SOA_USER' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no ) act_del, (SELECT sh.shipment_gid, -- con.first_name -- || ' ' -- || con.last_name router_name, glog_util.remove_domain(tc.insert_user)ROUTER_SSO FROM tender_collaboration tc, -- contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.status_value_gid) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid ) z, shipment sh WHERE --tc.insert_user = con.contact_gid(+) tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn AND tc.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_GID ) ROUTER, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, ies.eventdate Actual FROM shipment s, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA WHERE sh.shipment_gid = sst.shipment_gid -- AND puloc.country_code3_gid = PU_reg.country_code3_gid -- and glog_util.remove_domain(pu_reg.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'NAM', -- 'SAM', 'APAC', -- 'JSK', 'IND') AND deloc.country_ code3_gid IN ( 'BLZ', 'CAN', 'CRI', 'GTM', 'HND', 'MEX', 'NIC', 'PAN', 'SLV', 'SPM', 'USA' ) --= D, EL_reg.country_code3_gid -- SELECT country_code3_gid FROM REGION_DETAIL WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(region_gid) ='NAM' -- and glog_util.remove_domain(DEL_reg.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'NAM', -- 'SAM', 'APAC', -- 'JSK', 'IND') AND glog_util.remove_domain(sst.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') and trunc(sst.insert_date) >= '01-jan-2020' AND sh.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND sh.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid(+) AND sh.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid(+) AND puloc.location_gid = sh.source_location_gid AND deloc.location_gid = sh.dest_location_gid AND Sh.SHIPMENT_GID = edipro.SHIPMENTID(+) AND sh. SERVPROV_GID = carrier.LOCATION_GID and (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) != 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI' and ore.order_release_gid = om.order_release_gid AND om.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND sh.shipment_gid = router.shipment_gid AND sh.shipment_gid = ETA.shipment_gid(+) AND carrier.LOCATION_XID <> 'CUSTOMER_CARRIER' -- and nvl(ETA.actual, sh.end_time) <= trunc(sysdate) -- act_del.actual is not null -- ) where wob = 'NO' and (MSD = 'MSD_NO' or MSD = 'NO' or -- MSD is null)

"CHARGEABLE_WEIGHT_UOM_CODE"=:201 , "CHARGEABLE_WEIGHT_BASE"=:202 , "CM_COST_FN"=:203 , "CM_COST_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:204 , "TOTAL_ACTUAL_C_FN"=:205 , "TOTAL_ACTUAL_C_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:206 , "TOTAL_TRANS_C_FN"=:207 , "TOTAL_TRANS_C_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:208 , "TOTAL_WT_COST_FN"=:209 , "TOTAL_WT_COST_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:210 , "PLANNED_COST_FN"=:211 , "PLANNED_COST_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:212 , "INSURANCE_AMT_FN"=:213 , "INSURANCE_AMT_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:214 , "INSURANCE_PREM_FN"=:215 , "INSURANCE_PREM_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:216 , "TOT_MATCH_INV_FN"=:217 , "TOT_MATCH_INV_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:218 , "ORIGINAL_INV_C_FN"=:219 , "ORIGINAL_INV_C_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:220 , "TOTAL_APP_COST_FN"=:221 , "TOTAL_APP_COST_FN_CURRENCY_GID"=:222 , "FIXED_SERVICE_DAYS"=:223 , "SIGHTING_LOCATION_GID"=:224 , "SIGHTING_DATE"=:225 , "PREV_SIGHTING_LOCATION_GID"=:226 , "PREV_SIGHTING_DATE "=:227 , "DRIVER_GID"=:228 , "SECONDARY_DRIVER_GID"=:229 , "POWER_UNIT_GID"=:230 , "DRIVER_ASSIGN_BULK_PLAN_GID"=:231 , "EQUIPMENT_ASSIGN_BULK_PLAN_GID"=:232 , "PREV_DROP_INVENTORY_PROCESSED"=:233 , "PICK_INVENTORY_PROCESSED"=:234 , "DROP_INVENTORY_PROCESSED"=:235 , "DIM_VOLUME"=:236 , "DIM_VOLUME_UOM_CODE"=:237 , "DIM_VOLUME_BASE"=:238 , "CHARGEABLE_VOLUME"=:239 , "CHARGEABLE_VOLUME_UOM_CODE"=:240 , "CHARGEABLE_VOLUME_BASE"=:241 , "PLANNING_PARAMETER_SET_GID"=:242 , "NUM_EQUIPMENT_ORDERED"=:243 , "EM_PHONE_NUMBER"=:244 , "PARCEL_ZONE"=:245 , "ATTRIBUTE1"=:246 , "ATTRIBUTE2"=:247 , "ATTRIBUTE3"=:248 , "ATTRIBUTE4"=:249 , "ATTRIBUTE5"=:250 , "ATTRIBUTE6"=:251 , "ATTRIBUTE7"=:252 , "ATTRIBUTE8"=:253 , "ATTRIBUTE9"=:25 4 , "ATTRIBUTE10"=:255 , "ATTRIBUTE11"=:256 , "ATTRIBUTE12"=:257 , "ATTRIBUTE13"=:258 , "ATTRIBUTE14"=:259 , "ATTRIBUTE15"=:260 , "ATTRIBUTE16"=:261 , "ATTRIBUTE17"=:262 , "ATTRIBUTE18"=:263 , "ATTRIBUTE19"=:264 , "ATTRIBUTE20"=:265 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1"=:266 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2"=:267 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3"=:268 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4"=:269 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5"=:270 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6"=:271 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7"=:272 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8"=:273 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9"=:274 , "ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10"=:275 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE1"=:276 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE2"=:277 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE3"=:278 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE4"=:279 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE5"=:280 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE6"=:281 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE7"=:282 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE8"=:283 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE9"=:284 , "ATTRIBUTE_DATE10"=:285 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY1"=:286 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY1_GID"=:287 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY1_BASE"=:288 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY2"=:289 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY2_GID"=:290 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY2_BASE"=:291 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY3"=:292 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY3_GID"=:293 , "ATTRIBUTE_CURRENCY3_BASE"=:294 , "COMBINATION_EQUIP_GRP_GID"=:295 , "SI_CUTOFF_DATE"=:296 , "CFS_CUTOFF_DATE"=:297 , "SRC_ARB_LEVEL_OF_SERVICE_GID"=:298 , "DEST_ARB_LEVEL_OF_SERVICE_GID"=:299 , "CFS_LOCATION_GID"=:300 , "IS_FIXED_VOYAGE"=:301 , "DOMAIN_NAME"=:302 , "UPDATE_USER"=:303 , "UPDATE_DATE"=:304 WHERE "SHIPMENT_GID"=:305
0x90fthduujxqSELECT ADJ_FACTOR FROM MISSING_TIME_ZONE WHERE TIME_ZONE_GID = :B1
0zg5scs7brcfgselect count(1) from all_objects where object_name = :1
120p29dqbqwd1 select * from (select distinct glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (select glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user from tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat where v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO and v_tend_coll_stat.status_type_gid in ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) and v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid in ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TEND ER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) and v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum=1) "CARRIER_SEL_BY_ROUTER_SSO", replace(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME||'.') AS ITINERARY, case when act_PU.actual is null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINERARY_GID is not null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINER ARY_GID is null THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , Case when act_pu.PUDEL is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 then 'Pickup_Date_Missing' Else 'Pickup_Date_Exist' End "Pickup_Date_Status", Case when act_del.PUDEL is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 then 'Delivery_Date_Missing' Else 'Delivery_Date_Exist' End "Delivery_Date_Status", loc_src.Location_Name "PU_LOCATION", loc_src.City "PU_CITY", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "PU_COUNTRY", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "PU_ZIP", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "PU_REGION", loc_des.Location_Name "DEL_LOCATION", loc_des.City "DEL_CITY", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "DEL_COUNTRY", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "DEL_ZIP", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "DEL_REGION", replace(v_ship.SERV PROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (select carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" from Location carrier where v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID)Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "SHIP_MODE", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT", v_ship.total_weight_uom_code "UOM", to_char(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", to_char(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ACT_PU_DT", to_char(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ACT_DEL_DT", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util. remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME')and rownum=1) AS VESSEL_NAME, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_Number' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID an d rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_Number' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR')and rownum=1) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID)) AS INSERT_ROUTER_SSO, (select c.first_name||' '||c.last_name from shipment_involved_party sip, contact c where sip.shipment_gid = v_ship.shipment_gid and sip.involved_party_contact_gid = c.contact_gid and glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'ROUTER' and rownum = 1) "ROUTER_NAME", DECODE(wob.orl, NULL, NULL, 'YES') "WOB", (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FRO M order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID in ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid and rownum =1) AS MSD from shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT shpt.shipment_gid, MAX(orl.order_release_gid) orl FROM shipment shpt, SHIPMENT_STOP_D SSD, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE SSUL, ORDER_RELEASE ORL WHERE shpt.SHIPMENT_GID = SSD.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSD.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = SSUL.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND SSUL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) LIKE 'WOB_%' AND shpt.insert_date >= (sysdate-150) GROUP BY shpt.shipment_gid ) wob, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) actual FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, trunc(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA, (SELECT shipment_gid, STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' ) sst where loc_src.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID and v_ship.shipment_gid=om.shipment_gid(+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid=wob.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = sst.shipment_gid and v_ship.shipment_type_gid='TRANSPORT' and loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and glog_util.remove_domain (v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') and glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) and v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) and loc_des.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND glog_util.remove_domain(sst.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') and ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE is null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE is null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date>=(sysdate-150) ) where "Op_Unit" in ( '102', '104', '5250', '10199', ' 10299', '10599', '11099', '600117315', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'DEL#6735427', 'EPE_US', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'GEEN16', 'GEEN26', 'GEN 8 #5 / GEN 8 #6', 'HH01', 'HR11', 'HUN_US', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OP-GEEN39-CTSI', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HUN_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG_NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_SS', 'OU_PG_STEAM', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'STEAM_GEN', 'UO_PG_STEA MGEN', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-2700', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P1KR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PPCH', 'RU-PM11-1', 'RU-1100', 'RU-PUR8' ) and "CARRIER_SEL_BY_ROUTER_SSO" in ( '502059057', '105061691', '502409002', '503174066', '503154772', '503124945', '503191787', '503148998', '503190858', '503213244', '503078592', '502703042', '502451838', '503154764', '502753693', '503059328', '503081558', '502100489', '503158159', '503154768', '502417293', '503148992', '503005857', '605011025', '502234586', '503188302', '502614311', '605011032', '503154765', '503183362', '503167020', '503106333', '503063722', '502410576', '503146352', '503167023', '502544457', '503105301', '502528431', '501799405', '503185337', '502678718', '502714845', '503152525', '503085322', '502330646', '503172049', '502528396', '503162242', '503169392', '503249094', '503241796', '503218862', '5032 33925', '503218860' )
121ffmrc95v7gselect i.obj#, i.ts#, i.file#, i.block#, i.intcols, i.type#, i.flags, i.property, i.pctfree$, i.initrans, i.maxtrans, i.blevel, i.leafcnt, i.distkey, i.lblkkey, i.dblkkey, i.clufac, i.cols, i.analyzetime, i.samplesize, i.dataobj#, nvl(i.degree, 1), nvl(i.instances, 1), i.rowcnt, mod(i.pctthres$, 256), i.indmethod#, i.trunccnt, nvl(c.unicols, 0), nvl(c.deferrable#+c.valid#, 0), nvl(i.spare1, i.intcols), i.spare4, i.spare2, i.spare6, decode(i.pctthres$, null, null, mod(trunc(i.pctthres$/256), 256)), nvl(i.evaledition#, 1), nvl(i.unusablebefore#, 0), nvl(i.unusablebeginning#, 0), ist.cachedblk, ist.cachehit, ist.logicalread from ind$ i, ind_stats$ ist, (select enabled, min(intcols) unicols, min(to_number(bitand(defer, 1))) deferrable#, min(to_number(bitand(defer, 4))) valid# from cdef$ where obj#=:1 and enabled > 1 group by enabled) c where i.obj#=c.enabled(+) and i.obj# = ist.obj#(+) and i.bo#=:1 order by i.obj#
13jx1jt1s5khu SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
1fcdnhz3yk0dh SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Chicago' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
1gr4zhc9wu4nm select * from (select distinct glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", Case when act_pu.PUDEL is null then 'Pickup_Date_Missing' Else 'Pickup_Date_Exist' End "Pickup_Date_Status", Case when act_del.PUDEL is null then 'Delivery_Date_Missing' Else 'Delivery_Date_Exist' End "Delivery_Date_Status", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (select glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user from tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat where v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO and v_tend_coll_stat.status_type_gid in ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TEN DER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) and v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid in ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) and v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum=1) "Router", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_src.LOCATION_GID) "Pickup_LocationID", replace(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NA ME||'.') AS ITIN, case when act_PU.actual is null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINERARY_GID is not null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINERARY_GID is null THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , loc_src.Location_Name "Origin_Location_Name", loc_src.City "Origin_City", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Origin_Country", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "Origin Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "Origin_Reg", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_des.LOCATION_GID) "Destination_LocationID", loc_des.Location_Name "Des_Location_Name", loc_des.City "Des_City", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Des_Country", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "Dest Zip" , glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "Dest_Reg", replace(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (select carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" from Location carrier where v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID)Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "Mode", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", to_char(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", to_char(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_PU_DT", TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_DEL_DT", To_Char(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ESTMATED_ARRIVAL", (select glog_util.remove_domain(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID) REASON from SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO and SS_STATUS_HISTORY.is_hidden = 'N' AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ( 'GECORP.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GECORP.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GECORP.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA C AUSED', 'GECORP.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE001.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE002.LOST FREIGHT', 'GECORP.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.LOAD NOT READY', 'GECORP.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GECORP.VESSEL DELAY', 'GECORP.ORIGIN POLE', 'GECORP.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE001.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE001.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GECORP.U6_FREIGH T NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GECORP.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GECORP.U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'GECORP.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE002.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GE/GE001.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GE/GE001.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.BROKER DELAY', 'GE/GE001.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE002.CUSTOMS DELAY' ----CM NOTE added domain specifics to try and help performance ) and SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "REASON", (SELECT sr .shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.CRITICAL ORDER', 'GE.CRITICAL ORDER') and rownum=1) AS CRITICAL_ORDER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.REGULAR PREMIUM', 'GECORP.REGULAR PREMIUM') and rownum=1) AS REGULAR_PREMIUM, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID='PRO NUMBER' and rownum=1) AS PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE I_TRANSACTION_NO = ( select IEF.i_transaction_no --IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, IEF.i_transaction_no, IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID from I E_SHIPMENT_REFNUM IEF --, ie_shipmentstatus IES where IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND IEF.insert_user like '%E2OPEN%' AND IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG' AND ROWNUM=1) AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' AND ROWNUM=1 )EDI_PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT REMARK_TEXT from SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND REMARK_TEXT='PICKUP_NUMBER' and rownum=1) AS PICKUP_NUMBER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_CODE', 'GECORP.VESSEL_CODE')and rownum=1) AS VESSEL_CODE, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME')and rownum=1) AS VESSEL_NAME, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.S HIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1') and rownum=1) AS TSHIP_VESSEL, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1')and rownum=1) AS TSHIP_VOYAGE, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMEN T_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR')and rownum=1) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID)) AS CREATED_BY_SSO, case when OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.WOB%' then 'YES' else 'NO' end WOB, (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID in ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid and rownum =1) AS MSD, v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AS DOMAIN_SHIP_ID, case when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 2 then '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME)) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when rou nd(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME))= 1 then 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 0 then 'NEW' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 0 then 'NEW' else 'TRACKED' end PU_AGE, -- case when ACT_DEL is null then round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.end_time, sh.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGED_DAYS, case when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 0 then 'NEW' when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 0 then 'NEW' else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGE, (SELECT c.email _address FROM Shipment_involved_party sip, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'SUPPLIER' AND c.contact_gid=sip.involved_party_contact_gid and sip.shipment_gid= v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1) SUPPLIER_EMAIL, (Select st.STATUS_TYPE_GID From SHIPMENT_STATUS ST where st.STATUS_TYPE_GID in ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES') and st.shipment_gid=v_ship.shipment_gid and rownum=1) "STATUS_TYPE_GID", (Select ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID From SHIPMENT_STATUS ST where ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_AC CEPTED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') and st.shipment_gid=v_ship.shipment_gid and rownum=1) "STATUS_VALUE_GID" from shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_ gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) actual FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHE RE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, trunc(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA where loc_src.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID and v_ship.shipment_gid=om.shipment_gid(+) and v_ship.shipment_type_gid='TRANSPORT' and loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') and glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) and v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) and loc_des.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID and ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.STA RT_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE is null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE is null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_sh ip.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date>=(sysdate-150) ) where "Op_Unit" in ( '102', '104', '5250', '10199', '10299', '10599', '11099', '600117315', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'DEL#6735427', 'EPE_US', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'GEEN16', 'GEEN26', 'GEN 8 #5 / GEN 8 #6', 'HH01', 'HR11', 'HUN_US', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OP-GEEN39-CTSI', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HUN_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG_NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_ PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_SS', 'OU_PG_STEAM', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'STEAM_GEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-2700', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P1KR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PPCH', 'RU-PM11-1', 'RU-1100', 'RU-PUR8' )
1kzpxmqrnt31n SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(ore.order_release_gid) order_release_id, glog_util.remove_domain( (SELECT Status_Value_Gid FROM order_release_status WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Type_Gid) ='PLANNING' AND order_release_gid = ore.order_release_gid )) OR_status, glog_util.remove_domain(ore.Source_location_gid) OR_supplier_ID, (SELECT location_name FROM location WHERE location_gid = ore.Source_location_gid ) OR_supplier_Name, or_pu.location_name OR_PU_LOC, or_pu.city OR_PU_CITY, or_pu.postal_code OR_PU_ZIP, pucou.country_name OR_PU_CNTRY, or_del.location_name OR_DEL_LOC, or_del.city OR_DEL_CITY, or_del.postal_code OR_DEL_ZIP, delcou.country_name OR_DEL_CNTRY, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.ob_line_gid) OB_LINE, orl.item_package_count item_count, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.packaged_item_gid) item_id, (SELECT NVL(description, item_name) FROM item WHERE item_gid = orl.packaged_item_gid ) Item_desc, TO_DATE(TRUNC(submit.insert_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_Submit_dt, glog_util.remove_domain(submit.insert_user) OR_Submit_by, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.early_pickup_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_early_PU_DT, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.late_delivery_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_late_del_DT, (SELECT description FROM GENERAL_LEDGER_CODE WHERE general_ledger_gid = ore.buy_general_ledger_gid ) "OR_BILL_CODE", glog_util.remove_domain(leg.shipment_gid) SHIPMENT_ID, leg.leg_id, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.sc_status ) SHIP_STATUS, leg.router, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.source_location_gid) pu_loc_id, leg.pu_loc, leg.pu_city, leg.pu_zip, leg.pu_cntry, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.dest_location_gid) del_loc_id, leg.del_loc, leg.del_city, leg.del_zip, leg.del_cntry, TO_DATE(leg.sch_pu_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_pu_dt, TO_DATE(leg.act_pu, 'DD-MM-YY')act_pu, TO_DATE(leg.sch_del_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_del_dt, TO_DATE(leg.eta, 'DD-MM-YY') eta, TO_DATE( leg.act_del, 'DD-MM-YY') act_del, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.first_equipment_group_gid) EQUIPMENT, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.transport_mode_gid) transport_mode, leg.carrier, ROUND(leg.total_actual_cost_base, 2) COST_USD, ROUND(leg.total_weight_base* 0.4536) shipment_weight_kg, LEG.FLIGHT_NBR, LEG.HAWB_NBR, LEG.MAWB_NBR, LEG.VOYAGE_NBR, LEG.VESSEL_CODE, LEG.VESSEL_NAME, LEG.HBL_NBR, LEG.MBL_NBR, LEG.CONTAINER_NBR, submit.insert_date FILTER_DT FROM order_release ore, location or_pu, location or_del, COUNTRY_CODE pucou, COUNTRY_CODE delcou, order_release_line orl, (SELECT ore.order_release_gid, sh.shipment_gid, --sh.itinerary_gid, CASE WHEN sh.itinerary_gid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT sequence_no FROM ITINERARY_DETAIL WHERE itinerary_gid = sh.ITINERARY_GID AND leg_gid = sh.PARENT_LEG_GID ) END leg_id, (SELECT status_value_gid FROM SH IPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid ) sc_status, NVL( (SELECT con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name router_name FROM tender_collaboration tc, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.status_value_gid) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid ) z WHERE tc.insert_user = con.contact_gid AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn AND tc.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_GID ), (SELECT c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name router_name FROM CONTACT C --WHERE c.contact_gid = sh.insert_user WHERE c.contact_gid = PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INUSR(SH.SHIPMENT_GID) )) router, sh.source_location_gid, pu_loc.location_name pu_loc, pu_loc.city pu_city, pu_loc.postal_code pu_zip, puc.country_name pu_cntry, sh.dest_location_gid, del_loc.location_name del_loc, del_loc.city del_city, del_loc.postal_code del_zip, dlc.country_name del_cntry, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.start_time, sh.source_location_gid)) sch_pu_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_tr ansaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('CP', 'VD') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_pu, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.end_time, sh.dest_location_gid)) sch_del_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = s hp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('X2', 'AG') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) eta, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('D1', 'VA', 'J1') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_del, sh.total_weight_base, sh.first_equipment_group_gid, sh.transport_mode_gid, (SELECT location_name FROM location WHERE location_gid = sh.SERVPROV_GID ) carrier, sh.total_actual_cost_base, (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'FLIGHT_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "FLIGHT_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VOYAGE_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_CODE' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_CODE", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_NAME", (SELECT L ISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HBL_NBR", (SELECT
