LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MBL_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'CONTAINER_NBR' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "CONTAINER_NBR" FROM order_release ore, shipment sh, order_movement omo, location pu_loc, location del_lo c, COUNTRY_CODE puc, COUNTRY_CODE dlc WHERE ore.order_release_gid = omo.order_release_gid AND omo.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND sh.source_location_gid = pu_loc.location_gid AND pu_loc.country_code3_gid = puc.country_code3_gid AND sh.dest_location_gid = del_loc.location_gid AND del_loc.country_code3_gid = dlc.country_code3_gid AND SH.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID = 'TRANSPORT' --AND sh.insert_date >= sysdate -150 AND PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INDT(SH.SHIPMENT_GID) >= sysdate -365 AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_WITHDRAWN', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_NO RESPONSE', 'SECURE RESOURCES_DECLINED', 'SECURE RE SOURCES_NOT STARTED') AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND shipment_refnum_value = 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN' ) ) ) leg, (SELECT order_release_gid, insert_date, insert_user FROM order_release_status WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Type_Gid) ='SUBMIT_TO_LCOE' ) submit WHERE ore.order_release_gid = leg.order_release_gid (+) AND NVL(ore.plan_from_location_gid, ore.source_location_gid ) = or_pu.location_gid AND NVL(ore.plan_to_location_gid, ore.dest_location_gid ) = or_del.location_gid AND or_PU.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = pucou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND or_del.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = delcou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND ore.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid AND or e.order_release_gid = submit.order_release_gid AND orl.ob_line_gid IS NOT NULL AND submit.insert_date >= sysdate - 365 /* OR leg.act_del IS NULL OR leg.act_del >= sysdate - 15*/ AND ore.order_release_gid IN (SELECT order_release_gid FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND order_release_refnum_value = 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN' ) ORDER BY 1 ASC
1p5grz1gs7fjqselect obj#, type#, ctime, mtime, stime, status, dataobj#, flags, oid$, spare1, spare2, spare3, signature, spare7, spare8, spare9 from obj$ where owner#=:1 and name=:2 and namespace=:3 and remoteowner is null and linkname is null and subname is null
2vvs7m0fgnynd SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('10-MAY-2021 14:14:00', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('10-MAY-2021 14:14:00', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
3yyngy3hj8u83 SELECT /*+ optimizer_features_enable('11.2.0.4') */ --distinct -- TO_CHAR(submit.subdt, 'MM/DD/YYYY') SUBMIT_DT, -- TO_CHAR(submit.subdt, 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI') SUBMIT_TIMESTAMP, submit.subdt SUBMIT_DT, -- TO_CHAR(submit.subdt, 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI') SUBMIT_TIMESTAMP, buyer2.ob_refnum_value as "Buyer Name", acceptstat.last_name ACCEPTED_BY, ore.early_pickup_date Early_pickup_date, oldd.order_release_refnum_value PO_DELIVERY_DATE, ore.late_delivery_date Late_delivery_date, ore.early_delivery_date Early_delivery_date, -- TO_CHAR( ore.early_pickup_date, 'MM/DD/YYYY') Early_pickup_date, -- TO_CHAR( ore.early_delivery_date, 'MM/DD/YYYY') Early_delivery_date, -- TO_CHAR( ore.late_delivery_date, 'MM/DD/YYYY') Late_delivery_date, opun.order_release_refnum_value OU, glog_util.remove_domain(ore.order_release_gid) ORDER_RELEASE, supplier.Location_name SUPPLIER, CASE WHEN SUBSTR(or_pu.c ity, 1, 12) = SUBSTR(SUBSTR(or_pu.location_name, INSTR(or_pu.location_name, '.', -1, 1)+1), 1, 12) THEN SUBSTR(or_pu.location_name, 1, instr(or_pu.location_name, '.', -1, 1)-1 ) ELSE or_pu.location_name END PU_LOCATION, glog_util.remove_domain(submit.subuser) SUBMIT_USER, or_pu.city PU_CITY, pucou.country_name PU_COUNTRY, pos.pos PO_LINE_NUMBERS, itemXID.itemz PART_NUMS, item.itemz COMMODITIES, CASE WHEN SUBSTR(or_del.city, 1, 12) = SUBSTR(SUBSTR(or_del.location_name, INSTR(or_del.location_name, '.', -1, 1)+1), 1, 12) THEN SUBSTR(or_del.location_name, 1, instr(or_del.location_name, '.', -1, 1)-1 ) ELSE or_del.location_name END DEL_LOCATION, or_del.city DEL_CITY, -- TO_CHAR(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE( --acceptstat.email ACCEPTED_BY_EMAIL, -- opun.order_release_refnum_value OP_UNIT, -- glc.description Billing_code, -- CASE -- WHEN ore.inco_term_gid LIKE '%.%' -- THEN SUBSTR(ore.inco_term_gid, 8) -- ELSE ore.inco_term_gid -- END incoterm, -- hazmat.haz Hazmat, -- ftz.ftz "FTZ_ITEM", -- -- or_pu.postal_code PU_ZIP, -- -- or_del.postal_code DEL_ZIP, delcou.country_name DEL_COUNTRY, su.ship_unit_count || 'x ' || glog_util.remove_domain(su.TRANSPORT_HANDLING_UNIT_GID) SHIP_UNIT_COUNT, ROUND(su.UNIT_LENGTH_BASE) ||' x ' || ROUND(su.UNIT_Width_BASE) ||' x ' || ROUND(su.UNIT_HEIGHT_BASE) SHIP_UNIT_DIMS, ROUND(su.unit_weight_base *su.ship_unit_count ) TOTAL_WEIGHT, glog_util.remove_domain(planstat.Status_Value_Gid) PLANNING_STATUS -- DECODE(rem.remarks, NULL, NULL, 'YES') REMARKS, --UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(ore.early_pickup_date, NVL(ore.plan_from_location_gid, ore.source_location_gid )) --ore.early_pickup_date FILTER_DT FROM order_release ore, COUNTRY_CODE pucou, COUNTRY_CODE delcou, SHIP_UNIT su, location or_pu, location or_del, lo cation supplier, --GENERAL_LEDGER_CODE glc, (SELECT order_release_gid, Status_Value_Gid FROM order_release_status WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Type_Gid) ='PLANNING' AND regexp_count(order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 AND glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Value_Gid) IN ('PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'PLANNING_DELETED', 'PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'PLANNING_NEW', 'PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED', 'PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD') ) planstat, (SELECT s.order_release_gid, case when c.email_address is null then glog_util.remove_domain(NVL(s.update_user, s.insert_user)) else c.email_address end last_name --, -- c.email_address email FROM order_release_status s, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(s.Status_Type_Gid) ='ROUTER_ACCEPTED_STATUS' AND regexp_count(s.order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 AND glog_util.remove_domain(s.Status_Value_Gid) = 'ACCEPTED' AND NVL(s.update_user, s.insert_user) = c.contact_gid ) acceptstat, (SELECT order_release_gid, order_release_refnum_value FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(order_release_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND regexp_count(order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 ) opun, (SELECT order_release_gid, order_release_refnum_value FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(order_release_refnum_qual_gid) = 'ORIGINAL_LATE_DELIVERY_DATE' AND regexp_count(order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 ) OLDD, (SELECT x ship_unit_gid, rtrim(extract(xmlagg(xmlelement(e, y, ' ~ ')), '/E/text()').getclobval(), ', ') itemz FROM (SELECT sul.ship_unit_gid X, orl.item_package_count ||'x ' || CASE WHEN i.item_name IS NULL AND i.description IS NULL THEN i.item_xid ELSE ( CASE WHEN i.item_name = item_xid THEN SUBST R(i.description, 1, 30) ELSE NVL(SUBSTR(i.item_name, 1, 30), SUBSTR(i.description, 1, 30)) END) END Y FROM order_release_line orl, item i, ship_unit_line sul WHERE orl.packaged_item_gid = i.item_gid AND regexp_count(orl.order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 AND sul.order_release_line_gid = orl.order_release_line_gid ) z WHERE y IS NOT NULL GROUP BY x ) item, (SELECT x ship_unit_gid, rtrim(extract(xmlagg(xmlelement(e, y, ' ~ ')), '/E/text()').getclobval(), ', ') itemz FROM (SELECT sul.ship_unit_gid X, i.item_xid Y FROM order_release_line orl, item i, ship_unit_line sul WHERE orl.packaged_item_gid = i.item_gid AND regexp_count(orl.order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 AND sul.order_release_line_gid = orl.order_release_line_gid ) z WHERE y IS NOT NULL GROUP BY x ) itemXID, -- (SELECT l.loca tion_gid, -- rd.region_gid -- FROM Region_Detail rd, -- location l -- WHERE l.country_code3_gid = rd.country_code3_gid -- AND rd.region_gid IN ('GECORP.EMEA') -- ) from_reg, -- (SELECT ore.order_release_gid, -- MAX(orl.order_release_line_gid), -- 'YES' haz -- FROM order_release_line orl, -- order_release ore -- WHERE orl.is_hazardous = 'Y' -- AND ore.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid -- AND regexp_count(ore.order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 -- GROUP BY ore.order_release_gid -- ) hazmat, -- (SELECT x, -- LISTAGG(y, ' // ') WITHIN GROUP ( -- ORDER BY y) AS remarks -- FROM -- (SELECT SUBSTR(remark_text, 1, 300) y, -- order_release_gid x -- FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK -- WHERE regexp_count(order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 -- ) z -- GROUP BY x -- ) rem, (SELECT order_release_gid, NVL(update_user, insert_user) subuser, NVL(update_date, insert_date) subdt FRO M order_release_status WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Type_Gid) ='SUBMIT_TO_LCOE' AND glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Value_Gid) in ('SUBMIT', 'LCOE_SUBMIT') AND regexp_count(order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 ) submit, (SELECT or_obl_d .Order_Release_Id x, Rtrim(Xmlagg(Xmlelement(E, or_obl_d .Ob_Line_Gid, '~').Extract('//text()') ORDER BY or_obl_d .ob_line_gid).Getclobval(), '~') AS pos FROM (SELECT O.Order_Release_Gid Order_Release_Id, glog_util.remove_domain(ob_line_gid) ob_line_gid FROM order_release o, order_release_line orl WHERE o.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid AND regexp_count(o.order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 ) or_obl_d GROUP BY or_obl_d .Order_Release_Id ) pos, ( SELECT or_obl_d .order_base_gid , Rtrim(Xmlagg(Xmlelement(E, or_obl_d .ob_refnum_value , '~').Extract('//text()') ORDER BY or_obl_d .ob_refnum_value ).Getclobval(), '~') AS ob_refnum_value FROM (SELECT obr.order_base_gid, glog_util.remove_domain(obr.ob_refnum_value ) ob_refnum_value FROM OB_REFNUM OBR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(OBR.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'BUYER_NAME' -- AND regexp_count(obr.order_base_gid, '-' ) >= 1 ) or_obl_d GROUP BY or_obl_d .order_base_gid ) buyer2, -- (SELECT Orr.Order_Release_Gid, -- 'YES' FTZ -- FROM Order_Release Orr, -- Location_Profile_Detail Lpd -- WHERE NVL(Orr.Plan_To_Location_Gid, Orr.Dest_Location_Gid) = Lpd.Location_Gid -- AND EXISTS -- (SELECT Orl.Order_Release_Gid -- FROM Order_Release_Line Orl, -- Packaged_Item Pi, -- Item_Refnum Itr -- WHERE Orl.Packaged_Item_Gid = Pi.Packaged_Item_Gid -- AND Pi.Item_Gid = Itr.Item_Gid -- AND Itr.Item_Refnum_Qual_Gid = 'GECORP.FTZ_ITEM' -- AND Item_Refnum_Value = 'Y' -- AND Orl.Order_Release_Gid = Orr.Order_Release_Gid -- ) -- AND Lpd.Location_Profile_Gid = 'GEC ORP.FTZ_LOCATIONS' -- ) FTZ, (SELECT SR.order_release_gid FROM order_release_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'MSD' and sr.order_release_refnum_value in ('MSD_NO', 'NO') ) MSD WHERE ore.order_release_gid = planstat.order_release_gid and ore.order_release_gid = msd.order_release_gid(+) AND ore.order_release_gid = acceptstat.order_release_gid (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = opun.order_release_gid AND ore.order_release_gid = OLDD.order_release_gid(+) AND or_PU.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = pucou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND or_del.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = delcou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND ore.order_release_gid = su.order_release_gid A ND su.ship_unit_gid = item.ship_unit_gid AND su.ship_unit_gid = itemXID.ship_unit_gid --AND NVL(ore.plan_from_location_gid, ore.source_location_gid ) = from_reg.location_gid AND NVL(ore.plan_from_location_gid, ore.source_location_gid ) = or_pu.location_gid AND NVL(ore.plan_to_location_gid, ore.dest_location_gid ) = or_del.location_gid AND regexp_count(ore.order_release_gid, '-' ) >= 1 AND ore.source_location_gid = supplier.location_gid --AND ore.order_release_gid = hazmat.order_release_gid (+) --AND ore.buy_general_ledger_gid = glc.general_ledger_gid (+) --AND ore.order_release_gid = rem.x (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = submit.order_release_gid AND ore.order_release_gid = pos.x AND ore .order_base_gid = buyer2.order_base_gid(+) --AND ore.order_release_gid = ftz.order_release_gid (+) --and trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE( --and ore.late_delivery_date >= sysdate +60 --, NVL(ore.plan_to_location_gid, ore.dest_location_gid ))) -->= sysdate +10 and opun.order_release_refnum_value in ('OU_PG_GAS', '5250', 'NOTTERANGA') ORDER BY ore.order_release_gid ASC
4b4wp0a8dvkf0 SELECT executions, end_of_fetch_count, elapsed_time/px_servers elapsed_time, cpu_time/px_servers cpu_time, buffer_gets/executions buffer_gets FROM (SELECT sum(executions_delta) as EXECUTIONS, sum(case when px_servers_execs_delta > 0 then px_servers_execs_delta else executions_delta end) as px_servers, sum(end_of_fetch_count_delta) as end_of_fetch_count, sum(elapsed_time_delta) as ELAPSED_TIME, sum(cpu_time_delta) as CPU_TIME, sum(buffer_gets_delta) as BUFFER_GETS FROM DBA_HIST_SQLSTAT s, V$DATABASE d, DBA_HIST_SNAPSHOT sn WHERE s.dbid = d.dbid AND bitand(nvl(s.flag, 0), 1) = 0 AND sn.end_interval_time > (select systimestamp at TIME ZONE dbtimezone from dual) - 7 AND s.sql_id = :1 AND s.snap_id = sn.snap_id AND s.instance_number = sn.instance_number AND s.dbid = sn.dbid AND parsing_schema_name = :2)
4q6yqaatyx606 SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('11-MAY-2021 15:14:00', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Chicago' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('11-MAY-2021 15:14:00', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
4vd5kcahbc41a SELECT Distinct IPS_NUMBER, PROJECT_CODE, -- PROJECT_NAME, LISTAGG(PO_TYPE, '; ') within GROUP ( ORDER BY IPS_NUMBER, PROJECT_CODE, SHIPMENT_TYPE, IS_HAZARDOUS, LEG_POSITION, TRANSPORT_MODE, equipment, SERVPROV_GID, carrier_name, shipment_xid, primary_shipment, created_by, creation_date, PLANNED_PICKUP, PLANNED_delivery, Loaded_at_Origin, Actual_PICKUP, Arrived_At_Destination, Actual_Unload_At_Destination, SHIPMENT_STATUS, IS_SPOT_COSTED, TOTAL_ACTUAL_COST, CURRENCY, COST, SHIPMENT_COSTCURRENCY, COST_BASE_USD, COST_TYPE, ACCESSORIAL_DESC, SHIPFROM_LOCATION_GID, SHIPFROM_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPFROM_CITY, SHIPFROM_PROVINCE, SHIPFROM_COUNTRY, SHIPTO_LOCATION_GID, SHIPTO_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPTO_CITY, SHIPTO_PROVINCE, SHIPTO_COUNTRY, CHARTER_VOYAGE_TYPE, CHARTER_VOYAGE_XID, VESSEL_NAME, ALLOCATED_WEIGHT, ALLOCATED_WEIGHT_UOM, ALLOCATED_VOLUME, ALLOCATED_VOLUME_UOM, BOOKED_WEIGHT, BOOKED_WEIGHT_UOM, BOOKED_VOLUME, BOOKED_VOLUME_UOM, SERVPR OV_GID_CHARTER_VOYAGE, VOYAGE_NAME, PLANNED_DEPARTURE_DATE, Act_Vessel_Departure, PLANNED_ARRIVAL_DATE, Unloaded_At_Destination, LOCATION_GID_POE, POE_CITY_POE, COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POE, LOCATION_GID_POI, POE_CITY_POI, COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POI, TENDER_ACCEPT_YEAR, TENDER_ACCEPT_MONTH, Total_Volume, TOTAL_WEIGHT, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME) AS po_type, SHIPMENT_TYPE, IS_HAZARDOUS, LEG_POSITION, TRANSPORT_MODE, equipment, SERVPROV_GID, carrier_name, shipment_xid, primary_shipment, created_by, creation_date, PLANNED_PICKUP, PLANNED_delivery, Loaded_at_Origin, Actual_PICKUP, Arrived_At_Destination, Actual_Unload_At_Destination, SHIPMENT_STATUS, IS_SPOT_COSTED, TOTAL_ACTUAL_COST, CURRENCY, COST, SHIPMENT_COSTCURRENCY, COST_BASE_USD, COST_TYPE, ACCESSORIAL_DESC, SHIPFROM_LOCATION_GID, SHIPFROM_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPFROM_CITY, SHIPFROM_PROVINCE, SHIPFROM_COUNTRY, SHIPTO_LOCATION_GID, SHIPT O_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPTO_CITY, SHIPTO_PROVINCE, SHIPTO_COUNTRY, CHARTER_VOYAGE_TYPE, CHARTER_VOYAGE_XID, VESSEL_NAME, ALLOCATED_WEIGHT, ALLOCATED_WEIGHT_UOM, ALLOCATED_VOLUME, ALLOCATED_VOLUME_UOM, BOOKED_WEIGHT, BOOKED_WEIGHT_UOM, BOOKED_VOLUME, BOOKED_VOLUME_UOM, SERVPROV_GID_CHARTER_VOYAGE, VOYAGE_NAME, PLANNED_DEPARTURE_DATE, Act_Vessel_Departure, PLANNED_ARRIVAL_DATE, Unloaded_At_Destination, LOCATION_GID_POE, POE_CITY_POE, COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POE, LOCATION_GID_POI, POE_CITY_POI, COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POI, TENDER_ACCEPT_YEAR, TENDER_ACCEPT_MONTH, Total_Volume, TOTAL_WEIGHT, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ORDER_RELEASE.ATTRIBUTE11 AS IPS_NUMBER, ORDER_RELEASE.ATTRIBUTE10 AS PROJECT_CODE, -- OB_ORDER_BASE.ATTRIBUTE12 AS PROJECT_NAME, CASE WHEN ORR_TYPE.V2V IS NOT NULL THEN ORR_TYPE.V2V WHEN ORR_TYPE.ES IS NOT NULL T HEN ORR_TYPE.ES WHEN ORR_TYPE.FACTORY IS NOT NULL THEN ORR_TYPE.FACTORY ELSE REPLACE(Order_release.order_release_type_gid, 'GECORP.PGP_', '') END PO_TYPE, SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID AS SHIPMENT_TYPE, SHIPMENT.IS_HAZARDOUS, CASE WHEN (OM2.min_leg_position < 0) THEN 'PRE-CARRIAGE' WHEN (OM2.min_leg_position = 0) THEN 'MAIN-HAUL' WHEN (OM2.min_leg_position > 0) THEN 'ON-CARRIAGE' END LEG_POSITION, REPLACE(SHIPMENT.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS TRANSPORT_MODE, SHIPMENT.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID AS EQUIPMENT, REPLACE(SHIPMENT.SERVPROV_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SERVPROV_GID, CARRIER.LOCATION_NAME AS CARRIER_NAME, SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_XID, shipment.original_shipment_gid AS primary_shipment, shipment.insert_user as created_by, shipment.insert_date as creation_date, SHIPMENT.START_TIME AS PLANNED_PICKUP, SHIPMENT.END_TIME AS PLANNED_DELIVERY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.CP AS Loaded_at_Origin, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.AF AS Actual_PICKUP, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.X1 AS Arrived_At_Destination, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.D1 AS Actual_Unload_At_Destination, SS.SHIPMENT_STATUS, SHIPMENT.IS_SPOT_COSTED, CASE WHEN CARRIER.LOCATION_GID IN ('GECORP.NO_RATE', 'GECORP.SELF_ROUTED', 'GECORP.CUSTOMER_CARRIER', 'UN-KNOWN') THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SHIPMENT.TOTAL_ACTUAL_COST, 3) END TOTAL_ACTUAL_COST, SHIPMENT.T_ACTUAL_COST_CURRENCY_GID AS CURRENCY, CASE WHEN CARRIER.LOCATION_GID IN ('GECORP.NO_RATE', 'GECORP.SELF_ROUTED', 'GECORP.CUSTOMER_CARRIER', 'UN-KNOWN') THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SHIPMENT_COST.COST, 2) END COST, SHIPMENT_COST.CURRENCY AS SHIPMENT_COSTCURRENCY , CASE WHEN CARRIER.LOCATION_GID IN ('GECORP.NO_RATE', 'GECORP.SELF_ROUTED' , 'GECORP.CUSTOMER_CARRIER', 'UN-KNOWN') THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SHIPMENT_COST.COST_BASE, 2) END COST_BASE_USD, SHIPMENT_COST.DESCRIPTION AS COST_TYPE, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_DESC, REPLACE(SHIPFROM.LOCATION_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPFROM_LOCATION_GID, SHIPFROM.LOCATION_NAME AS SHIPFROM_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPFROM.CITY AS SHIPFROM_CITY, SHIPFROM.PROVINCE AS SHIPFROM_PROVINCE, REPLACE(SHIPFROM.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPFROM_COUNTRY, REPLACE(SHIPTO.LOCATION_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPTO_LOCATION_GID, SHIPTO.LOCATION_NAME AS SHIPTO_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPTO.CITY AS SHIPTO_CITY, SHIPTO.PROVINCE AS SHIPTO_PROVINCE, REPLACE(SHIPTO.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPTO_COUNTRY, CHARTER_VOYAG E.CHARTER_VOYAGE_TYPE AS CHARTER_VOYAGE_TYPE, CHARTER_VOYAGE.CHARTER_VOYAGE_XID AS CHARTER_VOYAGE_XID, VESSEL.VESSEL_NAME AS VESSEL_NAME, CONSOL.ALLOCATED_WEIGHT AS ALLOCATED_WEIGHT, CONSOL.ALLOCATED_WEIGHT_UOM_CODE AS ALLOCATED_WEIGHT_UOM, CONSOL.ALLOCATED_VOLUME AS ALLOCATED_VOLUME, CONSOL.ALLOCATED_VOLUME_UOM_CODE AS ALLOCATED_VOLUME_UOM, CONSOL.BOOKED_WEIGHT, CONSOL.BOOKED_WEIGHT_UOM_CODE AS BOOKED_WEIGHT_UOM, CONSOL.BOOKED_VOLUME, CONSOL.BOOKED_VOLUME_UOM_CODE AS BOOKED_VOLUME_UOM, REPLACE(CHARTER_VOYAGE.SERVPROV_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SERVPROV_GID_CHARTER_VOYAGE, CHARTER_VOYAGE.VOYAGE_NAME, CHARTER_VOYAGE.DEPARTURE_DATE AS PLANNED_DEPARTURE_DATE, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.VD AS Act_Vessel_Departure, CHARTER_VOYAGE.ARRIVAL_DATE AS PLANNED_ARRIVAL_DATE, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.D1 AS Unloaded_At_Destination, REPLACE(POE.LOCATION_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS LOCATION_GID_POE, POE.CITY AS POE_CITY_POE, POE.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AS COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POE, REPLACE(POI.LOCATION_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS LOCATION_GID_POI, POI.CITY AS POE_CITY_POI, POI.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AS COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POI, SS1.TENDER_ACCEPT_YEAR, SS1.TENDER_ACCEPT_MONTH, Round(NVL(SHIPMENT.total_volume_base * glogowner.ge_uom_conversion_pgp('CUMTR'), 0), 2) as Total_Volume, SHIPMENT.total_weight as TOTAL_WEIGHT, Contact.first_name as FIRST_NAME, Contact.last_name as LAST_NAME FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT, GLOGOWNER.OB_ORDER_BASE, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT, GLOGOWNER.CONTACT, GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" CARRIER, GLOGOWNER."LOCAT ION" SHIPFROM, GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" SHIPTO, GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" POE, GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" POI, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN, GLOGOWNER.S_EQUIPMENT, GLOGOWNER.CONSOL, GLOGOWNER.CHARTER_VOYAGE, GLOGOWNER.VESSEL, (select distinct shipment_gid, min(original_leg_position) min_leg_position from glogowner.order_movement group by shipment_gid) OM2, (SELECT SHIPMENT_COST.SHIPMENT_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_TYPE, COST_TYPE.DESCRIPTION, ROUND(SUM(SHIPMENT_COST.COST), 2) AS COST, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_GID AS CURRENCY, ROUND(SUM(SHIPMENT_COST.COST_BASE), 2) AS COST_BASE, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_COST_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.IS_COST_FIXED, ACCESSORIAL_CODE.ACCESSORIAL_DESC FROM GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT_COST, GLOGOWNER.COST_TYPE, GLOGOWNER.ACCESSORIAL_CODE WHERE SHIPMEN T_COST.COST_TYPE = COST_TYPE.COST_TYPE_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID = ACCESSORIAL_CODE.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID (+) GROUP BY SHIPMENT_COST.SHIPMENT_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_TYPE, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_COST_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.IS_COST_FIXED, COST_TYPE.DESCRIPTION, ACCESSORIAL_CODE.ACCESSORIAL_DESC ) SHIPMENT_COST, (SELECT SHIPMENT_GID, CAR_DESTINATION_LOCATION_GID, MAX(DECODE(STATUS_CODE_GID, 'VD', EVENTDATE)) AS VD, MAX(DECODE(STATUS_CODE_GID, 'AF', EVENTDATE)) AS AF, MAX(DECODE(STATUS_CODE_GID, 'CP', EVENTDATE)) AS CP, MAX(DECODE(STATUS_CODE_GID, 'UV', EVENTDATE)) AS UV, MAX(DECODE(STATUS_CODE_GID, 'D1', EVENTDATE)) AS D1, MAX(DECODE(STATUS_CODE_GID, 'X1', EVENTDATE)) AS X1 FROM (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(shipment, 8) */ SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID, MAX(TRUNC( IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS1.EVENTDATE)) AS EVENTDATE, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS1.STATUS_CODE_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS1.CAR_DESTINATION_LOCATION_GID FROM GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS1, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM1, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE OR1 WHERE SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = OM1.SHIPMENT_GID AND OM1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OR1.order_release_type_gid IN ('GECORP.PGP_MSD', 'GECORP.PGP_OB', 'GECORP.PGP_GPC') AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS1.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('VD', 'AF', 'CP', 'UV', 'D1', 'X1') GROUP BY SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS1.STATUS_CODE_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS1.CAR_DESTINATION_LOCATION_GID ) GROUP BY SHIPME NT_GID, CAR_DESTINATION_LOCATION_GID ) IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, (SELECT DISTINCT SHIPMENT_GID, I_TRANSACTION_NO, "'MAWB'" AS MAWB, "'GECORP.MBOL_NUMBER'" AS "GECORP.MBOL_NUMBER", "'GECORP.HAWB'" AS "GECORP.HAWB", "'PRO NUMBER'" AS "PRO NUMBER", "'GECORP.HBL_NUMBER'" AS "GECORP.HBL_NUMBER" FROM (SELECT DISTINCT SSH.SHIPMENT_GID, RF_NUM.I_TRANSACTION_NO, RF_NUM.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, RF_NUM.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM RF_NUM, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH WHERE SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = RF_NUM.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SSH.SHIPMENT_STOP_NUM = 1 AND RF_NUM.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('MAWB', 'GECORP.MBOL_NUMBER', 'GE CORP.HAWB', 'PRO NUMBER', 'GECORP.HBL_NUMBER') ) PIVOT ( MAX(SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE) FOR SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('MAWB', 'GECORP.MBOL_NUMBER', 'GECORP.HAWB', 'PRO NUMBER', 'GECORP.HBL_NUMBER') ) ) LineTab4, (SELECT order_release_gid, MAX(DECODE(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE, 'VENDOR_TO_VENDOR_YES', 'V2V')) V2V, MAX(DECODE(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE, 'EXPEDITED_SERVICE_YES', 'EXP. SVCS.')) ES, MAX(DECODE(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE, 'YES', 'FACTORY')) FACTORY FROM GLOGOWNER.order_release_refnum orrnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.EXPEDITED_SERVICE', 'GECORP.VENDOR_TO_VENDOR', 'GECORP.FACTORY_OUTBOUND') GROUP BY order_release_gid ORDER BY order_release_gid ) ORR_TYPE, (SELECT SSI1.SHIPMENT_GID, REPLACE(SSI1.STATUS_VALUE_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPMENT_STATUS FROM GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT_STATUS SSI1 WHERE SSI1.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES' ) SS, (SELECT SSI2.SHIPMENT_GID, SSI2.INSERT_DATE AS TENDER_ACCEPT_DATE, TO_CHAR(SSI2.INSERT_DATE, 'YYYY') AS TENDER_ACCEPT_YEAR, TO_CHAR(SSI2.INSERT_DATE, 'MON') AS TENDER_ACCEPT_MONTH FROM GLOGOWNER.shipment_status SSI2 WHERE SSI2.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES' AND SSI2.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') ) SS1 WHERE ORDER_RELEASE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORDER_MOVEMENT.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORDER_RELEASE.ORDER_BASE_GID = OB_ORDER_BASE.ORDER_BASE_GID AND ORDER_MOVEMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = OM2.Shipment_gid (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SHIPMENT_COST.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = LineTab4.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SERV PROV_GID = CARRIER.LOCATION_GID AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN.S_EQUIPMENT_GID = S_EQUIPMENT.S_EQUIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.CONSOL_GID = CONSOL.CONSOL_GID (+) AND CONSOL.CHARTER_VOYAGE_GID = CHARTER_VOYAGE.CHARTER_VOYAGE_GID (+) AND CHARTER_VOYAGE.VESSEL_GID = VESSEL.VESSEL_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID = SHIPFROM.LOCATION_GID AND SHIPMENT.DEST_LOCATION_GID = SHIPTO.LOCATION_GID AND CHARTER_VOYAGE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID = POE.LOCATION_GID (+) AND CHARTER_VOYAGE.DEST_LOCATION_GID = POI.LOCATION_GID (+) AND ORDER_RELEASE.order_release_type_gid IN ('GECORP.PGP_MSD', 'GECORP.PGP_OB', 'GECORP.VENDOR_TO_VENDOR', 'GECORP.PGP_GPC') AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID IN ('TRANSPORT') AND ORDER_RELEASE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORR_TYPE.ORD ER_RELEASE_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SS.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SS1.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.insert_user =contact.contact_gid (+) UNION SELECT DISTINCT ORDER_RELEASE.ATTRIBUTE11 AS IPS_NUMBER, OB_ORDER_BASE.ATTRIBUTE10 AS PROJECT_CODE, -- OB_ORDER_BASE.ATTRIBUTE12 AS PROJECT_NAME, CASE WHEN ORR_TYPE.V2V IS NOT NULL THEN ORR_TYPE.V2V WHEN ORR_TYPE.ES IS NOT NULL THEN ORR_TYPE.ES WHEN ORR_TYPE.FACTORY IS NOT NULL THEN ORR_TYPE.FACTORY ELSE REPLACE(Order_release.order_release_type_gid, 'GECORP.PGP_', '') END PO_TYPE, SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID AS SHIPMENT_TYPE, SHIPMENT.IS_HAZARDOUS, '' LEG_POSITION, REPLACE(SHIPMENT.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS TRANSPORT_MODE, SHIPMENT.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID AS EQUIPMENT, REPLACE(SHIPMENT.SERVPROV_GID, 'G ECORP.', '') AS SERVPROV_GID, CARRIER.LOCATION_NAME AS CARRIER_NAME, SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_XID, shipment.original_shipment_gid AS primary_shipment, shipment.insert_user as created_by, shipment.insert_date as creation_date, SHIPMENT.START_TIME AS PLANNED_PICKUP, SHIPMENT.END_TIME AS PLANNED_DELIVERY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.CP AS Loaded_at_Origin, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.AF AS Actual_PICKUP, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.X1 AS Arrived_At_Destination, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.D1 AS Actual_Unload_At_Destination, SS.SHIPMENT_STATUS, SHIPMENT.IS_SPOT_COSTED, CASE WHEN CARRIER.LOCATION_GID IN ('GECORP.NO_RATE', 'GECORP.SELF_ROUTED', 'GECORP.CUSTOMER_CARRIER', 'UN-KNOWN') THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SHIPMENT.TOTAL_ACTUAL_COST, 3) END TOTAL_ACTUAL_COST, SHIPMENT.T_ACTUAL_COST_CURRENCY_GID, CASE WHEN CARRIER.LOCATION_GID IN ('GECORP.NO_RATE', 'GECORP.SELF_ROUTED', 'GECORP.CUSTOMER_CARRIER', 'UN-KNOWN') THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SHIPMENT_COST.COST, 2) END COST, SHIPMENT_COST.CURRENCY AS SHIPMENT_COSTCURRENCY, CASE WHEN CARRIER.LOCATION_GID IN ('GECORP.NO_RATE', 'GECORP.SELF_ROUTED', 'GECORP.CUSTOMER_CARRIER', 'UN-KNOWN') THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SHIPMENT_COST.COST_BASE, 2) END COST_BASE_USD, SHIPMENT_COST.DESCRIPTION AS COST_TYPE, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_DESC, REPLACE(SHIPFROM.LOCATION_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPFROM_LOCATION_GID, SHIPFROM.LOCATION_NAME AS SHIPFROM_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPFROM.CITY AS SHIPFROM_CITY, SHIPFROM.PROVINCE AS SHIPFROM_PROVINCE, REPLACE(SHIPFROM.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPFROM_COUNTRY, REPLACE(SHIPTO.LOCATION_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPTO_LOCATIO N_GID, SHIPTO.LOCATION_NAME AS SHIPTO_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPTO.CITY AS SHIPTO_CITY, SHIPTO.PROVINCE AS SHIPTO_PROVINCE, REPLACE(SHIPTO.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPTO_COUNTRY, '' AS CHARTER_VOYAGE_TYPE, NULL AS CHARTER_VOYAGE_XID, '' AS VESSEL_NAME, NULL ALLOCATED_WEIGHT, NULL AS ALLOCATED_WEIGHT_UOM, NULL AS ALLOCATED_VOLUME, NULL AS ALLOCATED_VOLUME_UOM, NULL AS BOOKED_WEIGHT, NULL AS BOOKED_WEIGHT_UOM, NULL AS BOOKED_VOLUME, NULL AS BOOKED_VOLUME_UOM, NULL AS SERVPROV_GID_CHARTER_VOYAGE, NULL AS VOYAGE_NAME, NULL AS PLANNED_DEPARTURE_DATE, NULL AS Act_Vessel_Departure, NULL AS PLANNED_ARRIVAL_DATE, NULL AS Unloaded_At_Destination, NULL AS LOCATION_GID_POE, NULL AS POE_CITY_POE, NULL AS COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POE, NULL AS LOCATION_GID_POI, NULL AS POE_CITY_POI, NULL AS COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POI, SS1.TENDER_ACCEPT_YEAR, SS1.TENDER_ACCEPT_MONTH, null as Total_Volume, SHIPMENT.total_weight as TOTAL_WEIGHT, Contact.first_name as FIRST_NAME, Contact.last_name as LAST_NAME FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_ORDER_BASE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE, GLOGOWNER.SHIP_UNIT, GLOGOWNER.S_SHIP_UNIT, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT_STOP_D, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT, GLOGOWNER.CONTACT, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY, GLOGOWNER.BS_REASON_CODE, (SELECT SHIPMENT_GID, STATUS_REASON_CODE_GID, CAR_DESTINATION_LOCATION_GID, "'VD'" AS "VD", "'AF'" AS "AF", "'CP'" AS "CP", "'UV'" AS "UV", "'D1'" AS "D1", "' X1'" AS "X1" FROM (SELECT SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3.STATUS_REASON_CODE_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3.CAR_DESTINATION_LOCATION_GID, MAX(TRUNC( IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3.EVENTDATE)) AS EVENTDATE, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3.STATUS_CODE_GID FROM "GLOGOWNER"."IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS" "IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3", "GLOGOWNER"."SS_STATUS_HISTORY", "GLOGOWNER"."SHIPMENT" WHERE "SHIPMENT"."SHIPMENT_GID" (+) = "SS_STATUS_HISTORY"."SHIPMENT_GID" AND "SS_STATUS_HISTORY"."I_TRANSACTION_NO" = "IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3"."I_TRANSACTION_NO" AND STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('VD', 'AF', 'CP', 'UV', 'D1', 'X1') GROUP BY SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3.STATUS_CODE_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS3.STATUS_REASON_CODE_GID, IE_SHIPME NTSTATUS3.CAR_DESTINATION_LOCATION_GID ) PIVOT ( MAX(EVENTDATE) FOR STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('VD', 'AF', 'CP', 'UV', 'D1', 'X1') ) ) IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" CARRIER, GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" SHIPFROM, GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" SHIPTO, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN, GLOGOWNER.S_EQUIPMENT, (SELECT DISTINCT "LOCATION".LOCATION_GID AS LOCATION_GID1, "LOCATION".LOCATION_NAME AS DEST_LOCATION_NAME, "LOCATION".CITY AS CITY, "LOCATION".POSTAL_CODE AS POSTAL_CODE, "LOCATION".COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AS COUNTRY_CODE3_GID, "LOCATION".PROVINCE AS PROVINCE, "LOCATION".PROVINCE AS PROVINCE_CODE FROM GLOGOWNER."LOCATION" ) POE, (SELECT order_release_gid, MAX(DECODE(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE, 'VENDOR_TO_VENDOR_YES', 'V2V')) V2V, MAX(DECODE(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE, 'EXPEDITED_SERVICE_YES', 'EXP. SVCS.')) ES, MAX(DECODE(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE, 'YES', 'FACTORY')) FACTORY FROM GLOGOWNER.order_release_refnum orrnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.EXPEDITED_SERVICE', 'GECORP.VENDOR_TO_VENDOR', 'GECORP.FACTORY_OUTBOUND') GROUP BY order_release_gid ORDER BY order_release_gid ) ORR_TYPE, (SELECT SHIPMENT_COST.SHIPMENT_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_TYPE, COST_TYPE.DESCRIPTION, ROUND(SUM(SHIPMENT_COST.COST), 2) AS COST, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_GID AS CURRENCY, ROUND(SUM(SHIPMENT_COST.COST_BASE), 2) AS COST_BASE, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_COST_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.IS_COST_FIXED, ACCESSORIAL_CODE.ACCESSORIAL_DESC FROM GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT_COST, GLOGOWNER.COST_TYPE, GLOGOWNER.ACCESSORIAL_CODE WHERE SHIPMENT_COST.COST_TYPE = COST_TYPE.COST_TYPE_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID = ACCESSORIAL_CODE.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID (+) GROUP BY SHIPMENT_COST.SHIPMENT_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_TYPE, SHIPMENT_COST.COST_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_CODE_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.ACCESSORIAL_COST_GID, SHIPMENT_COST.IS_COST_FIXED, COST_TYPE.DESCRIPTION, ACCESSORIAL_CODE.ACCESSORIAL_DESC ) SHIPMENT_COST, (SELECT SS0.SHIPMENT_GID, REPLACE(SS0.STATUS_VALUE_GID, 'GECORP.', '') AS SHIPMENT_STATUS FROM GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT_STATUS SS0 WHERE SS0.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES' ) SS, (SELECT SS2.SHIPMENT_GID, SS2.INSERT_DATE AS TENDER_ACCEPT_DATE, TO_CHAR(SS2.INSERT_DATE, 'YYYY') AS TENDER_ACCEPT_YEAR, TO_CHAR(SS2.INSERT_DATE, 'MON') AS TENDER_ACCEPT_MONTH FROM GLOGOWNER.shipment_status SS2 WHERE SS2.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES' AND SS2.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') ) SS1 WHERE ORDER_RELEASE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORDER_RELEASE_LINE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORDER_RELEASE.ORDER_BASE_GID = OB_ORDER_BASE.ORDER_BASE_GID AND ORDER_RELEASE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = SHIP_UNIT.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND SHIP_UNIT.SHIP_UNIT_GID = S_SHIP_UNIT.SHIP_UNIT_GID AND SHIPMENT_STOP_D.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = S_SHIP_UNIT.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND SHIPMENT_STOP_D.STOP_NUM = '1' AND SHIPMENT_STOP_D.SHIPMENT_GID = SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_REASON_CODE_GID = BS_REASON_CODE.BS_REASON_CODE_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SERVPROV_GID = CARRIER.LO CATION_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN.S_EQUIPMENT_GID = S_EQUIPMENT.S_EQUIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID = SHIPFROM.LOCATION_GID AND SHIPMENT.DEST_LOCATION_GID = SHIPTO.LOCATION_GID AND SHIPMENT.DEST_LOCATION_GID = POE.LOCATION_GID1 (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SHIPMENT_COST.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SS.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_GID = SS1.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND ORDER_RELEASE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORR_TYPE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID (+) AND ORDER_RELEASE.order_release_type_gid IN ('GECORP.PGP_MSD', 'GECORP.PGP_OB', 'GECORP.PGP_GPC') AND SHIPMENT.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID = 'SECONDARY CHARGE' AND SHIPMENT.insert_user =contact.contact_gid (+) ) shipment_data where IPS_number != 'TEST_0001' group by IPS_NUMBER, PROJECT_CODE, SHIPMENT_TYPE, IS_HAZARDOUS, LEG_POSITION, TRANSPORT_MODE, equipment, SERVPROV_GID, carrier_name, shipment_xid, primary_shipment, created_by, creation_date, PLANNED_PICKUP, PLANNED_delivery, Loaded_at_Origin, Actual_PICKUP, Arrived_At_Destination, Actual_Unload_At_Destination, SHIPMENT_STATUS, IS_SPOT_COSTED, TOTAL_ACTUAL_COST, CURRENCY, COST, SHIPMENT_COSTCURRENCY, COST_BASE_USD, COST_TYPE, ACCESSORIAL_DESC, SHIPFROM_LOCATION_GID, SHIPFROM_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPFROM_CITY, SHIPFROM_PROVINCE, SHIPFROM_COUNTRY, SHIPTO_LOCATION_GID, SHIPTO_LOCATION_NAME, SHIPTO_CITY, SHIPTO_PROVINCE, SHIPTO_COUNTRY, CHARTER_VOYAGE_TYPE, CHARTER_VOYAGE_XID, VESSEL_NAME, ALLOCATED_WEIGHT, ALLOCATED_WEIGHT_UOM, ALLOCATED_VOLUME, ALLOCATED_VOLUME_UOM, BOOKED_WEIGHT, BOOKED_WEIGHT_UOM, BOOKED_VOLUME, BOOKED_VOLUME_UOM, SERVPROV_GID_CHARTER_VOYAGE, VOYAGE_NAME, PLANNED_DEPARTURE_DATE, Act_Vessel_Departure, PLANNED_ARRIVAL_D ATE, Unloaded_At_Destination, LOCATION_GID_POE, POE_CITY_POE, COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POE, LOCATION_GID_POI, POE_CITY_POI, COUNTRY_CODE3_GID_POI, TENDER_ACCEPT_YEAR, TENDER_ACCEPT_MONTH, Total_Volume, TOTAL_WEIGHT, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME
5zv9urvx7tnf1 SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", CASE WHEN act_pu.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Pickup_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Pickup_Date_Exist' END "Pickup_Date_Status", CASE WHEN act_del.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Delivery_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Delivery_Date_Exist' END "Delivery_Date_Status", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user FROM tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat WHERE v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND v_tend_coll_stat.statu s_type_gid IN ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) AND v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid IN ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) AND v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Router", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_src.LOCATION_GID) "Pickup_LocationID", REPLACE(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.') AS ITIN, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NOT NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , loc_src.Location_Name "Origin_Location_Name", loc_src.City "Origin_City", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Origin_Country", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "Origin Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "Origin_Reg", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_des.L OCATION_GID) "Destination_LocationID", loc_des.Location_Name "Des_Location_Name", loc_des.City "Des_City", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Des_Country", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "Dest Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "Dest_Reg", REPLACE(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (SELECT carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" FROM Location carrier WHERE v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID )Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "Mode", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", TO_CHAR(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", TO_CHAR(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_PU_DT" , TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_DEL_DT", TO_CHAR(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ESTMATED_ARRIVAL", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID) REASON FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.is_hidden = 'N' AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ( 'GECORP.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GECORP.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GECORP.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OF FLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE001.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE002.LOST FREIGHT', 'GECORP.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.LOAD NOT READY', 'GECORP.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GECORP.VESSEL DELAY', 'GECORP.ORIGIN POLE', 'GECORP.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE001.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE001.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAU SED', 'GECORP.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GECORP.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GECORP.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT' , 'GE/GE001.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GECORP.U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'GECORP.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE002.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GE/GE001.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GE/GE001.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.BROKER DELAY', 'GE/GE001.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE002.CUSTOMS DELAY' ----CM NOTE added domain specifics to try and help performance ) AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "REASON", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.CRITICAL ORDER', 'GE.CRITICAL ORDER') AND rownum =1 ) AS CRITICAL_ORDER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.REGULAR PREMIUM', 'GECORP.REGULAR PREMIUM') AND rownum =1 ) AS REGULAR_PREMIUM, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID='PRO NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE I_TRANSACTION_NO = (SELECT IEF.i_transaction_no --IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, IEF.i_ transaction_no, IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM IEF --, ie_shipmentstatus IES WHERE IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND IEF.insert_user LIKE '%E2OPEN%' AND IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG' AND ROWNUM =1 ) AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' AND ROWNUM =1 )EDI_PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT REMARK_TEXT FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND REMARK_TEXT ='PICKUP_NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PICKUP_NUMBER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remo ve_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_CODE', 'GECORP.VESSEL_CODE ') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_CODE, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_NAME, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VESSEL, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VOYAGE, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util. remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR') AND rownum =1 ) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHI PMENT_GID)) AS CREATED_BY_SSO, CASE WHEN OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.WOB%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END WOB, (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid AND rownum =1 ) AS MSD, v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AS DOMAIN_SHIP_ID, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdat e) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME))= 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 0 THEN 'NEW' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 0 then 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END PU_AGE, -- case when ACT_DEL is null then round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UT C.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.end_time, sh.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGED_DAYS, CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start _time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 0 then 'NEW' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 0 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END DEL_AGE, (SELECT c.email_address FROM Shipment_involved_party sip, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'SUPPLIER' AND c.contact_gid =sip.involved_party_contact_gid AND sip.shipment_gid = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) SUPPLIER_EMAIL, (SELECT st.STATUS_TYPE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE st.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES') AND s t.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_TYPE_GID", (SELECT ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_B OOKED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') AND st.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_VALUE_GID" FROM shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ie s.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) actual FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, TRUNC(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS i es, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA WHERE loc_src.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND v_ship.shipment_gid =om.shipment_gid(+) AND v_ship.shipment_type_gid ='TRANSPORT' AND loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND glog_util.remove_domai n(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) AND loc_des.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TR UNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1 OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date >=(sysdate -150) ) WHERE "Op_Unit" IN ( 'AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND _IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GERE_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_WIND_IND_PN', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_CN_WESY')

FROM location WHERE location_gid = ore.Source_location_gid ) OR_supplier_Name, or_pu.location_name OR_PU_LOC, or_pu.city OR_PU_CITY, or_pu.postal_code OR_PU_ZIP, pucou.country_name OR_PU_CNTRY, or_del.location_name OR_DEL_LOC, or_del.city OR_DEL_CITY, or_del.postal_code OR_DEL_ZIP, delcou.country_name OR_DEL_CNTRY, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.ob_line_gid) OB_LINE, orl.item_package_count item_count, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.packaged_item_gid) item_id, (SELECT NVL(description, item_name) FROM item WHERE item_gid = orl.packaged_item_gid ) Item_desc, TO_DATE(TRUNC(submit.insert_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_Submit_dt, glog_util.remove_domain(submit.insert_user) OR_Submit_by, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.early_pickup_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_early_PU_DT, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.late_delivery_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_late_del_DT, (SELECT description FROM GENERAL_LEDGER_CODE WHERE general_ledger_gid = ore.buy_general_ledger_gid ) "OR_BILL_CODE", glog_util.remove_domain(leg.shipment_gid) SHIPMENT_ID, leg.leg_id, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.sc_status ) SHIP_STATUS, leg.router, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.source_location_gid) pu_loc_id, leg.pu_loc, leg.pu_city, leg.pu_zip, leg.pu_cntry, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.dest_location_gid) del_loc_id, leg.del_loc, leg.del_city, leg.del_zip, leg.del_cntry, TO_DATE(leg.sch_pu_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_pu_dt, TO_DATE(leg.act_pu, 'DD-MM-YY')act_pu, TO_DATE(leg.sch_del_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_del_dt, TO_DATE(leg.eta, 'DD-MM-YY') eta, TO_DATE( leg.act_del, 'DD-MM-YY') act_del, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.first_equipment_group_gid) EQUIPMENT, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.transport_mode_gid) transport_mode, leg.carrier, ROUND(leg.total_actual_cost_base, 2) COST_USD, --ROUND(leg.total_weight_base* 0.4536) shipment_weight_kg, LEG.FLIGHT_NBR, LEG.HAWB_NBR, LEG.MAWB_NBR, LEG.VOYAGE_NBR, LEG.VESSEL_CODE, LEG.VESSEL_NAME, LEG.HBL_NBR, LEG.MBL_NBR, LEG.CONTAINER_NBR, submit.insert_date FILTER_DT FROM order_release ore, location or_pu, location or_del, COUNTRY_CODE pucou, COUNTRY_CODE delcou, order_release_line orl, (SELECT ore.order_release_gid, sh.shipment_gid, --sh.itinerary_gid, CASE WHEN sh.itinerary_gid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT sequence_no FROM ITINERARY_DETAIL WHERE itinerary_gid = sh.ITINERARY_GID AND leg_gid = sh.PARENT_LEG_GID ) END leg_id, (SELECT status_value_gid FRO M SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid ) sc_status, NVL( (SELECT con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name router_name FROM tender_collaboration tc, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.status_value_gid) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid ) z WHERE tc.insert_user = con.contact_gid AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn AND tc.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_GID ), (SELECT c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name router_name FROM CONTACT C --WHERE c.contact_gid = sh.insert_user WHERE c.contact_gid = PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INUSR(SH.SHIPMENT_GID) )) router, sh.source_location_gid, pu_loc.location_name pu_loc, pu_loc.city pu_city, pu_loc.postal_code pu_zip, puc.country_name pu_cntry, sh.dest_location_gid, del_loc.location_name del_loc, del_loc.city del_city, del_loc.postal_code del_zip, dlc.country_name del_cntry, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.start_time, sh.source_location_gid)) sch_pu_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh. i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('CP', 'VD') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_pu, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.end_time, sh.dest_location_gid)) sch_del_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('X2', 'AG') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) eta, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('D1', 'VA', 'J1') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_del, sh.total_weight_base , sh.first_equipment_group_gid, sh.transport_mode_gid, (SELECT location_name FROM location WHERE location_gid = sh.SERVPROV_GID ) carrier, sh.total_actual_cost_base, (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'FLIGHT_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "FLIGHT_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VOYAGE_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_CODE' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_CODE", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_NAME", (SELE CT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HBL_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MBL_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'CONTAINER_NBR' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "CONTAINER_NBR" FROM order_release ore, shipment sh, order_movement omo, location pu_loc, location de l_loc, COUNTRY_CODE puc, COUNTRY_CODE dlc WHERE ore.order_release_gid = omo.order_release_gid AND omo.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND sh.source_location_gid = pu_loc.location_gid AND pu_loc.country_code3_gid = puc.country_code3_gid AND sh.dest_location_gid = del_loc.location_gid AND del_loc.country_code3_gid = dlc.country_code3_gid AND SH.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID = 'TRANSPORT' --AND sh.insert_date >= sysdate -150 AND PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INDT(SH.SHIPMENT_GID) >= sysdate -365 AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_WITHDRAWN', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_NO RESPONSE', 'SECURE RESOURCES_DECLINED', 'SECUR E RESOURCES_NOT STARTED') AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND shipment_refnum_value = 'CH21' ) ) ) leg, (SELECT order_release_gid, insert_date, insert_user FROM ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(Status_Type_Gid) ='SUBMIT_TO_LCOE' ) submit WHERE ore.order_release_gid = leg.order_release_gid (+) AND NVL(ore.plan_from_location_gid, ore.source_location_gid ) = or_pu.location_gid AND NVL(ore.plan_to_location_gid, ore.dest_location_gid ) = or_del.location_gid AND or_PU.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = pucou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND or_del.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = delcou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND ore.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid AND ore.orde r_release_gid = submit.order_release_gid AND orl.ob_line_gid IS NOT NULL AND submit.insert_date >= sysdate - 365 /* OR leg.act_del IS NULL OR leg.act_del >= sysdate - 15*/ AND ore.order_release_gid IN (SELECT order_release_gid FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND order_release_refnum_value = 'CH21' ) ORDER BY 1 ASC

ORL.ITEM_PACKAGE_COUNT "RELEASED_QUANTITY", secure d.secured_resources_by_user "ROUTER", secured.secured_resources_by_email "Router_Email", nvl( (SELECT SHIPMENT_REMARK.remark_text FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REMARK.remark_qual_gid) = 'PRO_NUMBER' AND SHIPMENT_REMARK.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ), (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'PRO NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 )) "PRO_NUMBER", edipro.pronumber "EDI_PRO_NUMBER", (SELECT SHIPMENT_REMARK.remark_text FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REMARK.remark_text) = 'PICKUP_NUMBER' AND SHIPMENT_REMARK.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "PICKUP_NUMBER", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR W HERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'FLIGHT_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "FLIGHT_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HAWB_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MAWB_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "VOYAGE_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR. shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_CODE' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "VESSEL_CODE", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "VESSEL_NAME", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "TS_VESSEL_NAME", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "TS_VOYAGE", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.r emove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HBL_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MBL_NBR", (SELECT SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'CONTAINER_NBR' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shpt.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "CONTAINER_NBR", OU.shipment_refnum_value OP_UNIT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, item IT, packaged_item v_pi, ship_unit v_su, shipment_stop_d v_ssd, ORDER_RELEASE ORE, LOCATION L22, SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN SSEJ, S_EQUIPMENT_S_SHIP_UNIT_JOIN SESSUJ, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE SSUL, SHIPM ENT SHPT, ( select ProNum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE ProNumber, ShipmentID.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE ShipmentID from shipment, location, (select ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, ie_shipment_refnum.i_transaction_no FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM, ie_shipmentstatus where ie_shipment_refnum.insert_user like '%E2OPEN%' and ie_shipment_refnum.I_TRANSACTION_NO = ie_shipmentstatus.i_transaction_no and ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' ) ProNum, (select ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, ie_shipment_refnum.i_transaction_no FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM, ie_shipmentstatus where ie_shipment_refnum.insert_user like '%E2OPEN%' and ie_shipment_refnum.I_TRANSACTION_NO = ie_shipmentstatus.i_transaction_no and ie_shipment_refnum.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG') ShipmentID where ShipmentID.i_transaction_no = ProNum.i_transaction_no and ShipmentID.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VA LUE = shipment.shipment_gid and shipment.servprov_gid = location.location_gid ) EDIPRO, ( select v_sej.shipment_gid, max(v_sej.s_equipment_gid) max_equip_id, listagg(substr(v_s_equip.EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID, (instr(v_s_equip.EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID, '.')+1)), ', ') within group (order by v_s_equip.EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) as equip_grp from shipment_s_equipment_join v_sej, s_equipment v_s_equip where v_sej.S_EQUIPMENT_GID = v_s_equip.S_EQUIPMENT_GID group by v_sej.shipment_gid )shp_equip, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_GID, SR.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' ) ou, ITEM I, LOCATION S HPT_PU, LOCATION SHPT_DEL, LOCATION CARRIER, SHIP_UNIT SU, (SELECT SSH.SHIPMENT_GID, MAX(IE.EVENTDATE) ACTUAL FROM IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IE, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH WHERE SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IE.STATUS_CODE_GID IN('CP', 'VD') GROUP BY SSH.SHIPMENT_GID) ACT_PU, (SELECT SSH.SHIPMENT_GID, MAX(IE.EVENTDATE) ACTUAL FROM IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IE, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH WHERE SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IE.STATUS_CODE_GID IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') GROUP BY SSH.SHIPMENT_GID ) ACT_DEL, (SELECT SHIPMENT_GID, STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES') SST, -- (SELECT SIP.SHIPM ENT_GID, -- SIP.INSERT_USER "ROUTER_SSO", -- -- CONT.FIRST_NAME|| ' '|| CONT.LAST_NAME "ROUTER_NAME", -- --- MAXDT.MID "CAR_SEL_DAT" -- FROM SHIPMENT_INVOLVED_PARTY SIP, -- -- CONTACT CONT, -- (SELECT SHIPMENT_GID, -- MAX(INSERT_DATE) MID -- FROM SHIPMENT_INVOLVED_PARTY -- WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(INVOLVED_PARTY_QUAL_GID) = 'LOGISTICS_TENDER' -- GROUP BY SHIPMENT_GID) MAXDT -- WHERE SIP.SHIPMENT_GID = MAXDT.SHIPMENT_GID -- AND SIP.INSERT_DATE = MAXDT.MID -- AND glog_util.remove_domain(SIP.INVOLVED_PARTY_QUAL_GID) = 'LOGISTICS_TENDER' -- -- AND SIP.INSERT_USER = CONT.CONTACT_GID (+) ----------------change logic to use more robust router logic -- -- -- -- -- -- ) CSB, -- (select v_tend_coll.shipment_gid, -- glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) ROUTER_SSO, -- max(v_tend_coll.i_transaction_no) -- from tender_collaboration v_tend_coll, -- tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat -- where v_tend_coll_stat.status_type_gid in ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', --'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', --'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', --'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', --'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', --'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' --) -- -- and -- v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid in ( --'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', --'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', --'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', --'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', --'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', --'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDE R.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', --'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', --'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', --'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', --'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', --'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', --'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ----CM NOTE added domains to try and help performance --) -- and v_tend_coll.i_transaction_no = v_tend_coll_stat.i_transaction_no -- -- group by v_tend_coll.shipment_gid, v_tend_coll.insert_user -- )csb, ( SELECT tc.shipment_gid, TO_CHAR((tc.insert_date), 'IW') FW, case when TO_CHAR((tc.insert_date), 'IW') = '53' then extract (year from add_months(tc.insert_date, -1)) else extract(year from tc.insert_date) end "YEAR", to_char(tc.insert_date, 'dd-MON-yyyy') mid, glog_util.remove_domain(tc.insert_user) secured_resources_by_user, nvl(con.email_address, con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name) secured_resources_by_email FROM tender_collaboration tc, SHIPMENT_STATUS, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.status_value_gid) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid) z WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(tc.insert_user) = con.CONTACT_XID(+) AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND glog_util.remove_d omain(SHIPMENT_STATUS.STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn AND SHIPMENT_STATUS.SHIPMENT_GID = tc.SHIPMENT_GID -- and to_char(tc.insert_date, 'IW') >= TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'IW')-12 --below solves year weirdness -- and trunc(tc.insert_date) >= trunc(sysdate)-190 ) secured, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_GID, SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR, LOCATION L WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND L.LOCATION_XID = SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE) OPUN, -- (SELECT O.ORDER_RELEASE_GID, -- COUNT(O.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) SUNBR -- FROM ORDER_RELEASE O, -- SHIP_UNIT S -- WHERE O.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = S.ORDER_RELEASE_GID -- GROUP BY O.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) SUN, ( SELECT ssul.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID, ssul.PACKAGED_ITEM_GID, SSUL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID, SUM(ssul.item_package_count) item_pckg_count FROM S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE SSUL group by ssul.PACKAGED_ITEM_GID, ssul.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID, SSUL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID ) ITEM_COUNT, /** ( select SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE from SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, (select SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, --IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE LatestDelayedEvent, MAX(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE) EVENTDATE from SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ('X2', 'AG') GROUP BY SS _STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID ) LDE WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = LDE.SHIPMENT_GID AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE = LDE.EVENTDATE AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ('X2', 'AG') ) ETA, **/ (SELECT s.shipment_gid, trunc(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_it n WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA, (SELECT c.FIRST_NAME, c.LAST_NAME, sq.shipment_gid, c.CONTACT_GID FROM Shipment_involved_party sip, contact c, shipment sq WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'BUYER' AND c.contact_gid=sip.involved_party_contact_gid and sip.shipment_gid= sq.SHIPMENT_GID) bq WHERE SSEJ.S_EQUIPMENT_GID = SESSUJ.S_EQUIPMENT_GID AND SESSUJ.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = SSUL.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID and shpt.shipment_gid = bq.shipment_gid and v_pi.item_gid = IT.item_gid and SSUL.packaged_item_gid = v_pi.packaged_item_gid and SSUL.ship_unit_gid = v_su.ship_unit_gid and SSUL.s_ship_unit_line_no = 1 AND v_ssd.stop_num = 1 AND v_ssd.SHIPMENT_GID=shpt.SHIPMENT_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = SSUL.ORDER_RELEAS E_GID AND SESSUJ.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = item_count.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = item_count.ORDER_RELEASE_GID and ORL.PACKAGED_ITEM_GID = item_count.PACKAGED_ITEM_GID AND glog_util.remove_domain(ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) NOT LIKE 'WOB%' and shpt.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) and shpt.SHIPMENT_GID = shp_equip.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_GID = SSEJ.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_GID = edipro.SHIPMENTID(+) and OU.SHIPMENT_GID = SHPT.shipment_gid and ORL.order_release_line_gid = ssul.or_line_gid AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = SU.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORL.PACKAGED_ITEM_GID = I.ITEM_GID AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_GID = ACT_PU.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_GID = ACT_DEL.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND SHPT.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID = SHPT_PU.LOCATION_GID AND SHPT.DEST_LOCATION_GID = SHPT_DEL.LOCATION_GID AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_GID = SST.SHIPMENT_GID AND glog_ut il.remove_domain(SST.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') AND SHPT.SERVPROV_GID = CARRIER.LOCATION_GID (+) AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_GID = secured.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_GID = OPUN.SHIPMENT_GID AND OPUN.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE in ('OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GELT', 'OU_GERE_US_GEPT', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_GERE_USII') AND SHPT.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID = 'TRANSPORT' And L22.LOCATION_GID=ore.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND SHPT.END_TIME > SYSDATE -90 --- and shpt.shipment_xid = '101566958' -- AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = SUN.ORDER_RELEASE_GID -- And Sun.Sunbr = 1 order by 2, 3
7dh7vmgzqxcgm SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('22-SEP-2020 03:32:00', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('22-SEP-2020 03:32:00', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
7dmzau3y8sxpj SELECT /*+ optimizer_features_enable('11.2.0.4') */ GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(shpt.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT_ID", shpt.shipment_type_gid, bcode.BILLING_CODE "BILLING_CODE", (SELECT LISTAGG(orr.order_release_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM order_release_refnum orr, order_release ord, order_movement omo WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(orr.order_release_refnum_qual_gid) = 'INVENTORY_CATEGORY' AND orr.order_release_gid = ord.order_release_gid AND ord.order_release_gid = omo.order_release_gid AND omo.shipment_gid = shpt.shipment_gid ) "INVENTORY_CAT", CSB.ROUTER_NAME, --TO_CHAR(shpt.INSERT_DATE, 'MM/DD/YYYY') "CREATED_DT", TO_CHAR(PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INDT(shpt.SHIPMENT_GID), 'MM/DD/YYYY') "CREATED_DT", TO_CHAR(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(shpt.start_time, shpt.SO URCE_LOCATION_GID), 'MM/DD/YYYY') "SCHED_PU_DT", TO_CHAR(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE( (SELECT ies.eventdate FROM IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies WHERE IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO = (SELECT MAX(ssh1.i_transaction_no) FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh1, iE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ieS1 WHERE ssh1.i_transaction_no = IES1.i_transaction_no AND IES1.status_code_gid IN ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh1.is_hidden = 'N' AND SSH1.SHIPMENT_GID = Shpt.SHIPMENT_GID ) ), shpt.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID), 'MM/DD/YYYY') "ACT_PU_DT", TO_CHAR(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(shpt.end_time, NVL(shpt.PLACE_DELIVER_LOCATION_GID, shpt.DEST_LOCATION_GID)), 'MM/DD/YYYY') "SCHED_DEL_DT", TO_CHAR(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE( (SELECT ies.eventdate FROM IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies WHERE IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO = (SELECT MAX(ssh1.i_transaction_no) FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh1, iE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ieS1 WHERE ssh1.i_transaction_no = IES1.i_transaction_no AND IES1.status_code_gid IN(' D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh1.is_hidden = 'N' AND SSH1.SHIPMENT_GID = Shpt.SHIPMENT_GID ) ), NVL(shpt.PLACE_DELIVER_LOCATION_GID, shpt.DEST_LOCATION_GID)), 'MM/DD/YYYY') "ACT_DEL_DT", pu.location_name "PU_LOCATION", pu.City "PU_CITY", pu_cou.country_name "PU_COUNTRY", del.location_name "DEL_LOCATION", del.City "DEL_CITY", del_cou.country_name "DEL_COUNTRY", glog_util.remove_domain(sst.STATUS_VALUE_GID) "TENDERED_STATUS",
