glog_util.remove_domain(shpt.transport_mode_gid) "MODE_DESC", e.equipment_group_name "EQUIP", glog_util.remove_domain(carrier.Location_GID) "CARRIER_GSL", carrier.Location_name "CARRIER_NAME", ROUND(shpt.total_weight_base*0.4536) "TOTAL_WEIGHT_KG", ROUND(shpt.total_volume_base*0.028316847, 2) "TOTAL_VOL_M3", -- ROUND(shpt.total_actual_cost_base, 2) "TOTAL_COST_U SD", DECODE(tc.B, '100000000000000', 0.03, ROUND(tc.B, 2)) "TOTAL_COST_USD", ROUND(std.cost_base, 2) "EST_STANDARD_COST", ROUND(pre.cost_base, 2) "EST_PREMIUM_COST", -- ROUND(prem.cost_base, 2) "PREMIUM", DECODE(tc.B, '100000000000000', 0.03, ROUND(tc.B, 2)) - ROUND(std.cost_base, 2) "PREMIUM", pos.OBLINE "PURCHASE_ORDERS", glog_util.remove_domain(prap.STATUS_VALUE_GID) "PREMIUM_STATUS", sunits.SHIP_UNITS, ore.sou_ID "OR_SUPPLIER_ID", ore.sou "OR_SUPPLIER", ore.des "OR_SHIPTO", ore_prem_st.REASON_FOR_CRITICAL, ore_prem_st.IS_THIS_BILLBACK, '' "SHIPMENT_REMARKS" FROM shipment shpt, (SELECT shipment_gid, STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' ) sst, (SELECT shipment_gid, STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_ TYPE_GID) = 'PREMIUM_APPROVAL' ) prap, location pu, location del, country_code pu_cou, country_code del_cou, location carrier, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(tc.insert_user) router_sso, con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name router_name FROM tender_collaboration tc, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.status_value_gid) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid ) z, shipment s WHERE S.SHIPMENT_GID = TC.SHIPMENT_GID --AND NVL(tc.insert_user, s.INSERT_USER) = con.contact_gid AND NVL(tc.insert_user, PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INUSR(s.SHIPMENT_GID)) = con.contact_gid AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid (+) AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn ) csb, (SELECT x "SHIPMENT_GID" , LISTAGG(y, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY y) AS "BILLING_CODE" FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sc.shipment_gid x, glc.description y FROM SHIPMENT_COST sc, GENERAL_LEDGER_CODE glc WHERE sc.general_ledger_gid = glc.general_ledger_gid ) z GROUP BY x ) bcode, (SELECT sr.shipment_gid, sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM sr WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sr.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND sr.shipment_refnum_value = 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN' ) opun, (SELECT x "SHIPMENT_GID", rtrim(extract(xmlagg(xmlelement(e, y, ' ~ ')), '/E/text()').getclobval(), ', ') OBLINE FROM (SELECT DISTINCT s.shipment_gid x, GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(orl.OB_LINE_GID) y FROM shipment s, SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN ssej, s_equipment se, S_EQUIPMENT_S_SHIP_UNIT_JOIN sess uj, S_SHIP_UNIT ssu, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE ssul, ORDER_RELEASE_LINE orl WHERE s.shipment_gid = ssej.shipment_gid AND ssej.s_equipment_gid = se.s_equipment_gid AND se.s_equipment_gid = sessuj.S_EQUIPMENT_GID AND sessuj.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = ssu.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND ssu.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = ssul.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND ssul.OR_LINE_GID = orl.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID AND regexp_count(ssu.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID, '-' ) > 1 ) z GROUP BY x ) pos, equipment_group e, (SELECT shipment_gid, COST_BASE FROM SHIPMENT_INF_COST WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_INF_COST_QUAL_GID) = 'STANDARD_COST' ) STD, (SELECT shipment_gid, COST_BASE FROM SHIPMENT_INF_COST WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_INF_COST_QUAL_GID) = 'PREMIUM_COST' ) PRE, /* (SELECT shipment_gid, cost_base FROM shipment_cost WHERE gl og_util.remove_domain(accessorial_code_gid) = 'PREMIUM' ) Prem, */ (SELECT shipment_gid A, SUM(cost_base) B FROM shipment_cost GROUP BY shipment_gid ) TC, (SELECT x, rtrim(extract(xmlagg(xmlelement(e, y, ', ')), '/E/text()').getclobval(), ', ') SHIP_UNITS FROM (SELECT s.shipment_gid x, ssu.Ship_unit_count ||'x' || glog_util.remove_domain(ssu.transport_handling_unit_gid) ||' ' || ROUND(ssu.unit_length_base*30.48) ||'x' || ROUND(ssu.unit_width_base*30.48) ||'x' || ROUND(ssu.unit_height_base*30.48) ||' CM ' || ROUND(ssu.unit_weight_base*0.4536) ||' KG' y FROM shipment s, SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN ssej, S_EQUIPMENT_S_SHIP_UNIT_JOIN sessuj, s_ship_unit ssu WHERE s.shipment_gid = ssej.shipment_gid AND ssej.s_equipment_gid = sessuj.s_equipment_gid AND sessuj.s_ship_unit_gid = ssu. s_ship_unit_gid AND regexp_count(ssu.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID, '-' ) > 1 ) z WHERE y IS NOT NULL GROUP BY x ) sunits, (SELECT sh.shipment_gid, sou.location_xid Sou_ID, MAX(ore.order_release_gid), CASE WHEN ('.' ||'' || sou.country_code3_gid = SUBSTR(SUBSTR(sou.location_name, INSTR(sou.location_name, '.', -1, 1)), 1, 4) OR '.' ||'' ||SUBSTR(sou.city, 1, 12) = SUBSTR(SUBSTR(sou.location_name, INSTR(sou.location_name, '.', -1, regexp_count(REPLACE (sou.city, '.', '~'), '~')+1)), 1, 13)) THEN SUBSTR(sou.location_name, 1, instr(sou.location_name, '.', -1, regexp_count(REPLACE (sou.city, '.', '~'), '~')+1)-1) ELSE sou.location_name END sou, --sou.location_name sou, des.location_name des FROM order_release ore, order_movement om, shipment sh, location sou, location des WHERE sh.shipment_gid = om.shipment_gid AND om.order_release_g id = ore.order_release_gid AND ore.source_location_gid = sou.location_gid AND ore.dest_location_gid = des.location_gid GROUP BY sh.shipment_gid, CASE WHEN ('.' ||'' || sou.country_code3_gid = SUBSTR(SUBSTR(sou.location_name, INSTR(sou.location_name, '.', -1, 1)), 1, 4) OR '.' ||'' ||SUBSTR(sou.city, 1, 12) = SUBSTR(SUBSTR(sou.location_name, INSTR(sou.location_name, '.', -1, regexp_count(REPLACE (sou.city, '.', '~'), '~')+1)), 1, 13)) THEN SUBSTR(sou.location_name, 1, instr(sou.location_name, '.', -1, regexp_count(REPLACE (sou.city, '.', '~'), '~')+1)-1) ELSE sou.location_name END, des.location_name, sou.location_xid ) ore, (SELECT sh.shipment_gid, ore.order_release_gid, (SELECT LISTAGG(orr.remark_text, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM order_release_remark orr WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(orr.remark_qual_GID) = 'REASON_FOR_CRITICAL' AND orr.order_release_GID = ore.order_release_gid ) "REASON_FOR_CRITICAL", (SELECT LISTAGG(orr.remark_text, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM order_release_remark orr WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(orr.remark_qual_GID) = 'IS_THIS_BILLBACK' AND orr.order_release_GID = ore.order_release_gid ) "IS_THIS_BILLBACK" FROM order_release ore, order_movement om, shipment sh WHERE ore.order_release_gid = om.order_release_gid AND om.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND ore.order_release_gid IN (SELECT order_release_gid FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE = 'PREMIUM' ) ) ore_prem_st WHERE shpt.shipment_gid = sst.shipment_gid AND shpt.SERVPROV_GID = carrier.LOCATION_GID AND shpt.source_location_gid = pu.location_gid AND shpt.dest_location_gid = del.location_gid AND pu.country_cod e3_gid = PU_cou.country_code3_gid AND del.country_code3_gid = DEL_cou.country_code3_gid AND shpt.shipment_gid = csb.shipment_gid (+) AND shpt.shipment_gid = bcode.shipment_gid (+) AND (TRUNC(sysdate) - shpt.start_time) < 365 AND shpt.shipment_gid = opun.shipment_gid AND shpt.first_equipment_group_gid = e.equipment_group_gid(+) AND shpt.shipment_gid = pos.SHIPMENT_GID (+) AND shpt.shipment_gid = std.shipment_gid (+) AND shpt.shipment_gid = pre.shipment_gid (+) AND shpt.shipment_gid = prap.shipment_gid (+) --AND shpt.shipment_gid = prem.shipment_gid (+) AND shpt.shipment_gid = TC.A (+) AND shpt.shipment_gid = sunits.x AND shpt.shipment_gid = ore.shipment_gid AND shpt.shipment_gid = ore_prem_st.shipment_gid (+) ORDER BY 1, 2
8knxru486qsu1SELECT NVL((SELECT INSERT_DATE FROM OGEP.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID = :B1 ), (SELECT INSERT_DATE FROM ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_T WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID = :B1 )) FROM DUAL
8usxt8qj5v5sb SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(obl.ob_line_gid) ob_line_id, glog_util.remove_domain(shi.shipment_gid) shipment_id, (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(ss.STATUS_VALUE_GID) FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS SS WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(SS.STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' --AND GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(ss.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED') AND ss.SHIPMENT_GID = shi.shipment_gid ) SEC_REC_STATUS, glog_util.remove_domain(shi.first_equipment_group_gid) Equip, glog_util.remove_domain(oblrn.ob_line_refnum_value) BUYER_APPROVAL, cont.first_name ||' ' || cont.last_name BUYER_NAME, oblr1.REMARK_TEXT POL_REASON_FOR_CRITICAL, oblr2.REMARK_TEXT POL_IS_THIS_BILLBACK, oblr3.REMARK_TEXT POL_PREMIUM_COST_LIMIT, oblr4.REMARK_TEXT POL_ALTERNATE_DELIVERY_DATE, oblr5.REMARK_TEXT POL_QCR_NUMBER, oblr6.REMARK_TEXT POL_PREMIUM_NOTES, oblr7.REMARK_TEXT POL_BILL_BACK_SUPPLIER, glog_util.remove_domain(o re.order_release_gid) order_release_id, su.ship_unit_count "UNIT_COUNT", ROUND(su.unit_length_base*30.48) "UNIT_LENGTH_CM", ROUND(su.unit_width_base *30.48) "UNIT_WIDTH_CM", ROUND(su.unit_height_base*30.48) "UNIT_HEIGHT_CM" , ROUND(su.unit_weight_base*0.4536) "UNIT_WEIGHT_KG", glog_util.remove_domain(orcrst.status_value_gid) OR_critical_status, orr1.REMARK_TEXT OR_OBL_REASON_FOR_CRITICAL, orr2.REMARK_TEXT OR_IS_THIS_BILLBACK, orr3.REMARK_TEXT OR_PREMIUM_COST_LIMIT, orr4.REMARK_TEXT OR_ALTERNATE_DELIVERY_DATE, orr5.REMARK_TEXT OR_QCR_NUMBER, orr6.REMARK_TEXT OR_PREMIUM_NOTES, orr7.REMARK_TEXT OR_BACK_SUPPLIER, glog_util.remove_domain(shistat.status_value_gid) SH_PREM_STATUS, ROUND(shiSTD.cost_base, 2) SH_STND_COST, ROUND(shiPRE.cost_base, 2) SH_PREM_COST, ROUND(shiPRE.cost_base, 2) - ROUND(shiSTD.cost_base, 2) COST_DELTA, (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'FLIGHT_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shi.SHIPMENT_GID ) "FLIGHT_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shi.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = shi.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MAWB_NBR", carr.location_name CARRIER, TO_CHAR(shi.start_time, 'DD/MM/YYYY') sch_pu_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(eventdate, 'MM/DD/YYYY') FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_nu mber() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('CP', 'VD') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_pu, TO_CHAR(shi.end_time, 'DD/MM/YYYY') sch_del_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(eventdate, 'MM/DD/YYYY') FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipmen t shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('D1', 'VA', 'J1') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_del, (SELECT pu.location_name FROM location pu, shipment s WHERE s.source_location_gid = pu.location_gid AND s.shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid ) SHIPPER , (SELECT pu.city FROM location pu, shipment s WHERE s.source_location_gid = pu.location_gid AND s.shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid ) ||' ' || (SELECT cou.country_name FROM location pu, shipment s, country_code cou WHERE s.source_location_gid = pu.location_gid AND pu.country_code3_gid = cou.country_code3_gid AND s.shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid ) SHIP_CITY_CNTRY, (SELECT de.location_name FROM location de, shipment s WHERE s.dest_location_gid = de.location_gid AND s.shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid ) CONSIGNEE , (SELECT de.city FROM location de, shipment s WHERE s.dest_location_gid = de.location_gid AND s.shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid ) ||' ' || (SELECT cou.country_name FROM location de, shipment s, country_code cou WHERE s.dest_location_gid = de.location_gid AND de.country_code3_gid = cou.country_code3_gid AND s.shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid ) CONS_CITY_CNTRY FROM order_release ore, Order_release_line orl, ob_line obl, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, REMARK_TEXT FROM OB_LINE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) ='REASON_FOR_CRITICAL' ) oblr1, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, REMARK_TEXT FROM OB_LINE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'IS_THIS_BILLBACK' ) oblr2, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, REMARK_TEXT FROM OB_LINE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK _QUAL_GID) = 'PREMIUM_COST_LIMIT' ) oblr3, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, REMARK_TEXT FROM OB_LINE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'ALTERNATE_DELIVERY_DATE' ) oblr4, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, REMARK_TEXT FROM OB_LINE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) ='QCR_NUMBER' ) oblr5, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, REMARK_TEXT FROM OB_LINE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'PREMIUM_NOTES' ) oblr6, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, REMARK_TEXT FROM OB_LINE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'BILL_BACK_SUPPLIER' ) oblr7, (SELECT order_base_line_gid, ob_line_refnum_value FROM OB_LINE_REFNUM WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(ob_line_refnum_qual_gid) = 'BUYER_APPROVAL' ) oblrn, (SELECT order_release_GID, REMARK_TEXT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) ='REASON_FOR_CRITICAL' ) orr1, (SELECT order_release _GID, REMARK_TEXT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'IS_THIS_BILLBACK' ) orr2, (SELECT order_release_GID, REMARK_TEXT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'PREMIUM_COST_LIMIT' ) orr3, (SELECT order_release_GID, REMARK_TEXT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'ALTERNATE_DELIVERY_DATE' ) orr4, (SELECT order_release_GID, REMARK_TEXT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'QCR_NUMBER' ) orr5, (SELECT order_release_GID, REMARK_TEXT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'PREMIUM_NOTES' ) orr6, (SELECT order_release_GID, REMARK_TEXT FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REMARK WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(REMARK_QUAL_GID) = 'BILL_BACK_SUPPLIER' ) orr7, (SELECT order_release_gid, Status_Value_Gid FROM ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS WHERE GLOG _UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(Status_Type_Gid) ='CRITICAL' ) orcrst, order_movement omo, shipment shi, (SELECT shipment_gid, COST_BASE FROM SHIPMENT_INF_COST WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(SHIPMENT_INF_COST_QUAL_GID) = 'STANDARD_COST' ) shiSTD, (SELECT shipment_gid, COST_BASE FROM SHIPMENT_INF_COST WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(SHIPMENT_INF_COST_QUAL_GID) = 'PREMIUM_COST' ) shiPRE, (SELECT shipment_gid, status_value_gid FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(status_type_gid) = 'PREMIUM_APPROVAL' ) shistat, contact cont, ship_unit su, ship_unit_line sul, location carr WHERE ore.order_release_gid = orr1.order_release_GID (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = orr2.order_release_GID (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = orr3.order_release_GID (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = orr4.order_release_GID (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = orr5.order_release_GID (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = orr6.order_release_GID (+) AND ore.order_release _gid = orr7.order_release_GID (+) /*AND (orr1.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR orr2.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR orr3.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR orr4.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR orr5.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR orr6.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR orr7.remark_text IS NOT NULL)*/ AND ore.order_release_gid IN (SELECT order_release_gid FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM WHERE GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND order_release_refnum_value IN ('10199', '10299', '10599', '11099') ) AND ore.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid AND orl.ob_line_gid = obl.ob_line_gid AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblr1.order_base_line_gid (+) AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblr2.order_base_line_gid (+) AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblr3.order_base_line_gid (+) AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblr4.order_base_line_gid (+) AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblr5.order_base_line_gid (+) AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblr6.order_base_line_gid (+) AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblr7.order_base_line_gid (+) AND ((oblr1.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR oblr2.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR oblr3.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR oblr4.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR oblr5.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR oblr6.remark_text IS NOT NULL OR oblr7.remark_text IS NOT NULL) OR glog_util.remove_domain(shi.first_equipment_group_gid) IN ('AIR_NFO', 'AIR_FLASH_SERVICE')) AND obl.ob_line_gid = oblrn.order_base_line_gid (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = omo.order_release_gid (+) AND omo.shipment_gid = shi.shipment_gid (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = orcrst.order_release_gid AND shi.shipment_gid = shiSTD.shipment_gid (+) AND shi.shipment_gid = shiPRE.shipment_gid (+) AND shi.shipment_gid = shistat.shipment_gid AND SUBSTR(glog_util.remove_domain(oblrn.ob_line_refnum_value), 1, 9) = cont.contact_xid (+) AND ore.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid AND orl.order_release_line_gid = sul.order_release_line_gid AND sul.ship_unit_gid = su.ship_unit_gid AND shi.SERVPROV_GID = carr.location_gid (+) AND (carr.location_name IS NULL OR carr.location_name NOT IN ('FEDEX EXPRESS', 'FEDERAL EXPRESS FEDEX')) ORDER BY 2 DESC
9gdkkd6xuqyrs select /*+ optimizer_features_enable('11.2.0.4') */ distinct refnum_pivot.op_u "OP UNIT", sqry.shipment, sqry.transport_mode, sqry.carrier, sqry.src_loc, v_loc_dest.location_name dest_loc, to_char(sqry.start_time, 'mm/dd/yyyy') Scheduled_POE, to_char(sqry.end_time, 'mm/dd/yyyy') Scheduled_POI, to_char(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'mm/dd/yyyy') ETA, to_char(ldd.minldd, 'mm/dd/yyyy') NEED_DATE, case when to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(sysdate, 'DD-MON-RR') and ( to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(sqry.end_time, 'DD-MON-RR') or to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') is not null and to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') ) then 'MISSED' when to_date(ldd.minldd, ' DD-MON-RR') < (to_date(sqry.end_time, 'DD-MON-RR') +7) then 'AT RISK' when to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') is not null and (to_date(ldd.minldd, 'DD-MON-RR') < to_date(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-RR') +7) then 'AT RISK' else 'OK' end NEED_DT_RISK, refnum_pivot.mbol "MBL_NBR", refnum_pivot.hbl "HBL_NBR", refnum_pivot.vn "VESSEL", refnum_pivot.voyn "VOYAGE", refnum_pivot.TSvn "TSHIP_VESSEL", refnum_pivot.TSvoyn "TSHIP_VOYAGE", refnum_pivot.conn "CONTAINER_NBR", ship_orl_master.ORDER_RELEASE, ship_orl_master.packaged_item_gid ITEM_ID, buyer2.ob_refnum_value as "Buyer Name", csb.ROUTER_NAME, csb.ROUTER_SSO, sqry.FTZ, shipment.domain_name, glog_util.remove_domain(ship_orl_master.ship_unit_gid) SHIP_UNIT, ship_orl_master.DESCRIPTION ITEM_DESC, shipment.TOTAL_ship_unit_count, ship_orl_master.ship_unit_count, ship_orl_master.LENGTH_M, ship_orl_master.WIDTH_M, ship_orl_master.HEIGHT_M, case when refnum_pivot.op_u in ('102', '104', '5250', '10199', 'EPE_US', '10299', '10599', '11099', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'HR11', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_JEN_OHG', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HUN_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG_NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_P G_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_Steamgen', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'REPAIRS', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PM11-1', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US45', 'US48', 'US63' ) then 'POWER' when refnum_pivot.op_u in ('AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND_IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GERE_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_G ERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_WIND_IND_PN') then 'RENEWABLES' else 'UNCLASSIFIED' end SPLIT_ -- select * from shipment from (select shipment.shipment_gid , ie_shipmentstatus.status_code_gid from shipment, ss_status_history, ie_shipmentstatus where shipment.tranSport_mode_gid like '%VESSEL%' and shipment.shipment_gid = ss_status_history.shipment_gid and ss_status_history.I_TRANSACTION_NO = ie_shipmentstatus.I_TRANSACTION_NO and ie_shipmentstatus.status_code_gid in( 'D1', 'J1', 'VA') and (GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_indt(shipment.SHIPMENT_GID)) >= trunc(sysdate)-120 ) Delivered, ( select SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO, SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE from SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, (select SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, MAX(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO) I_TRANSACTION_NO from IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, SS_STATUS_HISTORY WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ('AG', 'X2') and IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.insert_date >= trunc(sysdate) - 120 GROUP BY SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID ) LDE WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO and LDE.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = LDE.SHIPMENT_GID AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ('AG', 'X2')) ETA, (select glog_util.remove_domain(v_ssd.shipment_gid) shipment, v_ssd.shipment_gid, max(v_ssul.order_release_gid), v_loc_car.location_name carrier, v_loc_src.location_name src_loc, v_ship.start_time, v_ship.end_time, glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.transport_mode_gid) transport_mode, case when ITEM_REF.ITEM_refnum_value = 'Y' then 'YES' when ITEM_REF.ITEM_refnum_value is null then 'NO' else ITEM_REF.ITEM_refnum_value end FTZ from s_ship_unit_line v_ssul, packaged_item v_pi, item v_item, (SELECT ITEM_gid, ITEM_refnum_value FROM ITEM_REFNUM where glog_util.remove_domain(ITEM_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'FTZ_ITEM') ITEM_REF, S_SHIP_UNIT v_ssu, shipment_stop_d v_ssd, shipment v_ship, SHIPMENT_STATUS v_ship_stat, location v_loc_src, location v_loc_car where v_ssul.s_ship_unit_gid = v_ssd.s_ship_unit_gid and v_item.item_gid = ITEM_REF.item_gid (+) and v_ssul.packaged_item_gid = v_pi.packaged_item_gid and v_pi.item_gid = v_item.item_gid and v_ssd.stop_num = 1 and v_ssul.s_ship_unit_gid = v_ssu.s_ship_unit_gid and v_ssd.shipment_gid = v_ship.shipment_gid and v_ship.source_location_gid = v_loc_src.location_gid and v_ship.transport_mode_gid like '%VESSEL%' and TRUNC(v_ship_stat.insert_date) >= TRUNC(sysdate-120) and v_ship.shipment_gid = v_ship_stat.shipment_gid and glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship_stat.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE R ESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') and v_ship.SERVPROV_GID = v_loc_car.location_gid group by v_ssd.shipment_gid, v_loc_car.location_name, v_loc_src.location_name, v_ship.start_time, v_ship.end_time, v_ship.transport_mode_gid, ITEM_REF.ITEM_refnum_value ) sqry, (select shipment, vn, TSvn, TSvoyn, vcode, op_u, mbol, hbl, conn, voyn from (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REFNUM.shipment_gid) shipment, SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL.shipment_refnum_qual_xid, SHIPMENT_REFNUM.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMEN T_REFNUM , SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL where SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL.shipment_refnum_qual_gid = SHIPMENT_REFNUM.shipment_refnum_qual_gid ) pivot (max(shipment_refnum_value) for shipment_refnum_qual_xid in ('VESSEL_NAME' vn, 'VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1' TSvn, 'VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1' TSvoyn, 'VESSEL_CODE' vcode, 'OP_UNIT' op_u, 'MBOL_NUMBER' mbol, 'HBL_NUMBER' hbl, 'CONTAINER_NBR' conn, 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' voyn))) refnum_pivot, ( select v_ssd.shipment_gid, v_ssul.order_release_gid orl, v_ssul.order_release_gid ORDER_RELEASE, v_ssul.order_base_gid, v_pi.packaged_item_gid, item.DESCRIPTION, v_su.ship_unit_gid, v_su.ship_unit_count, -- v_su.unit_length_base, round(v_su.unit_len gth_base * 0.3048 , 2) LENGTH_M, round(v_su.unit_WIDTH_base * 0.3048 , 2) WIDTH_M, round(v_su.unit_HEIGHT_base * 0.3048 , 2) HEIGHT_M from shipment_stop_d v_ssd, s_ship_unit_line v_ssul, ship_unit v_su, packaged_item v_pi, item where v_ssd.s_ship_unit_gid = v_ssul.s_ship_unit_gid and v_ssul.ship_unit_gid = v_su.ship_unit_gid and v_ssuL.packaged_item_gid = v_pi.packaged_item_gid and v_ssd.stop_num = 1 and v_pi.item_gid = item.item_gid and v_ssul.s_ship_unit_line_no = 1 )ship_orl_master, (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(tc.insert_user) router_sso, con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name router_name, glog_util.remove_domain(tc.shipment_gid) shipment_gid FROM tender_collaboration tc, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION' , 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid) z WHERE tc.insert_user = con.contact_gid AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn ) CSB, location v_loc_dest, REGION_DETAIL rd, shipment, (SELECT SH2.shipment_gid, MIN(ldd.late_delivery_date) minldd FROM ORDER_RELEASE ORE3, SHIPMENT SH2, SHIPMENT_S_EQUIPMENT_JOIN SSEJ2, S_EQUIPMENT_S_SHIP_UNIT_JOIN SESSUJ2, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE SSUL2, (SELECT order_release_gid, late_delivery_date FROM order_release) ldd WHERE SSEJ2.S_EQUIPMENT_GID = SESSUJ2.S_EQUIPMENT_GID AND SESSUJ2.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = SSUL2.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND ORE3.ORDER_RELEASE_GID =SSUL2.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND SH2.SHIPMENT_GID = SSEJ2.SHIPMENT_GID AND ORE3.order_release_gid = ldd.order_release_gid GROUP BY SH2.shipment_gid) ldd, ( select obr.order_base_gid, obr.ob_refnum_value from OB_REFNUM OBR where glog_util.remove_domain(OBR.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'BUYER_NAME' ) BUYER2 where sqry.shipment = refnum_pivot.shipment and v_loc_dest.location_gid = shipment.dest_location_gid and sqry.shipment_gid = ETA.shipment_gid(+) and sqry.shipment_gid = delivered.shipment_gid(+) and Delivered.status_code_gid is null and ship_orl_master.shipment_gid = sq ry.shipment_gid --added (+) below trouble and sqry.shipment_gid = csb.SHIPMENT_GID(+) and shipment.shipment_gid = sqry.shipment_gid and shipment.dest_location_gid = v_loc_dest.location_gid and v_loc_dest.country_code3_gid = rd.country_code3_gid and glog_util.remove_domain(rd.region_gid) = 'NAM' and refnum_pivot.op_u not in ('OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND_IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GERE_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_ WIND_IND_PN') AND sqry.shipment_gid = ldd.shipment_gid -- and ship_orl_master.order_base_gid = buyer2.order_base_gid (+)
9krn4t5ddngpwselect time_zone_gid from location where location_gid = :1
a4xfhuu51wfhd SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Los_Angeles' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
a6h5azuwvyjnx SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(ore.order_release_gid) order_release_id, glog_util.remove_domain( (SELECT Status_Value_Gid FROM order_release_status WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Type_Gid) ='PLANNING' AND order_release_gid = ore.order_release_gid )) OR_status, glog_util.remove_domain(ore.Source_location_gid) OR_supplier_ID, (SELECT location_name FROM location WHERE location_gid = ore.Source_location_gid ) OR_supplier_Name, or_pu.location_name OR_PU_LOC, or_pu.city OR_PU_CITY, or_pu.postal_code OR_PU_ZIP, pucou.country_name OR_PU_CNTRY, or_del.location_name OR_DEL_LOC, or_del.city OR_DEL_CITY, or_del.postal_code OR_DEL_ZIP, delcou.country_name OR_DEL_CNTRY, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.ob_line_gid) OB_LINE, orl.item_package_count item_count, glog_util.remove_domain(orl.packaged_item_gid) item_id, (SELECT NVL(description, item_name) FROM item WHERE item_gid = orl.packaged_item_gid ) Item_desc, TO_DATE(TRUNC(submit.insert_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_Submit_dt, glog_util.remove_domain(submit.insert_user) OR_Submit_by, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.early_pickup_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_early_PU_DT, TO_DATE(TRUNC(ore.late_delivery_date), 'DD-MM-YY') OR_late_del_DT, (SELECT description FROM GENERAL_LEDGER_CODE WHERE general_ledger_gid = ore.buy_general_ledger_gid ) "OR_BILL_CODE", glog_util.remove_domain(leg.shipment_gid) SHIPMENT_ID, leg.leg_id, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.sc_status ) SHIP_STATUS, leg.router, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.source_location_gid) pu_loc_id, leg.pu_loc, leg.pu_city, leg.pu_zip, leg.pu_cntry, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.dest_location_gid) del_loc_id, leg.del_loc, leg.del_city, leg.del_zip, leg.del_cntry, TO_DATE(leg.sch_pu_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_pu_dt, TO_DATE(leg.act_pu, 'DD-MM-YY')act_pu, TO_DATE(leg.sch_del_dt, 'DD-MM-YY') sch_del_dt, TO_DATE(leg.eta, 'DD-MM-YY') eta, TO_DATE( leg.act_del, 'DD-MM-YY') act_del, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.first_equipment_group_gid) EQUIPMENT, glog_util.remove_domain(leg.transport_mode_gid) transport_mode, leg.carrier, ROUND(leg.total_actual_cost_base, 2) COST_USD, ROUND(leg.total_weight_base* 0.4536) shipment_weight_kg, LEG.FLIGHT_NBR, LEG.HAWB_NBR, LEG.MAWB_NBR, LEG.VOYAGE_NBR, LEG.VESSEL_CODE, LEG.VESSEL_NAME, LEG.HBL_NBR, LEG.MBL_NBR, LEG.CONTAINER_NBR, submit.insert_date FILTER_DT FROM order_release ore, location or_pu, location or_del, COUNTRY_CODE pucou, COUNTRY_CODE delcou, order_release_line orl, (SELECT ore.order_release_gid, sh.shipment_gid, --sh.itinerary_gid, CASE WHEN sh.itinerary_gid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT sequence_no FROM ITINERARY_DETAIL WHERE itinerary_gid = sh.ITINERARY_GID AND leg_gid = sh.PARENT_LEG_GID ) END leg_id, (SELECT status_value_gid FROM SH IPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid ) sc_status, NVL( (SELECT con.first_name || ' ' || con.last_name router_name FROM tender_collaboration tc, contact con, (SELECT x.shipment_gid, MAX(x.i_transaction_no) maxtn FROM tender_collaboration x, TENDER_COLLABORATION_STATUS y WHERE x.i_transaction_no = y.i_transaction_no AND glog_util.remove_domain(y.status_value_gid) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') GROUP BY x.shipment_gid ) z WHERE tc.insert_user = con.contact_gid AND tc.shipment_gid = z.shipment_gid AND tc.i_transaction_no = z.maxtn AND tc.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_GID ), (SELECT c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name router_name FROM CONTACT C --WHERE c.contact_gid = sh.insert_user WHERE c.contact_gid = PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INUSR(SH.SHIPMENT_GID) )) router, sh.source_location_gid, pu_loc.location_name pu_loc, pu_loc.city pu_city, pu_loc.postal_code pu_zip, puc.country_name pu_cntry, sh.dest_location_gid, del_loc.location_name del_loc, del_loc.city del_city, del_loc.postal_code del_zip, dlc.country_name del_cntry, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.start_time, sh.source_location_gid)) sch_pu_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_tr ansaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('CP', 'VD') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_pu, TRUNC(utc.get_local_date(sh.end_time, sh.dest_location_gid)) sch_del_dt, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = s hp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('X2', 'AG') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) eta, (SELECT DISTINCT utc.get_local_date(eventdate, source_location_gid) FROM (SELECT iss.eventdate eventdate, ssh.shipment_gid shipment_gid, shp.source_location_gid source_location_gid, row_number() over(partition BY ssh.shipment_gid order by to_date(iss.insert_date, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') DESC) seq FROM ss_status_history ssh, ie_shipmentstatus iss, bs_status_code bsc, shipment shp WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = iss.i_transaction_no AND iss.status_code_gid = bsc.bs_status_code_gid AND ssh.shipment_gid = shp.shipment_gid AND bsc.bs_status_code_xid IN ('D1', 'VA', 'J1') ) WHERE seq = 1 AND shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND rownum <2 ) act_del, sh.total_weight_base, sh.first_equipment_group_gid, sh.transport_mode_gid, (SELECT location_name FROM location WHERE location_gid = sh.SERVPROV_GID ) carrier, sh.total_actual_cost_base, (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'FLIGHT_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "FLIGHT_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MAWB_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VOYAGE_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VOYAGE_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_CODE' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_CODE", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'VESSEL_NAME' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "VESSEL_NAME", (SELECT L ISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "HBL_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "MBL_NBR", (SELECT LISTAGG(SR.shipment_refnum_value, ', ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY 1) FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'CONTAINER_NBR' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = sh.SHIPMENT_GID ) "CONTAINER_NBR" FROM order_release ore, shipment sh, order_movement omo, location pu_loc, location del_lo c, COUNTRY_CODE puc, COUNTRY_CODE dlc WHERE ore.order_release_gid = omo.order_release_gid AND omo.shipment_gid = sh.shipment_gid AND sh.source_location_gid = pu_loc.location_gid AND pu_loc.country_code3_gid = puc.country_code3_gid AND sh.dest_location_gid = del_loc.location_gid AND del_loc.country_code3_gid = dlc.country_code3_gid AND SH.SHIPMENT_TYPE_GID = 'TRANSPORT' --AND sh.insert_date >= sysdate -150 AND PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.FNC_SHIP_INDT(SH.SHIPMENT_GID) >= sysdate -365 AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' AND glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_WITHDRAWN', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_NO RESPONSE', 'SECURE RESOURCES_DECLINED', 'SECURE RE SOURCES_NOT STARTED') AND sh.shipment_gid IN (SELECT shipment_gid FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND shipment_refnum_value = 'PL20' ) ) ) leg, (SELECT order_release_gid, insert_date, insert_user FROM order_release_status WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(Status_Type_Gid) ='SUBMIT_TO_LCOE' ) submit WHERE ore.order_release_gid = leg.order_release_gid (+) AND NVL(ore.plan_from_location_gid, ore.source_location_gid ) = or_pu.location_gid AND NVL(ore.plan_to_location_gid, ore.dest_location_gid ) = or_del.location_gid AND or_PU.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = pucou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND or_del.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = delcou.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND ore.order_release_gid = orl.order_release_gid AND ore.order_re lease_gid = submit.order_release_gid AND orl.ob_line_gid IS NOT NULL AND submit.insert_date >= sysdate - 365 /* OR leg.act_del IS NULL OR leg.act_del >= sysdate - 15*/ AND ore.order_release_gid IN (SELECT order_release_gid FROM ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID) = 'OP_UNIT' AND order_release_refnum_value = 'PL20' ) ORDER BY 1 ASC
an7943tukhpyn SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
bn2h9bjdh4f6k select * from (select distinct glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (select glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user from tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat where v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO and v_tend_coll_stat.status_type_gid in ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) and v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid in ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'G E/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) and v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum=1) "CARRIER_SEL_BY_ROUTER_SSO", replace(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME||'.') AS ITINERARY, case when act_PU.actual is null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINERARY_GID is not null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINERARY_GID is null THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , Case when act_pu.PUDEL is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 then 'Pickup_Date_Missing' Else 'Pickup_Date_Exist' End "Pickup_Date_Status", Case when act_del.PUDEL is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 then 'Delivery_Date_Missing' Else 'Delivery_Date_Exist' End "Delivery_Date_Status", loc_src.Location_Name "PU_LOCATION", loc_src.City "PU_CITY", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "PU_COUNTRY", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "PU_ZIP", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "PU_REGION", loc_des.Location_Name "DEL_LOCATION", loc_des.City "DEL_CITY", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "DEL_COUNTRY", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "DEL_ZIP", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "DEL_REGION ", replace(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (select carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" from Location carrier where v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID)Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "SHIP_MODE", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT", v_ship.total_weight_uom_code "UOM", to_char(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", to_char(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ACT_PU_DT", to_char(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ACT_DEL_DT", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMEN T_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME')and rownum=1) AS VESSEL_NAME, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_Number' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_Number' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR')and rownum=1) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID)) AS INSERT_ROUTER_SSO, (select c.first_name||' '||c.last_name from shipment_involved_party sip, contact c where sip.shipment_gid = v_ship.shipment_gid and sip.involved_party_contact_gid = c.contact_gid and glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'ROUTER' and rownum = 1) "ROUTER_NAME", DECODE(wob.orl, NULL, NULL, 'YES') "WOB ", (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID in ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid and rownum =1) AS MSD from shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT shpt.shipment_gid, MAX(orl.order_release_gid) orl FROM shipment shpt, SHIPMENT_STOP_D SSD, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE SSUL, ORDER_RELEASE ORL WHERE shpt.SHIPMENT_GID = SSD.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSD.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID = SSUL.S_SHIP_UNIT_GID AND SSUL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN(ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) LIKE 'WOB_%' AND shpt.insert_date >= (sysdate-150) GROUP BY shpt.shipment_gid ) wob, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) actual FR OM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, trunc(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA, (SELECT shipment_gid, STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(STATUS_TYPE_GID) = 'SECURE RESOURCES' ) sst where loc_src.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID and v_ship.shipment_gid=om .shipment_gid(+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid=wob.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = sst.shipment_gid and v_ship.shipment_type_gid='TRANSPORT' and loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') and glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) and v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) and loc_des.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND glog_util.remove_domain(sst.STATUS_VALUE_GID) IN ('SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'SECURE RESOURCES_TENDERED') and ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE is null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE i s null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date>=(sysdate-150) ) where "Op_Unit" in ( '102', '104', '5250', '10199', '10299', '10599', '11099', '600117315', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'DEL#6735427', 'EPE_US', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'GEEN16', 'GEEN26', 'GEN 8 #5 / GEN 8 #6', 'HH01', 'HR11', 'HUN_US', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OP-GEEN39-CTSI', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HUN_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG _NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_SS', 'OU_PG_STEAM', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'STEAM_GEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-2700', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P1KR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PPCH', 'RU-PM11-1', 'RU-1100', 'RU-PUR8' ) and "CARRIER_SEL_BY_ROUTER_SSO" in ( '502059057', '105061691', '502409002', '503174066', '503154772', '503124945', '503191787', '503148998', '503190858', '503213244', '503078592', '502703042', '502451838', '503154764', '502753693', '503059328', '503081558', '502100489', '503158159', '503154768', '502417293', '503148992', '503005857', '605011025', '502234586', '503188302', '502614311', '605011032', '503154765', '503183362', '503167020', '503106333', '503063722', '502410576', '503146352', '503167023', '502544457', '503105301', '502528431', '501799405', '503185337', '502678718', '502714845', '503152525', '503085322', '502330646', '503172049', '502528396', '503162242', '503169392' )
bsdzx7xajvamf SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", CASE WHEN act_pu.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Pickup_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Pickup_Date_Exist' END "Pickup_Date_Status", CASE WHEN act_del.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Delivery_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Delivery_Date_Exist' END "Delivery_Date_Status", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user FROM tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat WHERE v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND v_tend_coll_stat.status_type_gid IN ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) AND v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid IN ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) AND v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Router", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_src.LOCATION_GID) "Pickup_LocationID", REPLACE(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.') AS ITIN, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NOT NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , loc_src.Location_Name "Origin_Location_Name", loc_src.City "Origin_City", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Origin_Country", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "Origin Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "Origin_ Reg", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_des.LOCATION_GID) "Destination_LocationID", loc_des.Location_Name "Des_Location_Name", loc_des.City "Des_City", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Des_Country", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "Dest Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "Dest_Reg", REPLACE(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (SELECT carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" FROM Location carrier WHERE v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID )Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "Mode", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", TO_CHAR(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", TO_CHAR(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_PU_DT", TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_DEL_DT", TO_CHAR(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ESTMATED_ARRIVAL", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID) REASON FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.is_hidden = 'N' AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ( 'GECORP.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GECORP.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GECORP.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.U3_PORT STRIKE S_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE001.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE002.LOST FREIGHT', 'GECORP.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.LOAD NOT READY', 'GECORP.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GECORP.VESSEL DELAY', 'GECORP.ORIGIN POLE', 'GECORP.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE001.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE001.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING I NSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GECORP.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GECORP.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT' , 'GE/GE001.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GECORP.U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'GECORP.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE002.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GE/GE001.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.CARRIER F AILURE', 'GE/GE001.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GE/GE001.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.BROKER DELAY', 'GE/GE001.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE002.CUSTOMS DELAY' ) AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "REASON", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.CRITICAL ORDER', 'GE.CRITICAL ORDER') AND rownum =1 ) AS CRITICAL_ORDER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.REGULAR PREMIUM', 'GECORP.REGULAR PREMIUM') AND rownum =1 ) AS REGULAR_PREMIUM, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID='PRO NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE I_TRANSACTION_NO = (SELECT IEF.i_transaction_no FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM IEF WHERE IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND IEF.insert_user LIKE '%E2OPEN%' AND IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG' AND ROWNUM =1 ) AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' AND ROWNUM =1 )EDI_PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT REMARK_TEXT FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND REMARK_TEXT ='PICKUP_NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PICKUP_NUMBER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_CODE', 'GECORP.VESSEL_CODE') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_CODE, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SH IPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_NAME, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VESSEL, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VOYAGE, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR') AND rownum =1 ) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID)) AS CREATED_BY_SSO, CASE WHEN OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID L IKE 'GECORP.WOB%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END WOB, (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid AND rownum =1 ) AS MSD, v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AS DOMAIN_SHIP_ID, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME))= 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 0 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END PU_AGE, CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 0 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END DEL_AGE, (SELECT c.email_address FROM Shipment_involved _party sip, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'SUPPLIER' AND c.contact_gid =sip.involved_party_contact_gid AND sip.shipment_gid = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) SUPPLIER_EMAIL, (SELECT st.STATUS_TYPE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE st.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES') AND st.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_TYPE_GID", (SELECT ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_A CCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') AND st.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_VALUE_GID" FROM shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) actual FRO M shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, TRUNC(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status _code_gid IN ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA WHERE loc_src.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND v_ship.shipment_gid =om.shipment_gid(+) AND v_ship.shipment_type_gid ='TRANSPORT' AND loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) AND loc_des.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC (sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1 OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date >=(sysdate -150) ) WHERE "Op_Unit" IN ( 'OU_GERE_CN_WESY', 'AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND_IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GER E_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_WIND_IND_PN', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS' )
c3c41tmnr7gg0SELECT NVL((SELECT INSERT_USER FROM OGEP.SHIPMENT WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=:B1 ), (SELECT INSERT_USER FROM SHIPMENT_T WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=:B1 )) FROM DUAL
cx9m0danshjry SELECT OOB.ATTRIBUTE1 AS "IPS", -- IPS OOB.ATTRIBUTE12 AS "Project Name", -- Project Name (SELECT OBRN.OB_REFNUM_VALUE FROM OB_REFNUM OBRN WHERE OBRN.order_base_gid = OOB.ORDER_BASE_GID AND OBRN.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.COMPANY_CODE' AND rownum=1 ) "Company_Code", (SELECT OBRN.OB_REFNUM_VALUE FROM OB_REFNUM OBRN WHERE OBRN.order_base_gid = OOB.ORDER_BASE_GID AND OBRN.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.PURCHASE_ORG' AND rownum=1 ) "Purchase Org", OL.ATTRIBUTE11 "Turbine#", -- Turbine# OL.ATTRIBUTE1 "COLINE", -- COLINE OL.ATTRIBUTE5 "MLI", -- MLI OOB.ORDER_BASE_XID "PO#", -- PO# OL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1 "PO Line#", -- PO Line# (SELECT location_name FROM GLOGOWNER.location l1 WHERE l1.location_ gid = OL.source_location_gid) "Vendor", -- Vendor (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "# of Releases", -- # of Releases DECODE( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM O RR WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORR.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (ORR.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORR.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.MSD' AND ORR.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_VALUE = 'MSD_NO' ), 0, 'NO', 'YES' ) "Non MSD Releases?", -- Non MSD Releases? (SELECT DECODE(MAX(OLR.OB_LINE_REFNUM_VALUE), 'VENDOR_TO_VENDOR_YES', 'YES', 'NO') FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_LINE_REFNUM OLR WHERE OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LI KE 'GECORP.B104%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND OLR.OB_LINE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.VENDOR_TO_VENDOR' ) "V2V?", -- V2V? (SELECT DECODE(MAX(OBR.OB_REFNUM_VALUE), 'EXPEDITED_SERVICE_YES', 'YES', 'NO') FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_REFNUM OBR WHERE OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID = OL.ORDER_BASE_GID AND (OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND OBR.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.EXPEDITED_SERVICE' ) "Expedited Services?", -- Expedited Services? (SELECT DECODE(MAX(OLR.OB_LINE_REFNUM_VALUE), 'SELF_ROUTED_YES', 'YES', 'NO') FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_LINE_REFNUM OLR WHERE OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'G ECORP.B104%' ) AND OLR.OB_LINE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.SELF_ROUTED' ) "Self Routed?", -- Self Routed? (SELECT DECODE(MAX(OBR.OB_REFNUM_VALUE), 'YES', 'YES', 'NO') FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_REFNUM OBR WHERE OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID = OL.ORDER_BASE_GID AND (OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND OBR.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.FACTORY_OUTBOUND' ) "Factory?", -- Factory? (SELECT DECODE(MAX(OBR.OB_REFNUM_VALUE), '102', 'EU', '104', 'EU', 'US') FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_REFNUM OBR WHERE OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID = OL.ORDER_BASE_GID AND (OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND OBR.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.OP_UNIT' ) "OP Unit", -- OP Unit OL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3 "Supplier Promised Date", -- Supplier Promised Date -- OTM Status Begin DECODE(OL.TAG3, 'CANCELLED', 'Cancelled', DECODE((SELECT COUNT(ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') ), 0, 'Open', DECODE( (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE1) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AN D NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE15) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' and ORR1.insert_date >= sysdate-730 ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE16) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_ LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE17) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1 .ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE5) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE2) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.OR DER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE4) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE3) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 'HOLD', 'Hold', DECODE((SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOV EMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT_STATUS OMS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR
