OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE .ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID = OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID AND OMS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING' AND OMS.STATUS_VALUE_GID NOT IN ('GECORP.OM_PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER _RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) <> 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SSH.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_H ISTORY SSH, GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IES WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND S.SHIPMENT_GID = SSH.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IES.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('CP', 'AF', 'VD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_ QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) )= (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING', 'GECORP.SUBMIT_TO_ROUTER') AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.ROUTER_PENDING', 'GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = 0 ), '1', 'Closed', 'Accepted' ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) "OTM Status", -- OTM Status End (SELECT DECODE(MAX(OLR.OB_LINE_REFNUM_VALUE), 'OPEN', 'Open', 'CLOSED', 'Closed', 'CLOSE', 'Closed', 'NO STATUS', 'No Status', 'No Status') FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_LINE_REFNUM OLR WHERE OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OLR.ORDER_BASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND OLR.OB_LINE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.EXTERNAL SYSTEM' ) "COPICS Status", -- COPICS Status (SELECT DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE1), 'HOLD', 'Code Compliance Hold', DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE15), 'HOLD', 'Quality Hold', DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE16), 'HOLD', 'Hazmat Hold', DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE17), 'HOLD', 'Radmat Hold', DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE5), 'HOLD', 'Sourcing Hold', DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE2), 'HOLD', 'Credit Hold', DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE4), 'HOLD', 'Project Hold', DECODE(MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE3), 'HOLD', 'Logistics Hold', DECODE(COUNT(ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID), 0, NULL, 'Released'))))))))) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER _RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "OTM Reason", -- OTM Reason (SELECT MIN(ORE.AT TRIBUTE1) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE1 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_Q UAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Code Compliance Hold", -- Code Compliance (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE15) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE15 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OR R1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Quality Hold", -- Quality Hold (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE16) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE16 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Hazmat Hold", -- Hazmat Hold (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE17) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE17 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Radmat Hold", -- Radmat Hold (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE5) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE _GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE5 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Sourcing Hold", -- Sourcing Hold (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE2) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GE CORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE2 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Credit Hold", -- Credit Hold (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE4) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE4 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Project Hold", -- Project Hold (SELECT MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE3) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ATTRIBUTE3 IN ('HOLD', 'RELEASE') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Logistics Hold", -- Logistics Hold (SELECT CAST((FROM_TZ(CAST( MIN(pkg_audit_util.fnc_orl_indt(orl.order_release_line_gid)) AS TIMESTAMP), '+00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'US/Eastern') AS DATE) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Earliest Supplier Submit Date", -- Earliest Supplier Submit Date (SELECT CAST ((FROM_TZ(CAST(MAX(pkg_audit_util.fnc_orl_indt(orl.order_release_line_gid)) AS TIMESTAMP), '+00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'US/Eastern') AS DATE) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Latest Supplier Submit Date", -- Latest Supplier Submit Date (SELECT CASE WHEN MIN(ORE.AT TRIBUTE1) = 'HOLD' THEN 'On Hold' WHEN MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE5) = 'HOLD' THEN 'On Hold' WHEN MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE15) = 'HOLD' THEN 'On Hold' WHEN MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE16) = 'HOLD' THEN 'On Hold' WHEN MIN(ORE.ATTRIBUTE17) = 'HOLD' THEN 'On Hold' WHEN MAX(ORS1.UPDATE_DATE) > MAX(ORS2.UPDATE_DATE) THEN TO_CHAR(CAST((FROM_TZ(CAST(MAX(ORS1.UPDATE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP), '+00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'US/Eastern') AS DATE)) ELSE TO_CHAR(CAST((FROM_TZ(CAST(MAX(ORS2.UPDATE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP), '+00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'US/Eastern') AS DATE)) END FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS1, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS2 WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS2.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS2.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS2.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS1.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.SOURCING QUALITY' AND ORS2.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS2.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.CODE COMPLIANC E' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Sourcing Hold Removed Date", -- Sourcing Hold Removed Date (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID), 0, NULL, DECODE(MIN(ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID), 'GECORP.ROUTER_PENDING', 'Router Pending', 'Router Submitted')) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OR L.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.SUBMIT_TO_ROUTER' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND O RR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Supplier Status", -- Supplier Status (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID), 0, NULL, DECODE(MIN(ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID), 'GECORP.ROUTER_PENDING', 'Router Pending', TO_CHAR(CAST((FROM_TZ(CAST(MAX(ORS.UPDATE_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP), '+00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'US/Eastern') AS DATE)))) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GE CORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.SUBMIT_TO_ROUTER' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) "Router Submitted Date", -- Router Submitted Date (SELECT LISTAGG(SHIPMENT_XID, ', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY SHIPMENT_XID) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT S.SHIPMENT_XID, OBL.OB_LINE_GID FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.OB_LINE OBL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OBL.OB_LINE_GID AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.order_release_type_gid = 'GECORP.PGP_MSD' AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) NBL WHERE NBL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID ) "BOL", -- BOL -- BEGIN PO Status ( DECODE( (SELECT COUNT(ORL1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL1 WHERE ORL1.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL1.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL1.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL1.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 0, NULL, DECODE( (SELECT DISTINCT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LIN E ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.PLANNING' AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 1, 'Planning', DECODE( (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT 1) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT_STATUS OMS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDE R_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID = OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID AND OMS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING' AND OMS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.OM_PLANNING_PLAN NED - FAILED', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED') AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 1, 'Planning', DECODE( (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT_STATUS OMS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID = OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID AND OMS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING' AND OMS.STATUS_VALUE_GID NOT IN ('GECORP.OM_PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) <> 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SSH.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH, GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IES WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND S.SHIPMENT_GID = SS H.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IES.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('CP', 'AF', 'VD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' )) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE _LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING', 'GECORP.SUBMIT_TO_ROUTER') AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.ROUTER_PENDING', 'GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4 %' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = 0 -- ), 1, 'Shipped', 'Pending Pick-Up' -- Added Jun 1, 2018 ), 1, (SELECT DISTINCT DECODE(orn.order_release_refnum_value, 'WMSA', 'Shipped, Check WMSA', 'Shipped') FROM glogowner.order_release_refnum orn WHERE orn.order_release_refnum_qual_gid = 'GECORP.SOURCE' and orn.order_release_refnum_value= 'WMSA' AND order_release_gid in (SELECT DISTINCT order_release_gid FROM glogowner.order_release_line ORL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID)), 'Pending Pick-Up' -- End Added Jun 1, 2018 ) ) ) ) )"PO Status", -- PO Status -- BEGIN Pick-Up Confirmed Date(EST) DECODE( (SELECT DISTINCT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.PLANNING' AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOL D', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), 1, NULL, DECODE( (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT_STATUS OMS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID = OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID AND OMS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING' AND OMS.STATUS_VALUE_GID NOT IN ('GECORP.OM_PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) <> 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SSH.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH, GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IES WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GI D LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND S.SHIPMENT_GID = SSH.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IES.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('CP', 'AF', 'VD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHI PMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING', 'GECORP.SUBMIT_TO_ROUTER') AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.ROUTER_PENDING', 'GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = 0 ), 1, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CAST((FROM_TZ(CAST(MAX(IES.EVENTDATE) AS TIMES TAMP), '+00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'US/Eastern') AS DATE)) || ' US/Eastern' FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH, GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IES WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP .B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND S.SHIPMENT_GID = SSH.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IES.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('CP', 'AF', 'VD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ), NULL ) ) "Pick-Up Confirmed Date(EST)", -- Pick-Up Confirmed Date(EST) -- BEGIN -- Pick-Up Confirmed Dt(Entered) DECODE( ( SELECT DISTINCT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.PLANNING' AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEA SE_ID' ) ), 1, NULL, DECODE( ( SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT_STATUS OMS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ( OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID = OMS.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID AND OMS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING' AND OMS.STATUS_VALUE_GID NOT IN ('GECORP.OM_PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.OM_PLA NNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.OM_PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) <> 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SSH.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH, GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IES WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_G ID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND S.SHIPMENT_GID = SSH.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IES.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('CP', 'AF', 'VD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND O RR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID L IKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OR R1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING', 'GECORP.SUBMIT_TO_ROUTER') AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.ROUTER_PENDING', 'GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_ RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = 0 ), 1, (SELECT TO_CHAR(CAST((FROM_TZ(CAST(NBL.EVENTDATE AS TIMESTAMP), '+00:00') AT TIME ZONE DECODE(NBL.TIME_ZONE_GID, 'UCT', 'UTC')) AS DATE)) || ' ' || NBL.TIME_ZONE_GID FROM (SELECT MAX(IES.EVENTDATE) EVENTDATE, IES.TIME_ZONE_GID, OBL.OB_LINE_GID FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH, GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IES, GLOGOWNER.OB_LINE OBL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OBL .OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.order_release_type_gid = 'GECORP.PGP_MSD' AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND S.SHIPMENT_GID = SSH.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IES.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('CP', 'AF', 'VD') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECOR P.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) GROUP BY OBL.OB_LINE_GID, IES.TIME_ZONE_GID ORDER BY MAX(IES.EVENTDATE) DESC ) NBL WHERE NBL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND ROWNUM = 1 ), NULL ) ) "Pick-Up Confirmed Dt(Entered)", -- Pick-Up Confirmed Dt(Entered) END -- BEGIN Pick-Up Confirmed User DECODE( ( SELECT DISTINCT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_STATUS ORS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID = 'GECORP.PLANNING' AND ORS.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING_NEW', 'GECORP.PLANNING_UNSCHEDULED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_CREDIT HOLD', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT_STATUS OMS WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.SHIPMENT_GID) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S WHERE ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORS.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORS.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.PLANNING', 'GECORP.PLANNING_DELETED', 'GECORP.PLANNING_ITEM OUT OF DATE', 'GECORP.PLANNING_PLANNED - FAILED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) ) = 0 ), 1, (SELECT NBL.GL_USER_XID FRO M (SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(SSH.REPORTING_GLUSER, 'GECORP.', ''), 'SERVPROV.', '') GL_USER_XID, OBL.OB_LINE_GID, MAX(IES.EVENTDATE) FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE ORL, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE ORE, GLOGOWNER.ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, GLOGOWNER.SHIPMENT S, GLOGOWNER.SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSH, GLOGOWNER.IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS IES, GLOGOWNER.GL_USER GU, GLOGOWNER.OB_LINE OBL WHERE ORL.OB_LINE_GID = OBL.OB_LINE_GID AND (ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OM.ORDER_MOVEMENT_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%') AND (OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OBL.OB_LINE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORL.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND ORE.order_release_type_gid = 'GECORP.PGP_MSD' AND OM.SHIPMENT_GID = S.SHIPMENT_GID AND NVL(ORE.PLAN_FROM_LOCATION_GID, ORE.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID) = OM.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND S.SHI PMENT_GID = SSH.SHIPMENT_GID AND SSH.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IES.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IES.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('CP', 'AF', 'VD') AND SSH.REPORTING_GLUSER = GU.GL_USER_GID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM GLOGOWNER.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM ORR1 WHERE ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID = ORE.ORDER_RELEASE_GID AND (ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND ORR1.ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.ORIGINAL_RELEASE_ID' ) GROUP BY SSH.REPORTING_GLUSER, OBL.OB_LINE_GID ORDER BY MAX(IES.EVENTDATE) DESC ) NBL WHERE NBL.OB_LINE_GID = OL.OB_LINE_GID AND ROWNUM = 1 ), NULL ) ) "Pick-Up Confirmed User" -- Pick-Up Confirmed User END FROM GLOGOWNER.OB_ORDER_BASE OOB, GLOGOWNER.OB_LINE OL, GLOGOWNER.OB_REFNUM OBR WHERE OOB.ORDER_BASE_GID = OL.ORDER_BASE_GID AND OOB.ORDER_BASE_GID = OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID AND (OOB.ORDER_BASE_GID like 'GECORP.6%' OR OOB.ORDER_BASE_GID like 'GECORP.4%' OR OOB.ORDER_BASE_GID like 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.6%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.4%' OR OBR.ORDER_BASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.B104%' ) AND (OL.OB_LINE_GID like 'GECORP.6%' OR OL.OB_LINE_GID like 'GECORP.4% ' OR OL.OB_LINE_GID like 'GECORP.B104%') AND OBR.OB_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GECORP.MSD' AND OBR.OB_REFNUM_VALUE = 'MSD_YES' AND OOB.ATTRIBUTE1 IS NOT NULL AND OOB.ATTRIBUTE12 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY OOB.ATTRIBUTE12, OOB.ORDER_BASE_XID
d0cdjhg6q72az SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", CASE WHEN act_pu.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Pickup_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Pickup_Date_Exist' END "Pickup_Date_Status", CASE WHEN act_del.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Delivery_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Delivery_Date_Exist' END "Delivery_Date_Status", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user FROM tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat WHERE v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND v_tend_coll_stat.statu s_type_gid IN ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) AND v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid IN ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) AND v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Router", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_src.LOCATION_GID) "Pickup_LocationID", REPLACE(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.') AS ITIN, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NOT NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , loc_src.Location_Name "Origin_Location_Name", loc_src.City "Origin_City", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Origin_Country", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "Origin Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "Origin_Reg", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_des.L OCATION_GID) "Destination_LocationID", loc_des.Location_Name "Des_Location_Name", loc_des.City "Des_City", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Des_Country", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "Dest Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "Dest_Reg", REPLACE(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (SELECT carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" FROM Location carrier WHERE v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID )Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "Mode", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", TO_CHAR(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", TO_CHAR(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_PU.actual, 'mm/dd/yyyy') "SHIP_ACT_PU_DT", TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'mm/dd/yyyy') "SHIP_ACT_DEL_DT", TO_CHAR(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MON-YY HH24:MI:SS') "ESTMATED_ARRIVAL", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID) REASON FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.is_hidden = 'N' AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ( 'GECORP.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GECORP.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GECORP.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_O FFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE001.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE002.LOST FREIGHT', 'GECORP.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.LOAD NOT READY', 'GECORP.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GECORP.VESSEL DELAY', 'GECORP.ORIGIN POLE', 'GECORP.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE001.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE001.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CA USED', 'GECORP.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GECORP.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GECORP.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT' , 'GE/GE001.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GECORP.U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'GECORP.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE002.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GE/GE001.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U5_SHIPPIN G DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GE/GE001.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.BROKER DELAY', 'GE/GE001.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE002.CUSTOMS DELAY' ----CM NOTE added domain specifics to try and help performance ) AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "REASON", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.CRITICAL ORDER', 'GE.CRITICAL ORDER') AND rownum =1 ) AS CRITICAL_ORDER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.REGULAR PREMIUM', 'GECORP.REGULAR PREMIUM') AND rownum =1 ) AS REGULAR_PREMIUM, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID='PRO NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE I_TRANSACTION_NO = (SELECT IEF.i_transaction_no --IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, IEF.i _transaction_no, IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM IEF --, ie_shipmentstatus IES WHERE IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND IEF.insert_user LIKE '%E2OPEN%' AND IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG' AND ROWNUM =1 ) AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' AND ROWNUM =1 )EDI_PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT REMARK_TEXT FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND REMARK_TEXT ='PICKUP_NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PICKUP_NUMBER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.rem ove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_CODE', 'GECORP.VESSEL_COD E') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_CODE, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_NAME, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VESSEL, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VOYAGE, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util .remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_Number' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_Number' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR') AND rownum =1 ) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SH IPMENT_GID)) AS CREATED_BY_SSO, CASE WHEN OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.WOB%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END WOB, (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid AND rownum =1 ) AS MSD, v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AS DOMAIN_SHIP_ID, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trun c(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME))= 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) -TRUNC( v_ship.START_TIME)) = 0 THEN 'NEW' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 0 then 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END PU_AGE, -- case when ACT_DEL is null then round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.end_tim e, sh.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGED_DAYS, CASE -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 1 THEN 'YESTER DAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 0 then 'NEW' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 0 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END DEL_AGE, (SELECT c.email_address FROM Shipment_involved_party sip, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'SUPPLIER' AND c.contact_gid =sip.involved_party_contact_gid AND sip.shipment_gid = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) SUPPLIER_EMAIL, (SELECT st.STATUS_TYPE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE st.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES') AND st.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_TYPE_GID", (SELECT ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOK ED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') AND st.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_VALUE_GID" FROM shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", ies.eventdate Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_ gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", ies.eventdate actual FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, IE_SH IPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS, (SELECT SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID, --IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE LatestDelayedEvent, MAX(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE) EVENTDATE FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('X2', 'AG') GROUP BY SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID ) LDE WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = LDE.SHIPMENT_GID AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.EVENTDATE = LDE.EVENTDATE AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ('X2', 'AG') ) ETA WHERE loc_src.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND om.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND v_ship.shipment_type_gid ='TRANSPOR T' AND loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) AND loc_des.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND ( ( TRUNC(ETA.EVENTDATE ) <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME ) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( TRUNC(ETA.EVENTDATE ) >=TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(ETA.EVENTDATE) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( TRUNC(ETA.EVENTDATE) <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship. END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( TRUNC(ETA.EVENTDATE ) >=TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(ETA.EVENTDATE) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1 OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND TRUNC(v_ship.insert_date) >=(TRUNC(sysdate) -150) /* and (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) NOT IN ( 'EPE_US', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', '102', '104', '5250', '10199', '10299', '10599', '11099', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'HR11', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_JEN_OHG', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HUN_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_ PG_NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_Steamgen', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'REPAIRS', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PM11-1', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US45', 'US48', 'US63', 'RU-1100', 'RU-PPCH', 'OU_JV_US_HOU', 'RU-PUR8' ) */ --and glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) in ('200050775', '200412750') ) WHERE "Op_Unit" NOT IN ( 'EPE_US', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', '102', '104', '5250', '10199', '10299', '10599', '11099', 'CH21', 'CN21', 'FR25', 'GE_KEPPEL', 'HR11', 'IN42', 'IT10', 'NOTTERANGA', 'OP_PG_GAS', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_CF', 'OU_AEP_US_HOU_MFG', 'OU_APS_US_HOU', 'OU_GRID', 'OU_JEN_OHG', 'OU_NU_FUL', 'OU_NU_SER', 'OU_NU_SU', 'OU_PARTS_HU N_H03', 'OU_PARTS_RT_HUN', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR', 'OU_PARTS_US_ATL_PRI-VDIR_INTL', 'OU_PG_ATLSS', 'OU_PG_BED', 'OU_PG_CAN', 'OU_PG_CSI', 'OU_PG_CSO', 'OU_PG_CSS', 'OU_PG_DALSS', 'OU_PG_ESS', 'OU_PG_GAS', 'OU_PG_GCS', 'OU_PG_HSS', 'OU_PG_MD', 'OU_PG_NYSS', 'OU_PG_PER', 'OU_PG_PITSS', 'OU_PG_PPS', 'OU_PG_PPSD', 'OU_PG_RDC', 'OU_PG_RSS', 'OU_PG_SAL', 'OU_PG_STEAMGEN', 'OU_PG_Steamgen', 'OU_PG_TC', 'OU_PW_WAUKESHA_US', 'OU_WEL_CA', 'PL11', 'PL20', 'REPAIRS', 'RO40', 'RU-5250', 'RU-P9S8', 'US20', 'US44', 'RPC', 'RU-3924', 'RU-4026', 'RU-5351', 'RU-5436', 'RU-5783', 'RU-P1FR', 'RU-P4C1', 'RU-PM11', 'RU-PM11-1', 'OU_HU_GSCM_VE', 'OU_PG_SEAMGEN', 'UO_PG_STEAMGEN', 'US45', 'US48', 'US63', 'RU-1100', 'RU-PPCH', 'OU_JV_US_HOU', 'RU-PUR8' )
d0cyvbt7wztgf select * from (select distinct glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", Case when act_pu.PUDEL is null then 'Pickup_Date_Missing' Else 'Pickup_Date_Exist' End "Pickup_Date_Status", Case when act_del.PUDEL is null then 'Delivery_Date_Missing' Else 'Delivery_Date_Exist' End "Delivery_Date_Status", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (select glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user from tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat where v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO and v_tend_coll_stat.status_type_gid in ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TEN DER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) and v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid in ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) and v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum=1) "Router", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_src.LOCATION_GID) "Pickup_LocationID", replace(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NA ME||'.') AS ITIN, case when act_PU.actual is null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINERARY_GID is not null then glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual is null and v_ship.ITINERARY_GID is null THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) else 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , loc_src.Location_Name "Origin_Location_Name", loc_src.City "Origin_City", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Origin_Country", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "Origin Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "Origin_Reg", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_des.LOCATION_GID) "Destination_LocationID", loc_des.Location_Name "Des_Location_Name", loc_des.City "Des_City", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Des_Country", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "Dest Zip" , glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "Dest_Reg", replace(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (select carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" from Location carrier where v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID)Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "Mode", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", to_char(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", to_char(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_PU_DT", TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_DEL_DT", To_Char(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ESTMATED_ARRIVAL", (select glog_util.remove_domain(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID) REASON from SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO and SS_STATUS_HISTORY.is_hidden = 'N' AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID in ( 'GECORP.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GECORP.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GECORP.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA C AUSED', 'GECORP.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE001.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE002.LOST FREIGHT', 'GECORP.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.LOAD NOT READY', 'GECORP.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GECORP.VESSEL DELAY', 'GECORP.ORIGIN POLE', 'GECORP.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE001.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE001.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GECORP.U6_FREIGH T NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GECORP.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GECORP.U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'GECORP.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE002.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GE/GE001.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GE/GE001.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.BROKER
