DELAY', 'GE/GE001.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE002.CUSTOMS DELAY' ----CM NOTE added domain specifics to try and help performance ) and SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "REASON", (SELECT sr .shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.CRITICAL ORDER', 'GE.CRITICAL ORDER') and rownum=1) AS CRITICAL_ORDER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.REGULAR PREMIUM', 'GECORP.REGULAR PREMIUM') and rownum=1) AS REGULAR_PREMIUM, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID='PRO NUMBER' and rownum=1) AS PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE I_TRANSACTION_NO = ( select IEF.i_transaction_no --IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, IEF.i_transaction_no, IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID from I E_SHIPMENT_REFNUM IEF --, ie_shipmentstatus IES where IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND IEF.insert_user like '%E2OPEN%' AND IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG' AND ROWNUM=1) AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' AND ROWNUM=1 )EDI_PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT REMARK_TEXT from SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND REMARK_TEXT='PICKUP_NUMBER' and rownum=1) AS PICKUP_NUMBER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER')and rownum=1) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_CODE', 'GECORP.VESSEL_CODE')and rownum=1) AS VESSEL_CODE, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME')and rownum=1) AS VESSEL_NAME, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.S HIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1') and rownum=1) AS TSHIP_VESSEL, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1')and rownum=1) AS TSHIP_VOYAGE, (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (select SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR where glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value from SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMEN T_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR')and rownum=1) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID)) AS CREATED_BY_SSO, case when OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.WOB%' then 'YES' else 'NO' end WOB, (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID in ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid and rownum =1) AS MSD, v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AS DOMAIN_SHIP_ID, case when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 2 then '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME)) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when rou nd(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME))= 1 then 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' when act_PU.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 0 then 'NEW' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 0 then 'NEW' else 'TRACKED' end PU_AGE, -- case when ACT_DEL is null then round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.end_time, sh.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGED_DAYS, case when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 0 then 'NEW' when act_del.actual is null and round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(nvl(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 0 then 'NEW' else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGE, (SELECT c.email _address FROM Shipment_involved_party sip, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'SUPPLIER' AND c.contact_gid=sip.involved_party_contact_gid and sip.shipment_gid= v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID and rownum =1) SUPPLIER_EMAIL, (Select st.STATUS_TYPE_GID From SHIPMENT_STATUS ST where st.STATUS_TYPE_GID in ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES') and st.shipment_gid=v_ship.shipment_gid and rownum=1) "STATUS_TYPE_GID", (Select ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID From SHIPMENT_STATUS ST where ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_AC CEPTED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') and st.shipment_gid=v_ship.shipment_gid and rownum=1) "STATUS_VALUE_GID" from shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_ gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", trunc(ies.eventdate) actual FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHE RE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, trunc(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid in ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid and s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no and sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA where loc_src.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID and v_ship.shipment_gid=om.shipment_gid(+) and v_ship.shipment_type_gid='TRANSPORT' and loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID and glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') and glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) and v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) and loc_des.LOCATION_GID=v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID and ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.STA RT_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE is null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE<trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE>=trunc(v_ship.END_TIME) and (act_del.actual is null and ETA.EVENTDATE <=trunc(sysdate)-1) or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) or ( ETA.EVENTDATE is null and act_del.actual is null and trunc(v_sh ip.END_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1 or (act_PU.actual is null and trunc(v_ship.START_TIME) <=trunc(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date>=(sysdate-150) ) where "Op_Unit" in ( 'AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND_IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_ SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GERE_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_WIND_IND_PN', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'GE_INDIA_MMF_OTHER', 'GE_INDIA_WIND_PROD_UTI' )
ds1wmchydhccn SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Montreal' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
dvuz2czw4ccvp SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", CASE WHEN act_pu.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Pickup_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Pickup_Date_Exist' END "Pickup_Date_Status", CASE WHEN act_del.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Delivery_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Delivery_Date_Exist' END "Delivery_Date_Status", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user FROM tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat WHERE v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND v_tend_coll_stat.statu s_type_gid IN ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) AND v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid IN ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) AND v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Router", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_src.LOCATION_GID) "Pickup_LocationID", REPLACE(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.') AS ITIN, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NOT NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , loc_src.Location_Name "Origin_Location_Name", loc_src.City "Origin_City", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Origin_Country", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "Origin Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "Origin_Reg", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_des.L OCATION_GID) "Destination_LocationID", loc_des.Location_Name "Des_Location_Name", loc_des.City "Des_City", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Des_Country", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "Dest Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "Dest_Reg", REPLACE(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (SELECT carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" FROM Location carrier WHERE v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID )Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "Mode", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", TO_CHAR(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", TO_CHAR(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_PU_DT" , TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_DEL_DT", TO_CHAR(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ESTMATED_ARRIVAL", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID) REASON FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.is_hidden = 'N' AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ( 'GECORP.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GECORP.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GECORP.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OF FLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE001.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE002.LOST FREIGHT', 'GECORP.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.LOAD NOT READY', 'GECORP.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GECORP.VESSEL DELAY', 'GECORP.ORIGIN POLE', 'GECORP.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE001.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE001.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAU SED', 'GECORP.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GECORP.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GECORP.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT' , 'GE/GE001.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GECORP.U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'GECORP.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE002.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GE/GE001.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GE/GE001.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.BROKER DELAY', 'GE/GE001.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE002.CUSTOMS DELAY' ----CM NOTE added domain specifics to try and help performance ) AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "REASON", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.CRITICAL ORDER', 'GE.CRITICAL ORDER') AND rownum =1 ) AS CRITICAL_ORDER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.REGULAR PREMIUM', 'GECORP.REGULAR PREMIUM') AND rownum =1 ) AS REGULAR_PREMIUM, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID='PRO NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE I_TRANSACTION_NO = (SELECT IEF.i_transaction_no --IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, IEF.i_ transaction_no, IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM IEF --, ie_shipmentstatus IES WHERE IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND IEF.insert_user LIKE '%E2OPEN%' AND IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG' AND ROWNUM =1 ) AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' AND ROWNUM =1 )EDI_PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT REMARK_TEXT FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND REMARK_TEXT ='PICKUP_NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PICKUP_NUMBER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remo ve_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_CODE', 'GECORP.VESSEL_CODE ') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_CODE, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_NAME, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VESSEL, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VOYAGE, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util. remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR') AND rownum =1 ) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHI PMENT_GID)) AS CREATED_BY_SSO, CASE WHEN OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.WOB%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END WOB, (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid AND rownum =1 ) AS MSD, v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AS DOMAIN_SHIP_ID, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdat e) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME))= 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 0 THEN 'NEW' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 0 then 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END PU_AGE, -- case when ACT_DEL is null then round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UT C.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.end_time, sh.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGED_DAYS, CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start _time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 0 then 'NEW' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 0 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END DEL_AGE, (SELECT c.email_address FROM Shipment_involved_party sip, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'SUPPLIER' AND c.contact_gid =sip.involved_party_contact_gid AND sip.shipment_gid = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) SUPPLIER_EMAIL, (SELECT st.STATUS_TYPE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE st.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES') AND s t.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_TYPE_GID", (SELECT ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_B OOKED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') AND st.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_VALUE_GID" FROM shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ie s.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) actual FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, TRUNC(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS i es, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA WHERE loc_src.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND v_ship.shipment_gid =om.shipment_gid(+) AND v_ship.shipment_type_gid ='TRANSPORT' AND loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND glog_util.remove_domai n(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) AND loc_des.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TR UNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1 OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date >=(sysdate -150) ) WHERE "Op_Unit" IN ( 'AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', 'AX_0063', 'AX_ASV', 'AX_BAO', 'AX_CA', 'AX_GF', 'AX_JY', 'AX_LMD', 'AX_LR', 'AX_QHD', 'AX_TJN', 'AX_VAD', 'FR60', 'OU_CN_WIND_SY', 'OU_GEIIPL_WIND _IND', 'OU_GERE_CA_GECAN', 'OU_GERE_DE_GMBH', 'OU_GERE_ES_SLU', 'OU_GERE_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GECO', 'OU_GERE_US_GEII', 'OU_GERE_US_GERNA', 'OU_GERE_USII', 'OU_GERE_IN_RETP', 'OU_IN_WIND_PN', 'OU_MMF_PUNE_IN', 'OU_PG_WIND', 'OU_VN_RENEW_HP', 'OU_WE_DE', 'OU_WE_US', 'OU_WIND_CN_SY', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS', 'OU_GERE_US_HYB', 'OU_WIND_IND_PN', 'OU_GERE_CN_WEMH', 'OU_GERE_FR_FSAS' )
f1h1gbdtyv2hj SELECT (CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Phoenix' AS DATE)- CAST(to_timestamp('', 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS DATE)) * 24 FROM dual
fp26f07mft6ts SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.shipment_gid) "SHIPMENT ID", CASE WHEN act_pu.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Pickup_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Pickup_Date_Exist' END "Pickup_Date_Status", CASE WHEN act_del.PUDEL IS NULL THEN 'Delivery_Date_Missing' ELSE 'Delivery_Date_Exist' END "Delivery_Date_Status", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'OP_UNIT' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Op_Unit", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(v_tend_coll.insert_user) insert_user FROM tender_collaboration v_tend_coll , tender_collaboration_status v_tend_coll_stat WHERE v_tend_coll.I_TRANSACTION_NO = v_tend_coll_stat.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND v_tend_coll_stat.statu s_type_gid IN ('GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES' ) AND v_tend_coll_stat.status_value_gid IN ( 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GECORP.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.TENDER.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED' ) AND v_tend_coll.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "Router", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_src.LOCATION_GID) "Pickup_LocationID", REPLACE(v_ship.ITINERARY_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.') AS ITIN, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "PU_RESPONSIBLE_POLE", CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NOT NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND v_ship.ITINERARY_GID IS NULL THEN glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) ELSE 'TRACKED' END "DEL_RESPONSIBLE_POLE" , loc_src.Location_Name "Origin_Location_Name", loc_src.City "Origin_City", loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Origin_Country", loc_src.POSTAL_CODE "Origin Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_src.REGION_GID) "Origin_Reg", glog_util.remove_domain(loc_des.L OCATION_GID) "Destination_LocationID", loc_des.Location_Name "Des_Location_Name", loc_des.City "Des_City", loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID "Des_Country", loc_des.POSTAL_CODE "Dest Zip", glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.REGION_GID) "Dest_Reg", REPLACE(v_ship.SERVPROV_GID, v_ship.DOMAIN_NAME ||'.')AS CARRIER_GSL, (SELECT carrier.Location_Name "Carrier" FROM Location carrier WHERE v_ship.SERVPROV_GID=carrier.LOCATION_GID )Carrier_Name, v_ship.TRANSPORT_MODE_GID "Mode", glog_util.remove_domain(v_ship.FIRST_EQUIPMENT_GROUP_GID) "Equipment", ROUND(v_ship.total_weight_base, 0) "SHIPMENT_TOTAL_WEIGHT_LBS", TO_CHAR(v_ship.START_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Pickup", TO_CHAR(v_ship.END_TIME, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "Scheduled_Delivery", TO_CHAR(act_PU.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_PU_DT" , TO_CHAR(act_del.actual, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "SHIP_ACT_DEL_DT", TO_CHAR(ETA.EVENTDATE, 'DD-MONTH-YYYY') "ESTMATED_ARRIVAL", (SELECT glog_util.remove_domain(IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID) REASON FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS WHERE SS_STATUS_HISTORY.I_TRANSACTION_NO = IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.I_TRANSACTION_NO AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.is_hidden = 'N' AND IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS.STATUS_CODE_GID IN ( 'GECORP.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GECORP.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GECORP.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.U3_PORT STRIKES_ LABOR CONFLICTS_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OF FLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U8_SHIPPER INSTRUCTS LOW PRIORITY_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE001.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE002.LOST FREIGHT', 'GECORP.INTERNAL NOTES', 'GECORP.LOAD NOT READY', 'GECORP.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GECORP.VESSEL DELAY', 'GECORP.ORIGIN POLE', 'GECORP.U12_HOLIDAY_ BUSINESS CLOSED_DELIVERY REFUSED_GSA', 'GE/GE001.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT', 'GE/GE001.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.BROKER DELAY', 'GECORP.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE001.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAU SED', 'GECORP.U9_PACKAGING ISSUE RETURNED TO SHIPPER_GSA', 'GECORP.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GECORP.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.C7_DEST DELAY_BEYOND SHORT LANDING_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GE/GE001.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U10_INCORRECT ADDRESS_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C2_PROVIDER AIRLINE DELAY_ OFF-LOAD_ MISS CONNECT' , 'GE/GE001.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.U7_AWAITING SHIPPER''S INSTRUCTION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U6_FREIGHT NOT REC_ GAP IN COMMUNICATION_GSA', 'GE/GE001.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GECORP.U1_ACTS OF WAR_ POLITICAL_CIVIL UNREST', 'GECORP.C8_OTHER CONTROLLABLE DELAYS_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GE/GE002.VESSEL DELAY', 'GE/GE002.LOAD NOT READY', 'GE/GE001.CUSTOMS DELAY', 'GE/GE001.C1_LATE PICK UP_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.CARRIER FAILURE', 'GE/GE001.U4_GOVERNMENT CAUSED_FORCE MAJEURE', 'GECORP.U5_SHIPPING DOCS NOT REC BY CUTOFF _GSA', 'GE/GE001.C3_PROVIDER DOCUMENTATION ERRORS_PROVIDER', 'GE/GE002.HOLIDAY', 'GE/GE001.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.C4_PROVIDER AIRLINE CAPACITY_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.C6_ORIGIN DELAY_BEYOND LATE PICKUP_PROVIDER_AIRLIN', 'GECORP.APPOINTMENT REQUIRED', 'GECORP.U14_SHIPPER NOMINATED AGENT DELAY_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.C5_SHORT LANDINGS_MISROUTING_LOST_PROVIDER_AIRLINE', 'GECORP.U15_CARGO DIMS DIFFERENT THAN GIVEN _GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE001.U2_NATURAL DISASTER_ WEATHER_ TRAFFIC_FORCE MAJEUR', 'GE/GE001.U13_SHIPPER''S AIRLINE DELAY_OFFLOAD_GSA CAUSED', 'GECORP.U16_SHIPPERS BOOKING INSTRUCTION ERROR__GSA', 'GE/GE001.LOST FREIGHT', 'GE/GE001.BROKER DELAY', 'GE/GE001.U11_RELEASE SIGNATURE NOT ON FILE_GSA CAUSED', 'GE/GE002.CUSTOMS DELAY' ----CM NOTE added domain specifics to try and help performance ) AND SS_STATUS_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "REASON", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GECORP.CRITICAL ORDER', 'GE.CRITICAL ORDER') AND rownum =1 ) AS CRITICAL_ORDER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.REGULAR PREMIUM', 'GECORP.REGULAR PREMIUM') AND rownum =1 ) AS REGULAR_PREMIUM, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID='PRO NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM WHERE I_TRANSACTION_NO = (SELECT IEF.i_transaction_no --IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE, IEF.i_ transaction_no, IEF.insert_user, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID, IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID FROM IE_SHIPMENT_REFNUM IEF --, ie_shipmentstatus IES WHERE IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND IEF.insert_user LIKE '%E2OPEN%' AND IEF.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'GLOG' AND ROWNUM =1 ) AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID = 'PRO NUMBER' AND ROWNUM =1 )EDI_PRO_NUMBER, (SELECT REMARK_TEXT FROM SHIPMENT_REMARK WHERE SHIPMENT_GID=v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND REMARK_TEXT ='PICKUP_NUMBER' AND rownum =1 ) AS PICKUP_NUMBER, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.FLIGHT_NUMBER', 'GECORP.FLIGHT_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS FLIGHT_NBR, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remo ve_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HAWB", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MAWB' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MAWB", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER') AND rownum =1 ) AS VOYAGE_NBR, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_CODE', 'GECORP.VESSEL_CODE ') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_CODE, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME') AND rownum =1 ) AS VESSEL_NAME, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VESSEL_NAME_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VESSEL, (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1', 'GECORP.VOYAGE_NUMBER_TRANSSHIP_1') AND rownum =1 ) AS TSHIP_VOYAGE, (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util. remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'HBL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "HBL_Number", (SELECT SR.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_VALUE FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(SR.shipment_refnum_qual_gid) = 'MBOL_NUMBER' AND SR.SHIPMENT_GID = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) "MBL_Number", (SELECT sr.shipment_refnum_value FROM SHIPMENT_REFNUM SR WHERE SR.SHIPMENT_GID =v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND sr.SHIPMENT_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.CONTAINER_NBR', 'GECORP.CONTAINER_NBR') AND rownum =1 ) AS CONTAINER_NBR, glog_util.remove_domain(GLOGOWNER.PKG_AUDIT_UTIL.fnc_ship_inusr(v_ship.SHI PMENT_GID)) AS CREATED_BY_SSO, CASE WHEN OM.ORDER_RELEASE_GID LIKE 'GECORP.WOB%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END WOB, (SELECT order_release_refnum_value FROM order_release_refnum WHERE ORDER_RELEASE_REFNUM_QUAL_GID IN ('GE.MSD', 'GECORP.MSD') AND order_release_gid = OM.order_release_gid AND rownum =1 ) AS MSD, v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AS DOMAIN_SHIP_ID, CASE WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 2 then '2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdat e) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME))= 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_PU.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME)) = 0 THEN 'NEW' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, s.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(s.end_time, s.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) = 0 then 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END PU_AGE, -- case when ACT_DEL is null then round(trunc(sysdate) - nvl(trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(eta.actual, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID)), trunc(UT C.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.end_time, sh.dest_LOCATION_GID)))) else 'TRACKED' end DEL_AGED_DAYS, CASE WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 2 THEN '2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) > 2 then 'OVER 2 DAYS' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) > 2 THEN 'OVER 2 DAYS' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start_time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 1 then 'YESTERDAY' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 1 THEN 'YESTERDAY' -- when round(trunc(sysdate) - trunc(UTC.GET_LOCAL_DATE(sh.start _time, sh.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID))) = 0 then 'NEW' WHEN act_del.actual IS NULL AND ROUND(TRUNC(sysdate) - TRUNC(NVL(ETA.EVENTDATE, v_ship.END_TIME))) = 0 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'TRACKED' END DEL_AGE, (SELECT c.email_address FROM Shipment_involved_party sip, contact c WHERE glog_util.remove_domain(sip.involved_party_qual_gid) = 'SUPPLIER' AND c.contact_gid =sip.involved_party_contact_gid AND sip.shipment_gid = v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID AND rownum =1 ) SUPPLIER_EMAIL, (SELECT st.STATUS_TYPE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE st.STATUS_TYPE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES') AND s t.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_TYPE_GID", (SELECT ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID FROM SHIPMENT_STATUS ST WHERE ST.STATUS_VALUE_GID IN ('GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_ACCEPTED', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_PICKUP NOTIFICATION', 'GECORP.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR1.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE001.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE002.SECURE RESOURCES_B OOKED', 'GE/GE003.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED', 'GE/GE003/GR2.SECURE RESOURCES_BOOKED') AND st.shipment_gid =v_ship.shipment_gid AND rownum =1 ) "STATUS_VALUE_GID" FROM shipment v_ship, location loc_src, location loc_des, ORDER_MOVEMENT OM, region_detail v_region_src, region_detail v_region_des, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'DEL' "PUDEL", s.end_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) Actual FROM shipment s, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN('D1', 'J1', 'VA') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND max_itn.itn = ie s.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' ) act_del, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, 'PU' "PUDEL", s.start_time "PLANNED", TRUNC(ies.eventdate) actual FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ies, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('CP', 'VD') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) act_pu, (SELECT s.shipment_gid, TRUNC(ies.eventdate) EVENTDATE FROM shipment s, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS i es, SS_STATUS_HISTORY SSSH, (SELECT ssh.shipment_gid, MAX(ssh.i_transaction_no) itn FROM SS_STATUS_HISTORY ssh, IE_SHIPMENTSTATUS ie WHERE ssh.i_transaction_no = ie.i_transaction_no AND ie.status_code_gid IN ('X2', 'AG') AND ssh.is_hidden = 'N' GROUP BY ssh.shipment_gid ) max_itn WHERE s.shipment_gid = max_itn.shipment_gid AND s.shipment_type_gid = 'TRANSPORT' AND max_itn.itn = ies.i_transaction_no AND sssh.i_transaction_no= ies.i_transaction_no ) ETA WHERE loc_src.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.SOURCE_LOCATION_GID AND v_ship.shipment_gid =om.shipment_gid(+) AND v_ship.shipment_type_gid ='TRANSPORT' AND loc_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = v_region_src.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND v_region_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID = loc_des.COUNTRY_CODE3_GID AND glog_util.remove_domai n(v_region_src.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND glog_util.remove_domain(v_region_des.region_gid) IN ('EMEA', 'APAC', 'NAM', 'SAM', 'JSK', 'IND') AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_pu.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.shipment_gid = act_del.shipment_gid (+) AND v_ship.SHIPMENT_GID = eta.SHIPMENT_GID(+) AND loc_des.LOCATION_GID =v_ship.DEST_LOCATION_GID AND ( ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE <TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE >=TR UNC(v_ship.END_TIME) AND (act_del.actual IS NULL AND ETA.EVENTDATE <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) OR ( ETA.EVENTDATE IS NULL AND act_del.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.END_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1 OR (act_PU.actual IS NULL AND TRUNC(v_ship.START_TIME) <=TRUNC(sysdate)-1) ) ) AND v_ship.insert_date >=(sysdate -150) ) --WHERE "Op_Unit" IN ( 'OU_GERE_CN_WESY', 'AX_0030', 'AX_0032', 'AX_0065', 'AX_0058', 'AX_0061', 'AX_0062', Shared Pool Advisory

  • SP: Shared Pool Est LC: Estimated Library Cache Factr: Factor
  • Note there is often a 1:Many correlation between a single logical object in the Library Cache, and the physical number of memory objects associated with it. Therefore comparing the number of Lib Cache objects (e.g. in v$librarycache), with the number of Lib Cache Memory Objects is invalid.

Replication System Resource Usage

Back to Top

Replication SGA Usage

  • SGA usage of Streams Pool for GoldenGate/XStream processes ordered by SGA Used %Diff, SGA Allocated %Diff, Component in descending order
  • For each Capture (Object Name), reporting memory used by Capture and Logminer processes at the Begin and End snapshots
  • For each Apply (Object Name), reporting memory used by each Apply process at the Begin and End snapshots
  • % SGA Util refers to the percentage of allocated memory used at the End snapshot
  • Memory usage is displayed in Megabytes
ComponentSession ModuleObject NameSGA Used Begin SnapSGA Used End SnapSGA Used %DiffSGA Allocated Begin SnapSGA Allocated End SnapSGA Allocated %Diff% SGA Util

GoldenGate Capture Rate

Back to Top

GoldenGate Apply Reader

  • GoldenGate Apply Reader statistics ordered by Replicat Name and Apply Name in ascending order
  • Apply name prefixed with a * indicates process (re)started between Begin and End snapshots
  • Columns suffixed with K,M,G,T,P are in multiples of 1000
  • Lag(s) column displays lag in seconds of the most recently captured message
Replicat NameApply NameReader LCRs DeqReader Lag(s)
REP_OTMOGG$REP_OTM173.6K1.00

Back to Replication Statistics (GoldenGate, XStream)
Back to Top

GoldenGate Apply Coordinator

  • GoldenGate Apply Coordinator statistics ordered by Replicat Name and Apply Name in ascending order
  • Apply name prefixed with a * indicates process (re)started between Begin and End snapshots
  • Wait Deps% refers to percentage of transactions having to wait for other transactions due to dependency
  • Wait Commit% refers to percentage of transactions having to wait due to source transaction commit ordering
  • Columns suffixed with K,M,G,T,P are in multiples of 1000
Replicat NameApply NameTxns ReceivedTxns AppliedTxns Rolled BackWait Deps%Wait Commit%Unassigned Complete TxnsTotal Errors
REP_OTMOGG$REP_OTM 38.2K38.2K00.000.0010

Back to Replication Statistics (GoldenGate, XStream)
Back to Top

GoldenGate Apply Server

  • GoldenGate Apply Server statistics ordered by Replicat Name and Apply Name in ascending order
  • Apply name prefixed with a * indicates process (re)started between Begin and End snapshots
  • Columns suffixed with K,M,G,T,P are in multiples of 1000
Replicat NameApply NameServer LCRs AppliedServer Dequeue Time(s)Server Apply Time(s)Total LCRs RetriedTotal Txns Retried
REP_OTMOGG$REP_OTM173.6K0.0012.2200

  • Time Per Msg values are in centiseconds

Persistent Queues

  • Ordered by Queue Name

  • %Delay Msgs - % of msgs enqueued with delay
  • %Trasf Time - % of Enqueue time spent in transformation
  • %Eval Time - % of Enqueue time spent in rule evaluation

Active Session History (ASH) Report

  • Top SQL with Top Events
  • Top SQL with Top Row Sources
  • Top Sessions
  • Top Blocking Sessions
  • Top PL/SQL Procedures
  • Top Events
  • Top Event P1/P2/P3 Values
  • Top DB Objects
  • Activity Over Time
Back to Top

Top SQL with Top Events

  • Top SQL statements by DB Time along with the top events by DB Time for those SQLs.
  • % Activity is the percentage of DB Time due to the SQL.
  • % Event is the percentage of DB Time due to the event that the SQL is waiting on.
  • % Row Source is the percentage of DB Time due to the row source for the SQL waiting on the event.
  • Executions is the number of executions of the SQL that were sampled in ASH.
SQL IDPlan HashExecutions% ActivityEvent% EventTop Row Source% Row SourceSQL TextContainer Name

Back to Active Session History (ASH) Report
Back to Top

Top SQL with Top Row Sources

  • Top SQL statements by DB Time along with the top row sources by DB Time for those SQLs.
  • % Activity is the percentage of DB Time due to the SQL.
  • % Row Source is the percentage of DB Time spent on the row source by that SQL.
  • % Event is the percentage of DB Time spent on the event by the SQL executing the row source.
  • Executions is the number of executions of the SQL that were sampled in ASH.
SQL IDPlan HashExecutions% ActivityRow Source% Row SourceTop Event% EventSQL TextContainer Name

Back to Active Session History (ASH) Report
Back to Top

Top Sessions

  • '# Samples Active' shows the number of ASH samples in which the session was found waiting for that particular event. The percentage shown in this column is calculated with respect to wall clock time and not total database activity.
  • 'XIDs' shows the number of distinct transaction IDs sampled in ASH when the session was waiting for that particular event
Sid, Serial#% ActivityEvent% EventUserProgram# Samples ActiveXIDs

Top Blocking Sessions

Back to Active Session History (ASH) Report
Back to Top

Top PL/SQL Procedures

  • 'PL/SQL entry subprogram' represents the application's top-level entry-point (procedure, function, trigger, package initialization or RPC call) into PL/SQL.
  • 'PL/SQL current subprogram' is the PL/SQL subprogram being executed at the point of sampling . If the value is 'SQL', it represents the percentage of time spent executing SQL for the particular PL/SQL entry subprogram
PL/SQL Entry Subprogram% ActivityPL/SQL Current Subprogram% CurrentContainer Name
GLOGOWNER.GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN1.44 GLOGOWNER.GLOG_UTIL.REMOVE_DOMAIN1.42 PDBGEPDIPC

Back to Top

Activity Over Time

  • Analysis period is divided into smaller time slots as indicated in the 'Slot Time (Duration)'.
  • Top 3 events are reported in each of those slots
  • 'Slot Count' shows the number of ASH samples in that slot
  • 'Event Count' shows the number of ASH samples waiting for that event in that slot
  • '% Event' is 'Event Count' over all ASH samples in the analysis period
Slot Time (Duration)Slot CountEventEvent Count% Event
